papers.title: ACE: Sending Burstiness Control for High-Quality Real-time Communication.
papers.abstract: Modern real-time communication (RTC) demands both ultra-low latency and consistently high visual quality. Yet, as content becomes more dynamic and RTTs shrink, we reveal a previously overlooked problem: long-tail queuing latency in the sender's pacing queue between encoder and network. This phenomenon is rooted in a mismatch between the bursty frame stream produced by the encoder and the smooth traffic expected by the network. Existing approaches trying to smoothen the bitrate inevitably force an undesirable trade-off between latency and video quality. To address this, we propose a dual-control approach that manages both the encoding and transmission burstiness. At the sender, we dynamically adjust the bucket size of a token-based pacer to control burstiness at the granularity of frame level. Within the encoder, we introduce an adaptive complexity mechanism that smoothens frame sizes without sacrificing quality. Trace-driven emulation and real-world experiments show our solution ACE reduces end-to-end 95th percentile latency by up to 43% while maintaining superior visual quality versus the state of the art.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代实时通信 (RTC) 需要超低延迟和始终如一的高视觉质量。然而，随着内容变得更加动态和 RTT 缩小，我们揭示了一个以前被忽视的问题：编码器和网络之间的发送者调步队列中的长尾排队延迟。这种现象的根源在于编码器产生的突发帧流与网络期望的平滑流量之间的不匹配。试图平滑比特率的现有方法不可避免地会在延迟和视频质量之间进行不必要的权衡。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种管理编码和传输突发性的双重控制方法。在发送方，我们动态调整基于令牌的定步器的桶大小，以在帧级别的粒度上控制突发性。在编码器中，我们引入了一种自适应复杂性机制，可以在不牺牲质量的情况下平滑帧大小。跟踪驱动的仿真和真实世界的实验表明，我们的解决方案 ACE 将端到端 95% 的延迟降低了高达 43%，同时保持了与现有技术相比卓越的视觉质量。

papers.title: Achieving High-Speed and Robust Encrypted Traffic Anomaly Detection with Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: Attacks against data centers are becoming more common as a result of the fast expansion of applications. In order to keep pace with the growing amount of data centers connected to their networks, internet service providers must offer comprehensive security services. However, existing network intrusion detection systems (NIDS) are either ineffective or inefficient for the high-speed encrypted network traffic. In this paper, we design and implement Mazu, an inline network intrusion detection system with programmable switches specifically developed to protect data centers connecting to the internet service provider. Mazu proposes a dual-plane feature extraction model to extract extensive traffic features at near line-speed. Mazu also proposes a lightweight one-class classification model that trains the best parameters exclusively on benign traffic to identify the malicious traffic. In addition, Mazu introduces an online update mechanism aimed at dynamically adjusting the detection model in response to environmental changes. Mazu has been in production for two years, during which time it has identified over 10 critical attack events and protect more than 10 million servers for two ISPs. Our production and testbed evaluations demonstrate that Mazu can detect malicious traffic entering the data center sites with approximately 90% accuracy within minutes.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于应用程序的快速扩展，针对数据中心的攻击变得越来越普遍。 In order to keep pace with the growing amount of data centers connected to their networks, internet service providers must offer comprehensive security services.然而，现有的网络入侵检测系统（NIDS）对于高速加密网络流量要么无效要么效率低下。 In this paper, we design and implement Mazu, an inline network intrusion detection system with programmable switches specifically developed to protect data centers connecting to the internet service provider. Mazu提出了一种双平面特征提取模型，以近线速提取广泛的交通特征。 Mazu also proposes a lightweight one-class classification model that trains the best parameters exclusively on benign traffic to identify the malicious traffic.此外，Mazu还引入了在线更新机制，旨在根据环境变化动态调整检测模型。 Mazu has been in production for two years, during which time it has identified over 10 critical attack events and protect more than 10 million servers for two ISPs. Our production and testbed evaluations demonstrate that Mazu can detect malicious traffic entering the data center sites with approximately 90% accuracy within minutes.

papers.title: Acoustic Backscatter Network for Vehicle Body-in-White.
papers.abstract: We present a novel approach to monitor the Body in White (BiW), the fundamental metallic structure of a vehicle. Existing monitoring methods, including both wired and wireless sensor systems, face significant challenges due to integration complexity, weight considerations, material costs, and signal blockage within the metallic environment. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Arach-Net, an acoustic backscatter network that leverages the conductive properties of the BiW to propagate vibration signals for energy transfer and data communication. This system comprises battery-free tags that harvest energy from BiW vibrations and utilize a backscatter technique for efficient communication, thereby eliminating the need for external power sources and reducing the power consumption. We address key challenges such as power sufficiency for tag activation and sustained operation, and collision reduction in network communication, by designing an ultra-low power backscatter tag and a distributed slot allocation protocol. We implement ArachNet, and deploy 12 tags onto the BiW of an electric SUV car. The evaluation results show that the power consumption of the tag is 51.0 μ W for uplink packet transmission, and 24.8 μ W for downlink packet reception. With our network protocol, the slot utilization can be up to 81.2%.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种监测白车身（BiW）的新颖方法，白车身是车辆的基本金属结构。由于集成复杂性、重量考虑、材料成本和金属环境中的信号阻塞，现有的监测方法（包括有线和无线传感器系统）面临着重大挑战。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了 Arach-Net，这是一种声学反向散射网络，它利用 BiW 的导电特性来传播振动信号，以实现能量传输和数据通信。该系统包含无电池标签，可从 BiW 振动中收集能量，并利用反向散射技术进行高效通信，从而无需外部电源并降低功耗。我们通过设计超低功耗反向散射标签和分布式时隙分配协议来解决关键挑战，例如标签激活和持续运行的电源充足性以及网络通信中的冲突减少。我们实施了 ArachNet，并将 12 个标签部署到电动 SUV 汽车的 BiW 上。评估结果显示，标签上行数据包发送功耗为51.0μW，下行数据包接收功耗为24.8μW。使用我们的网络协议，时隙利用率可以高达 81.2%。

papers.title: Agua: A Concept-Based Explainer for Learning-Enabled Systems.
papers.abstract:
While deep learning offers superior performance in systems and networking, adoption is often hindered by difficulties in understanding and debugging. Explainability aims to bridge this gap by providing insight into the model's decisions. However, existing methods primarily identify the most influential input features, forcing operators to perform extensive manual analysis of low-level signals (e.g., buffer t - 1).

In this paper, we introduce Agua, an explainability framework that explains a model's decisions using high-level, human understandable concepts (e.g., "volatile network conditions"). Our concept-based explainability framework lays the foundation for intelligent networked systems, enabling operators to interact with data-driven systems. To explain the controller's outputs using concept-level reasoning, Agua builds a surrogate concept-based model of the controller with two mappings: one from the controller's embeddings to a predefined concept space, and another from the concept space to the controller's output. Through comprehensive evaluations on diverse applications—adaptive bitrate streaming, congestion control, and distributed denial of service detection—we demonstrate Agua's ability to generate robust, high-fidelity (93–99%) explanations, outperforming prior methods. Finally, we demonstrate several practical use cases of Agua in networking environments—debugging unintended behaviors, identifying distribution shifts, devising concept-based strategies for efficient retraining, and augmenting environment-specific datasets.
papers.abstract_zh:
虽然深度学习在系统和网络方面提供了卓越的性能，但其采用常常因理解和调试方面的困难而受到阻碍。可解释性旨在通过提供对模型决策的洞察来弥合这一差距。然而，现有方法主要识别最有影响力的输入特征，迫使操作员对低电平信号（例如缓冲区 t - 1）进行广泛的手动分析。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Agua，这是一个可解释性框架，它使用人类可理解的高级概念（例如“不稳定的网络条件”）来解释模型的决策。我们基于概念的可解释性框架为智能网络系统奠定了基础，使操作员能够与数据驱动的系统进行交互。为了使用概念级推理解释控制器的输出，Agua 构建了一个基于代理概念的控制器模型，具有两种映射：一种从控制器的嵌入到预定义的概念空间，另一种从概念空间到控制器的输出。通过对不同应用程序（自适应比特率流、拥塞控制和分布式拒绝服务检测）的综合评估，我们证明了 Agua 生成稳健、高保真 (93-99%) 解释的能力，优于先前的方法。最后，我们展示了 Agua 在网络环境中的几个实际用例——调试意外行为、识别分布变化、设计基于概念的策略以进行有效的再训练，以及增强特定于环境的数据集。

papers.title: Albatross: A Containerized Cloud Gateway Platform with FPGA-accelerated Packet-level Load Balancing.
papers.abstract: Alibaba Cloud's centralized gateways relied heavily on high-capacity switching ASICs, but the abrupt halt of Tofino chip evolution in Jan 2023 forced us to seek alternatives that can meet the requirements of performance, supply-chain security, code reuse, and resource efficiency. After evaluating multiple options, we developed Albatross , our 3rd gen cloud gateway based on FPGA and x86 CPUs. Albatross delivers FPGA-based packet-level load balancing to the host CPUs to prevent CPU core overload, manages large reorder buffers under high-latency jitters (100μs) during complex cloud service processing, and resolves head-of-line (HOL) blocking from packet losses or software exceptions in CPUs. To avoid being overloaded by heavy hitters due to anomalies or attacks, it also implements a two-stage rate limiter for millions of tenants with only 2MB of FPGA memory. To maximize resource utilization, Albatross uses containerization to host multiple gateway instances and designs a BGP proxy to lessen the BGP peering overhead on uplink switches caused by high-density container deployments. After hundreds of man-months of development, a single Albatross node can process 80~120Mpps of cloud network traffic with an average latency of 20μs, reducing gateway and sandbox infra costs by 50%.
papers.abstract_zh: 阿里云的集中式网关严重依赖大容量交换ASIC，但2023年1月Tofino芯片演进的突然停止迫使我们寻找能够满足性能、供应链安全、代码复用和资源效率要求的替代方案。在评估了多个选项后，我们开发了 Albatross，这是我们基于 FPGA 和 x86 CPU 的第三代云网关。 Albatross 为主机 CPU 提供基于 FPGA 的数据包级负载平衡，以防止 CPU 核心过载，在复杂的云服务处理过程中管理高延迟抖动 (100μs) 下的大型重排序缓冲区，并解决由于数据包丢失或 CPU 中软件异常而导致的队头 (HOL) 阻塞。为了避免由于异常或攻击而导致重击者过载，它还为仅 2MB FPGA 内存的数百万租户实现了两级速率限制器。为了最大限度地提高资源利用率，Albatross 使用容器化来托管多个网关实例，并设计 BGP 代理来减少因高密度容器部署而导致的上行链路交换机上的 BGP 对等开销。经过数百人月的开发，单个Albatross节点可以处理80~120Mpps的云网络流量，平均延迟为20μs，将网关和沙箱基础设施成本降低50%。

papers.title: Alibaba Stellar: A New Generation RDMA Network for Cloud AI.
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in cloud environments has intensified the demand for high-performance AI training and inference, where Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) plays a critical role. However, existing RDMA virtualization solutions, such as Single-Root Input/Output Virtualization (SR-IOV), face significant limitations in scalability, performance, and stability. These issues include lengthy container initialization times, hardware resource constraints, and inefficient traffic steering. To address these challenges, we propose Stellar, a new generation RDMA network for cloud AI. Stellar introduces three key innovations: Para-Virtualized Direct Memory Access (PVDMA) for on-demand memory pinning, extended Memory Translation Table (eMTT) for optimized GPU Direct RDMA (GDR) performance, and RDMA Packet Spray for efficient multi-path utilization. Deployed in our large-scale AI clusters, Stellar spins up virtual devices in seconds, reduces container initialization time by 15 times, and improves LLM training speed by up to 14%. Our evaluations demonstrate that Stellar significantly outperforms existing solutions, offering a scalable, stable, and high-performance RDMA network for cloud AI.
papers.abstract_zh: 云环境中大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速采用加剧了对高性能人工智能训练和推理的需求，其中远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 发挥着关键作用。然而，现有的 RDMA 虚拟化解决方案，例如单根输入/输出虚拟化 (SR-IOV)，在可扩展性、性能和稳定性方面面临重大限制。这些问题包括冗长的容器初始化时间、硬件资源限制和低效的流量引导。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Stellar，一种用于云 AI 的新一代 RDMA 网络。 Stellar 推出了三项关键创新：用于按需内存固定的半虚拟化直接内存访问 (PVDMA)、用于优化 GPU 直接 RDMA (GDR) 性能的扩展内存转换表 (eMTT) 以及用于高效多路径利用的 RDMA 数据包喷射。 Stellar部署在我们的大规模AI集群中，可以在几秒钟内启动虚拟设备，将容器初始化时间减少15倍，并将LLM训练速度提高高达14%。我们的评估表明，Stellar 的性能显着优于现有解决方案，为云 AI 提供可扩展、稳定且高性能的 RDMA 网络。

papers.title: AoRA: AI-on-RAN for Backhaul-free Edge Inference.
papers.abstract: In cellular networks, edge intelligence is often enabled by MultiAccess Edge Computing (MEC), which aims to bring AI services closer to end users. Although MEC reduces latency by placing computation near the network edge, it remains external to the Radio Access Network (RAN) and its native execution environment, thereby introducing additional transport and buffering delays. The emerging AI-on-RAN paradigm proposes to overcome these limitations but remains largely conceptual, lacking practical implementation and feasibility validation. In this paper, we present AoRA, the first framework realizing the AI-on-RAN vision by dynamically utilizing available computational headroom in GPU- and NPU-accelerated RAN platforms to deliver AI services directly from within the base stations. AoRA leverages containerized AI workloads in the 5G RAN stack to enable inlined and opportunistic AI service provisioning without degrading core telecom operations. The framework is fully compliant with O-RAN interfaces and can operate seamlessly alongside existing edge computing infrastructures. Evaluations show that AoRA reduces transport latency by over 30% compared to MEC and 70% compared to cloud-based setups.
papers.abstract_zh: 在蜂窝网络中，边缘智能通常由多路访问边缘计算（MEC）实现，旨在让人工智能服务更接近最终用户。尽管 MEC 通过将计算放置在网络边缘附近来减少延迟，但它仍然位于无线接入网络 (RAN) 及其本机执行环境的外部，从而引入了额外的传输和缓冲延迟。新兴的 AI-on-RAN 范式旨在克服这些限制，但主要仍处于概念性阶段，缺乏实际实施和可行性验证。在本文中，我们提出了 AoRA，这是第一个实现 AI-on-RAN 愿景的框架，通过动态利用 GPU 和 NPU 加速的 RAN 平台中的可用计算空间，直接从基站内提供 AI 服务。 AoRA 利用 5G RAN 堆栈中的容器化 AI 工作负载来实现内联和机会性 AI 服务配置，而不会降低核心电信运营的性能。该框架完全符合 O-RAN 接口，可以与现有边缘计算基础设施无缝运行。评估表明，与 MEC 相比，AoRA 的传输延迟降低了 30% 以上，与基于云的设置相比，传输延迟降低了 70%。

papers.title: Astral: A Datacenter Infrastructure for Large Language Model Training at Scale.
papers.abstract: The flourishing of Large Language Models (LLMs) calls for increasingly ultra-scale training. In this paper, we share our experience in designing, deploying, and operating our novel Astral datacenter infrastructure, along with operational lessons and evolutionary insights gained from its production use. Astral has three important innovations: (i) a same-rail interconnection network architecture on tier-2, which enables the scaling of LLM training. To physically deploy this high-density infrastructure, we introduce a distributed high-voltage direct current power system and a new air-liquid integrated cooling system. (ii) a full-stack monitoring system featuring cross-host and hierarchical logging correlation, which diagnoses failures at scale and precisely localizes root causes. (iii) an operator-granular forecasting component Seer that efficiently generates operator execution timelines with acceptable accuracy, aiding in fault diagnosis, model tuning, and network architecture upgrading. Astral infrastructure has been gradually deployed over 18 months, supporting LLM training and inference for multiple customers.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的蓬勃发展需要越来越大规模的培训。在本文中，我们分享了我们在设计、部署和运营新型 Astral 数据中心基础设施方面的经验，以及从其生产使用中获得的运营经验教训和演变见解。 Astral 拥有三项重要创新：(i) 第二层同轨互连网络架构，可实现 LLM 培训的扩展。为了物理部署这种高密度基础设施，我们引入了分布式高压直流电源系统和新型气液集成冷却系统。 (ii) 具有跨主机和分层日志关联的全栈监控系统，可大规模诊断故障并精确定位根本原因。 (iii) 算子粒度预测组件 Seer，能够以可接受的精度高效生成算子执行时间线，有助于故障诊断、模型调整和网络架构升级。 Astral 基础设施已在 18 个月内逐步部署，支持多个客户的 LLM 培训和推理。

papers.title: ByteDance Jakiro: Enabling RDMA and TCP over Virtual Private Cloud.
papers.abstract: A Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) that enables both RDMA and TCP provides advantages for both tenants and cloud providers. It serves the flexible demands of RDMA and TCP of tenant applications while delivering a cost-effective solution compared to the construction of two distinct overlay networks. In this study, we introduce Jakiro, an innovative framework of vNIC design that supports both RDMA and TCP within ByteDance Cloud. Jakiro holds the capability to support fundamental VPC features such as QoS, security groups, etc., for both RDMA and TCP streams while maintaining compatibility with applications and intra-host RDMA optimization techniques. We benchmark Jakiro's performance using basic test cases and real-world high-performance computing applications and distributed machine learning training. The results indicate that the RDMA performance of Jakiro is close to that of the physical RDMA. Concurrently, Jakiro guarantees a weighted fair QoS between RDMA and TCP. Jakiro has been deployed in ByteDance Cloud for one year, we share our critical design and deployment decisions, as well as experiences and lessons from production.
papers.abstract_zh: 同时支持 RDMA 和 TCP 的虚拟私有云 (VPC) 为租户和云提供商提供了优势。它满足租户应用程序对 RDMA 和 TCP 的灵活需求，同时与构建两个不同的覆盖网络相比，提供经济高效的解决方案。在本研究中，我们介绍了 Jakiro，这是一种创新的 vNIC 设计框架，支持字节跳动云中的 RDMA 和 TCP。 Jakiro 能够支持 RDMA 和 TCP 流的基本 VPC 功能，例如 QoS、安全组等，同时保持与应用程序和主机内 RDMA 优化技术的兼容性。我们使用基本测试用例和现实世界的高性能计算应用程序以及分布式机器学习训练来对 Jakiro 的性能进行基准测试。结果表明，Jakiro 的 RDMA 性能接近物理 RDMA。同时，Jakiro 保证 RDMA 和 TCP 之间的加权公平 QoS。 Jakiro 已经在字节跳动云部署一年了，我们分享我们的关键设计和部署决策，以及生产中的经验和教训。

papers.title: ByteScale: Communication-Efficient Scaling of LLM Training with a 2048K Context Length on 16384 GPUs.
papers.abstract:
Scaling long-context ability is essential for Large Language Models (LLMs). To amortize the memory consumption across multiple devices in long-context training, inter-data partitioning (a.k.a. Data Parallelism) and intra-data partitioning (a.k.a. Context Parallelism) are commonly used. Current training frameworks predominantly treat the two techniques as orthogonal, and establish static communication groups to organize the devices as a static mesh (e.g., a 2D mesh). However, the sequences for LLM training typically vary in lengths, no matter for texts, multi-modalities or reinforcement learning. The mismatch between data heterogeneity and static mesh causes redundant communication and imbalanced computation, degrading the training efficiency.

In this work, we introduce ByteScale, an efficient, flexible, and scalable LLM training framework for large-scale mixed training of long and short sequences. The core of ByteScale is a novel parallelism strategy, namely Hybrid Data Parallelism (HDP), which unifies the inter- and intra-data partitioning with a dynamic mesh design. In particular, we build a communication optimizer, which eliminates the redundant communication for short sequences by data-aware sharding and dynamic communication, and further compresses the communication cost for long sequences by selective offloading. Besides, we also develop a balance scheduler to mitigate the imbalanced computation by parallelism-aware data assignment. We evaluate ByteScale with the model sizes ranging from 7B to 141B, context lengths from 256K to 2048K, on a production cluster with 16384 GPUs. Experiment results show that ByteScale outperforms the state-of-the-art training system by up to 7.89×.
papers.abstract_zh:
扩展长上下文能力对于大型语言模型 (LLM) 至关重要。为了在长上下文训练中分摊多个设备上的内存消耗，通常使用数据间分区（也称为数据并行性）和数据内分区（又称为上下文并行性）。当前的训练框架主要将这两种技术视为正交，并建立静态通信组以将设备组织为静态网格（例如，2D 网格）。然而，无论是文本、多模态还是强化学习，法学硕士培训的序列通常长度各不相同。数据异构性和静态网格之间的不匹配导致冗余通信和不平衡计算，降低训练效率。

在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ByteScale，一种高效、灵活、可扩展的 LLM 训练框架，用于长短序列的大规模混合训练。 ByteScale的核心是一种新颖的并行策略，即混合数据并行（HDP），它将数据间和数据内分区与动态网格设计相结合。特别是，我们构建了一个通信优化器，通过数据感知分片和动态通信消除了短序列的冗余通信，并通过选择性卸载进一步压缩长序列的通信成本。此外，我们还开发了一个平衡调度程序，通过并行感知数据分配来减轻不平衡计算。我们在具有 16384 个 GPU 的生产集群上使用从 7B 到 141B 的模型大小、从 256K 到 2048K 的上下文长度来评估 ByteScale。实验结果表明，ByteScale 的性能比最先进的训练系统高出 7.89 倍。

papers.title: ByteTracker: An Agentless and Real-time Path-aware Network Probing System.
papers.abstract: As the number of data center servers grows into the millions and due to the demand for more accurate, rapid and powerful network fault detection and location, the existing Pingmesh-centric monitoring and diagnostic system is not efficient enough. In this paper, we propose ByteTracker, the first agentless probing and diagnostic system for large-scale data center networks. It does not need to deploy probe processes or make any configurations on end hosts, and all probes are launched by a small number of centralized Probers. ByteTracker achieves accurate, real-time probe path tracking with packet mirroring on switches. By reducing end-host probe noise, precisely identifying network timeout probes, accurately tracking probe paths, and marking the failed switch with multiple network timeout probes, ByteTracker can locate network failures with nearly 100% accuracy. We have deployed ByteTracker in all of our data centers for over half a year. During deployment, ByteTracker can detect almost all network anomalies and locate them within 5 seconds with 100% accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着数据中心服务器数量增长到数百万台，以及对更准确、更快速、更强大的网络故障检测和定位的需求，现有以Pingmesh为中心的监控和诊断系统已经不够高效。在本文中，我们提出了 ByteTracker，这是第一个用于大规模数据中心网络的无代理探测和诊断系统。它不需要在终端主机上部署探测进程或进行任何配置，所有探测均由少数集中式探测器发起。 ByteTracker 通过交换机上的数据包镜像实现准确、实时的探测路径跟踪。通过降低终端主机探测噪声、精确识别网络超时探测、准确跟踪探测路径以及使用多个网络超时探测标记故障交换机，ByteTracker 可以近 100% 的准确度定位网络故障。我们在所有数据中心部署 ByteTracker 已有半年多的时间。在部署过程中，ByteTracker可以检测几乎所有网络异常并在5秒内定位，准确率100%。

papers.title: Carbon- and Precedence-Aware Scheduling for Data Processing Clusters.
papers.abstract: As large-scale data processing workloads continue to grow, their carbon footprint raises concerns. Prior research on carbon-aware schedulers has focused on shifting computation to align with the availability of low-carbon energy, but these approaches assume that each task can be executed independently. In contrast, data processing jobs have precedence constraints that complicate decisions, since delaying an upstream "bottleneck" task to a low-carbon period also blocks downstream tasks, impacting makespan. In this paper, we show that carbon-aware scheduling for data processing benefits from knowledge of both time-varying carbon and precedence constraints. Our main contribution is PCAPS, a carbon-aware scheduler that builds on state-of-the-art scoring or probability-based techniques - in doing so, it explicitly relates the structural importance of each task against the time-varying characteristics of carbon intensity. To illustrate gains due to fine-grained task-level scheduling, we also study CAP, a wrapper for any carbon-agnostic scheduler that generalizes the provisioning ideas of PCAPS. Both techniques allow a user-configurable priority between carbon and makespan, and we give basic analytic results to relate the trade-off between these objectives. Our prototype on a 100-node Kubernetes cluster shows that a moderate configuration of PCAPS reduces carbon footprint by up to 32.9% without significantly impacting total efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着大规模数据处理工作负载的持续增长，其碳足迹引起了人们的担忧。先前对碳感知调度程序的研究重点是转移计算以适应低碳能源的可用性，但这些方法假设每个任务都可以独立执行。相比之下，数据处理作业具有优先级限制，使决策变得复杂，因为将上游“瓶颈”任务推迟到低碳时期也会阻碍下游任务，影响完工时间。在本文中，我们表明数据处理的碳感知调度受益于时变碳和优先约束的知识。我们的主要贡献是 PCAPS，这是一种碳感知调度程序，它建立在最先进的评分或基于概率的技术之上 - 在此过程中，它明确地将每个任务的结构重要性与碳强度的时变特征联系起来。为了说明细粒度任务级调度带来的收益，我们还研究了 CAP，它是任何与碳无关的调度程序的包装器，概括了 PCAPS 的配置思想。这两种技术都允许用户在碳和完工时间之间配置优先级，并且我们提供基本的分析结果来关联这些目标之间的权衡。我们在 100 节点 Kubernetes 集群上的原型表明，适度的 PCAPS 配置可减少高达 32.9% 的碳足迹，而不会显着影响总效率。

papers.title: CClinguist: An Expert-Free Framework for Future-Compatible Congestion Control Algorithm Identification.
papers.abstract:
Congestion control algorithms (CCAs) play a critical role in determining transmission quality. With their rapid evolution during the past few decades, understanding the CCA landscape on the Internet has become increasingly essential for network advancement. Traditional CCA census tools, however, rely heavily on manual configuration and construction, necessitating significant human effort to keep pace with the introduction of new CCAs.

In this paper, we introduce the CClinguist framework, which is an expert-free CCA identification tool. It mainly comprises a network profile auto-generator and a self-learning classifier to accommodate emerging CCAs and new network scenarios, ensuring future compatibility in both the temporal and spatial aspects of the network census. We also develop a prototype of CClinguist and evaluate its performance. The results demonstrate that CClingusit can accurately identify 12 known CCAs in the Linux kernel with 97.33% accuracy. Notably, it maintains high accuracy with new scenarios and emerging CCAs, including learning-based and ECN-based CCAs, outperforming state-of-the-art identification tools. When applied to a census of over 7,000 web servers, CClinguist successfully detects unknown CCA variants and is able to explore the support of ECN on web servers.
papers.abstract_zh:
拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 在确定传输质量方面发挥着关键作用。随着过去几十年的快速发展，了解互联网上的 CCA 格局对于网络发展变得越来越重要。然而，传统的 CCA 普查工具严重依赖手动配置和构建，需要大量人力才能跟上新 CCA 的引入。

在本文中，我们介绍了CClinguist框架，它是一个无需专家的CCA识别工具。它主要包括网络概况自动生成器和自学习分类器，以适应新兴的CCA和新的网络场景，确保未来网络普查在时间和空间方面的兼容性。我们还开发了 CClinguist 原型并评估其性能。结果表明，CClingusit 可以准确识别 Linux 内核中的 12 个已知 CCA，准确率高达 97.33%。值得注意的是，它在新场景和新兴 CCA 中保持了高精度，包括基于学习和基于 ECN 的 CCA，其性能优于最先进的识别工具。当应用于对 7,000 多个 Web 服务器的普查时，CClinguist 成功检测到未知的 CCA 变体，并能够探索 ECN 在 Web 服务器上的支持。

papers.title: CEIO: A Cache-Efficient Network I/O Architecture for NIC-CPU Data Paths.
papers.abstract: Efficient Input/Output (I/O) data path between NICs and CPUs/DRAMs is critical for supporting datacenter applications with high-performance network transmission, especially as link speed scales to 100Gbps and beyond. Traditional I/O acceleration strategies, such as Data Direct I/O (DDIO) and Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA), perform suboptimally due to the inefficient utilization of the Last-Level Cache (LLC). This paper presents CEIO, a novel cache-efficient network I/O architecture that employs proactive rate control and elastic buffering to achieve zero LLC misses in the I/O data path while ensuring the effectiveness of DDIO and RDMA under various network conditions. We have implemented CEIO on commodity SmartNICs and incorporated it into widely-used DPDK and RDMA libraries. Experiments with well-optimized RPC framework and distributed file system under realistic workloads demonstrate that CEIO achieves up to 2.9× higher throughput and 1.9× lower P99.9 latency over prior work.
papers.abstract_zh: NIC 和 CPU/DRAM 之间的高效输入/输出 (I/O) 数据路径对于支持具有高性能网络传输的数据中心应用至关重要，尤其是当链路速度扩展到 100Gbps 及以上时。传统的 I/O 加速策略，例如数据直接 I/O (DDIO) 和远程直接内存访问 (RDMA)，由于末级缓存 (LLC) 的利用率低下，性能不佳。本文提出了 CEIO，一种新颖的高速缓存高效网络 I/O 架构，它采用主动速率控制和弹性缓冲来实现 I/O 数据路径中的零 LLC 缺失，同时确保 DDIO 和 RDMA 在各种网络条件下的有效性。我们在商用 SmartNIC 上实施了 CEIO，并将其纳入广泛使用的 DPDK 和 RDMA 库中。在实际工作负载下使用经过良好优化的 RPC 框架和分布式文件系统进行的实验表明，与之前的工作相比，CEIO 的吞吐量提高了 2.9 倍，P99.9 延迟降低了 1.9 倍。

papers.title: Censys: A Map of Internet Hosts and Services.
papers.abstract: In 2015, we released Censys to lower the barrier to entry for researchers to study Internet devices by continually collecting and packaging Internet scan data. Since then, as we have learned more about how best to capture the complex behavior of Internet services and begun to serve commercial and government users, we have re-architected every aspect of how Censys operates. Motivated by requests from the community,we present Censys' evolution and current architecture, evaluate its visibility, and detail how Censys has been used by research, industry, and government. Finally, informed by our operational experiences, we discuss unsolved problems and the lessons we have learned. We hope that our work provides the transparency needed for researchers to soundly use Censys data and offers directions for future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 2015 年，我们发布了 Censys，通过不断收集和打包互联网扫描数据来降低研究人员研究互联网设备的准入门槛。从那时起，随着我们更多地了解如何最好地捕获互联网服务的复杂行为并开始为商业和政府用户提供服务，我们重新构建了 Censys 运营方式的各个方面。在社区请求的推动下，我们介绍了 Censys 的演变和当前架构，评估了其可见性，并详细介绍了研究、行业和政府如何使用 Censys。最后，根据我们的运营经验，我们讨论了未解决的问题和我们吸取的教训。我们希望我们的工作为研究人员提供合理使用 Censys 数据所需的透明度，并为未来的研究提供方向。

papers.title: Centralium: A Hybrid Route-Planning Framework for Large-Scale Data Center Network Migrations.
papers.abstract: Meta's data center networks have relied on BGP for routing and interconnectivity due to its scalability and simplicity. However, as our network evolves, BGP's limitations in supporting complex network migrations have become apparent. These migrations require customized routing at each intermediate step, considering topological properties. In this paper, we highlight the unique challenges of production migration and illustrate how native BGP falls short, unable to encode both sequential and spatial conditions. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel Route Planning Abstraction (RPA) that augments the BGP protocol to support migration. It enables centralized route planning while maintaining distributed enforcement. We demonstrate the power of this abstraction by developing Centralium, a hybrid route-planning framework with a centralized controller, and over ten use cases to support various migrations in production. Our production experience with Centralium, deployed alongside BGP in large-scale data centers, has shown substantial reduction in the time and risk of network migration operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 BGP 的可扩展性和简单性，Meta 的数据中心网络依赖 BGP 进行路由和互连。然而，随着网络的发展，BGP 在支持复杂网络迁移方面的局限性变得越来越明显。这些迁移需要在每个中间步骤定制路由，并考虑拓扑属性。在本文中，我们强调了生产迁移的独特挑战，并说明了原生 BGP 的不足之处，即无法对顺序和空间条件进行编码。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的路由规划抽象 (RPA)，它增强了 BGP 协议以支持迁移。它可以实现集中式路线规划，同时保持分布式执行。我们通过开发 Centralium（带有集中控制器的混合路线规划框架）以及十多个支持生产中各种迁移的用例来展示这种抽象的强大功能。我们在大型数据中心与 BGP 一起部署 Centralium 的生产经验表明，网络迁移操作的时间和风险大幅减少。

papers.title: Coflow Scheduling for LLM Training.
papers.abstract:
Training large language models (LLMs) generates diverse coflows within a cluster, requiring optimized scheduling to enhance communication-computation overlap and minimize training time. Existing schedulers inadequately handle contention both across and within coflows, resulting in suboptimal performance.

We present Hermod, a comprehensive coflow scheduler that orchestrates all coflow types for LLM training. The key insight behind Hermod is that coflows can be uniquely characterized by three model factors—microbatch ID, coflow type, and layer ID—enabling optimal scheduling decisions. Leveraging this insight, Hermod applies model-factor-driven inter-coflow priority scheduling aligned with the LLM training DAG. Preliminary simulation results show potential for performance improvements.
papers.abstract_zh:
训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 在集群内生成不同的协同流，需要优化调度来增强通信计算重叠并最大限度地减少训练时间。 Existing schedulers inadequately handle contention both across and within coflows, resulting in suboptimal performance.

我们推出了 Hermod，一个综合的协流调度程序，可以协调 LLM 培训的所有协流类型。 Hermod 背后的关键见解是，协同流可以通过三个模型因素（微批次 ID、协同流类型和层 ID）进行独特表征，从而实现最佳调度决策。利用这种洞察力，Hermod 应用与 LLM 训练 DAG 一致的模型因子驱动的协流间优先级调度。初步模拟结果显示了性能改进的潜力。

papers.title: DeepSpace: Super Resolution Powered Efficient and Reliable Satellite Image Data Acquistion.
papers.abstract: Large constellations of low-earth orbit satellites enable frequent high-resolution earth imaging for numerous geospatial applications. They generate large volumes of data in space, hundreds of Terabytes per day, which much be transported to Earth through constrained intermittent connections to ground stations. The large volumes lead to large day-level delay in data download and exorbitant cloud storage costs. We propose DeepSpace, a new deep learning-based super-resolution approach that compresses satellite imagery by over two orders of magnitude, while preserving image quality using a tailored mixture of experts (MoE) super-resolution framework. DeepSpace reduces the network bandwidth requirements for space-Earth transfer, and can compress images for cloud storage. DeepSpace achieves such gains with the limited computational power available on small LEO satellites. We extensively evaluate DeepSpace against a wide range of state-of-the-art baselines considering multiple satellite image datasets and demonstrate the above mentioned benefits. We further demonstrate the effectiveness of DeepSpace through several distinct downstream applications (wildfire detection, land use and cropland classification, and fine-grained plastic detection in oceans).
papers.abstract_zh: 大型低地球轨道卫星星座可以为众多地理空间应用提供频繁的高分辨率地球成像。它们在太空中生成大量数据，每天数百太字节，其中大部分数据通过与地面站的有限间歇性连接传输到地球。庞大的数据量导致数据下载的日级延迟和高昂的云存储成本。我们提出 DeepSpace，这是一种基于深度学习的新型超分辨率方法，可将卫星图像压缩两个数量级以上，同时使用定制的专家混合 (MoE) 超分辨率框架保持图像质量。 DeepSpace降低了天地传输的网络带宽要求，并且可以压缩图像以进行云存储。 DeepSpace 利用小型 LEO 卫星上有限的计算能力实现了这样的收益。我们考虑多个卫星图像数据集，根据各种最先进的基线对 DeepSpace 进行广泛评估，并展示上述优点。我们通过几个不同的下游应用（野火检测、土地利用和农田分类以及海洋中的细粒度塑料检测）进一步证明了 DeepSpace 的有效性。

papers.title: Designing Transport-Level Encryption for Datacenter Networks.
papers.abstract: This paper presents SDP, a protocol design for emerging datacenter transports, such as NDP and Homa, to integrate data encryption. It supports NIC offloading designed for TLS over TCP, native protocol number alongside TCP and UDP, and message-based abstraction that enables low latency RPCs with fine-grained parallelism.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 SDP，这是一种针对新兴数据中心传输（例如 NDP 和 Homa）的协议设计，用于集成数据加密。它支持专为 TCP 上的 TLS 设计的 NIC 卸载、TCP 和 UDP 的本机协议号以及基于消息的抽象，可实现具有细粒度并行性的低延迟 RPC。

papers.title: Direct-to-Cell Satellite Network without Satellite Navigation.
papers.abstract: Direct-to-cell satellites enable global network services for our regular phones/IoTs via 4G, 5G, and beyond. To enforce highly available, trustworthy, and roaming policy-compliant network services, they heavily rely on user geolocation and timing information from external global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) to assist with their radio access, authentication, and authorization. Our analysis and field tests reveal that, this cross-technology over-reliance propagates satellite navigation's defects to direct-to-cell satellite networks, leading to diverse issues such as intermittent connectivity, over/under-billing, unauthorized services, and service denials even when direct-to-cell satellites are accessible. Our solution, SN 2 , adopts the "fate-sharing" principle to reuse direct-to-cell satellites themselves for self-navigating networks. By exploiting the flexible tradeoffs between satellite network availability and navigation accuracy, it enables "good enough" built-in navigation for highly available and functionally correct network services at a negligible cost of hardware or communication resources. Our evaluations with commodity satellite phones and 3GPP NTN protocol stacks demonstrate SN 2 's 4.4–23.5× network availability boost and 1.9–12.3× access latency reduction over legacy solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 直接到蜂窝卫星可以通过 4G、5G 等为我们的常规手机/物联网提供全球网络服务。为了实施高度可用、值得信赖且符合漫游策略的网络服务，他们严重依赖来自外部全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 的用户地理位置和定时信息来协助其无线电接入、身份验证和授权。我们的分析和现场测试表明，这种跨技术的过度依赖将卫星导航的缺陷传播到直接到蜂窝的卫星网络，导致各种问题，例如间歇性连接、超额/计费不足、未经授权的服务以及即使可以访问直接到蜂窝的卫星也拒绝服务。我们的解决方案 SN 2 采用“命运共享”原则，将直接到小区的卫星本身重新用于自导航网络。通过利用卫星网络可用性和导航精度之间的灵活权衡，它能够以可忽略不计的硬件或通信资源成本实现“足够好”的内置导航，以提供高度可用且功能正确的网络服务。我们对商用卫星电话和 3GPP NTN 协议栈的评估表明，与传统解决方案相比，SN 2 的网络可用性提高了 4.4–23.5 倍，访问延迟降低了 1.9–12.3 倍。

papers.title: Discovering Millions of New Nodes and Links in the Internet by Challenging the Uniformity Assumption in Multipath Detection.
papers.abstract: Multipath Detection Algorithms (MDAs) are proposed to discover Internet topology in the presence of load balancing (LB). Existing methods assume uniformity in the load-balancing responses (LBR), i.e. , responses from the successors of a LB router. However, we reveal that only 20% of the cases exhibit uniformity in the Internet. This finding significantly challenges the completeness of the Internet topology discovered using current MDAs. In this paper, we propose a novel system BayMuDA, that can estimate LBR distributions and calculate the minimum number of probes needed to statistically discover all nodes and links within a given hop. The validation on controlled topologies shows that BayMuDA discovers at least 85%/73% of nodes/links in ~90% of the cases. Our Internet-wide measurement results indicate that BayMuDA can discover millions of Internet nodes and links obscured by the state-of-the-art MDA algorithm, D-Miner, due to uneven responses.
papers.abstract_zh: 多路径检测算法（MDA）被提出来发现存在负载平衡（LB）的互联网拓扑。现有方法假设负载均衡响应（LBR）的一致性，即来自 LB 路由器后继路由器的响应。然而，我们发现只有 20% 的案例在互联网上表现出一致性。这一发现极大地挑战了使用当前 MDA 发现的互联网拓扑的完整性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的系统 BayMuDA，它可以估计 LBR 分布并计算统计发现给定跳内的所有节点和链路所需的最小探测数量。对受控拓扑的验证表明，BayMuDA 在约 90% 的情况下发现至少 85%/73% 的节点/链路。我们的全互联网测量结果表明，BayMuDA 可以发现数百万个被最先进的 MDA 算法 D-Miner 由于响应不均匀而掩盖的互联网节点和链路。

papers.title: DistTrain: Addressing Model and Data Heterogeneity with Disaggregated Training for Multimodal Large Language Models.
papers.abstract:
Multimodal large language models (LLMs) empower LLMs to ingest inputs and generate outputs in multiple forms, such as text, image, and audio. However, the integration of multiple modalities introduces heterogeneity in both the model and training data, creating unique systems challenges.

We propose DistTrain, a disaggregated training system for multimodal LLMs. DistTrain incorporates two novel disaggregation techniques to address model and data heterogeneity, respectively. The first is disaggregated model orchestration , which separates the training for modality encoder, LLM backbone, and modality generator. This allows the three components to adaptively and independently orchestrate their resources and parallelism configurations. The second is disaggregated data preprocessing , which decouples data preprocessing from training. This eliminates resource contention between preprocessing and training, and enables efficient data reordering to mitigate stragglers within and between micro-batches caused by data heterogeneity. We evaluate DistTrain across different sizes of multimodal LLMs on a large-scale production cluster. The experimental results show that DistTrain achieves 54.7% Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU) when training a 72B multimodal LLM on 1172 GPUs and outperforms Megatron-LM by up to 2.2× on training throughput.
papers.abstract_zh:
多模态大语言模型 (LLM) 使 LLM 能够摄取输入并生成多种形式的输出，例如文本、图像和音频。然而，多种模式的集成在模型和训练数据中引入了异质性，从而带来了独特的系统挑战。

我们提出了 DistTrain，这是一个针对多模式法学硕士的分类培训系统。 DistTrain 结合了两种新颖的分解技术，分别解决模型和数据异构性。第一个是分类模型编排，它将模态编码器、LLM 主干和模态生成器的训练分开。这使得三个组件能够自适应且独立地编排其资源和并行配置。第二个是分解数据预处理，它将数据预处理与训练分离。这消除了预处理和训练之间的资源争用，并实现高效的数据重新排序，以减轻微批次内和微批次之间由数据异构性引起的落后者。我们在大规模生产集群上评估不同规模的多模式 LLM 的 DistTrain。实验结果表明，在 1172 个 GPU 上训练 72B 多模态 LLM 时，DistTrain 实现了 54.7% 的模型 FLOP 利用率 (MFU)，并且在训练吞吐量方面优于 Megatron-LM 高达 2.2 倍。

papers.title: DNSLogzip: A Novel Approach to Fast and High-Ratio Compression for DNS Logs.
papers.abstract:
Domain Name System (DNS) logs capture detailed records of the queries and responses exchanged between DNS servers and clients, playing a crucial role in applications such as cybersecurity monitoring and regulatory compliance, which often require long-term data retention. With the rapid growth of Internet traffic, the volume of DNS logs has surged, presenting significant storage challenges. Although many DNS operators use general-purpose compression algorithms to reduce storage costs, these solutions fail to fully exploit the unique characteristics of DNS data, leading to inefficiencies and rising storage demands.

In this work, we propose a novel solution, DNSLogzip , designed to achieve lossless, fast, and high-ratio compression for DNS logs. Built on in-depth empirical studies of real-world DNS log datasets, we identify four key inter-line and intra-line characteristics that enable effective reduction of redundancies without information loss. DNSLogzip leverages these insights through a modular compression architecture, which allows it to handle varying log formats and offers easy integration and customization based on specific requirements. We have deployed DNSLogzip on two tier-1 Internet Service Providers (ISPs) to compress production logs. The results show that DNSLogzip can reduce storage costs by approximately two-thirds, potentially saving up to $163,000 per DNS service node per month.
papers.abstract_zh:
域名系统 (DNS) 日志捕获 DNS 服务器和客户端之间交换的查询和响应的详细记录，在网络安全监控和法规遵从性等通常需要长期数据保留的应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。随着互联网流量的快速增长，DNS日志量激增，给存储带来了巨大的挑战。尽管许多 DNS 运营商使用通用压缩算法来降低存储成本，但这些解决方案未能充分利用 DNS 数据的独特特征，导致效率低下和存储需求不断上升。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案 DNSLogzip ，旨在实现 DNS 日志的无损、快速和高比率压缩。基于对现实世界 DNS 日志数据集的深入实证研究，我们确定了四个关键的行间和行内特征，这些特征能够有效减少冗余而不丢失信息。 DNSLogzip 通过模块化压缩架构利用这些见解，使其能够处理不同的日志格式，并根据特定要求提供轻松的集成和定制。我们在两个一级互联网服务提供商 (ISP) 上部署了 DNSLogzip 以压缩生产日志。结果显示，DNSLogzip 可以将存储成本降低约三分之二，每个 DNS 服务节点每月可能节省高达 163,000 美元。

papers.title: Edge Caching as Differentiation.
papers.abstract: Consider an end-user accessing two content providers, A and B, of the same type. If the end-user's ISP prioritizes A-traffic over B-traffic, the end-user may experience A-content with significantly better quality, and the ISP is said to apply "traffic differentiation." We observe that edge caching has a similar effect: if the end-user's ISP hosts a cache that serves A-content with higher hit rate than B-content, the end-user may experience A-content with significantly better quality. Hence, we examine caching as differentiation: We consider 5 popular caching providers, measure the hit rates with which they serve different content, and use the measurements to quantify the impact of edge caching on end-user Quality of Experience (QoE). We present the—in our opinion—surprising QoE disparities that result from edge caching and discuss their implications.
papers.abstract_zh: 考虑一个最终用户访问两个相同类型的内容提供商 A 和 B。如果最终用户的 ISP 将 A 流量优先于 B 流量，则最终用户可能会体验到质量明显更好的 A 内容，并且 ISP 据说会应用“流量差异化”。我们观察到边缘缓存具有类似的效果：如果最终用户的 ISP 托管的缓存提供的 A 内容的命中率高于 B 内容，则最终用户可能会体验到质量明显更好的 A 内容。因此，我们将缓存视为差异化：我们考虑 5 个流行的缓存提供商，测量它们提供不同内容的命中率，并使用测量结果来量化边缘缓存对最终用户体验质量 (QoE) 的影响。我们提出了我们认为由边缘缓存导致的令人惊讶的 QoE 差异，并讨论了它们的影响。

papers.title: Enabling Over-the-Air AI for Edge Computing via Metasurface-Driven Physical Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: We present MetaAI, a novel wireless computing paradigm that integrates neural network computation directly into wireless signal propagation. Unlike traditional approaches that treat wireless channels as mere data conduits, MetaAI transforms them into active computing elements through programmable metasurfaces, enabling concurrent data transmission and neural network processing. By leveraging the inherent linearity of both wireless propagation and neural networks, our design resolves the fundamental mismatch between sequential wireless transmission and parallel neural computation, while supporting efficient multi-sensor late-stage data fusion. We implemented MetaAI using metasurfaces at both dual-band (2.4/5 GHz) and single-band (3.5 GHz) frequencies. Extensive experiments demonstrate robust performance across diverse classification tasks, achieving 82.8% average accuracy (up to 89.8%) even with a simple linear architecture. Multi-sensor fusion further improves accuracy by up to 27.06%. MetaAI represents a fundamental shift in Edge AI architecture, where wireless infrastructure becomes an integral part of the computing pipeline.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MetaAI，一种新颖的无线计算范例，它将神经网络计算直接集成到无线信号传播中。与将无线通道视为单纯数据管道的传统方法不同，MetaAI 通过可编程超表面将它们转变为主动计算元素，从而实现并发数据传输和神经网络处理。通过利用无线传播和神经网络的固有线性，我们的设计解决了顺序无线传输和并行神经计算之间的根本不匹配问题，同时支持高效的多传感器后期数据融合。我们使用超表面在双频段 (2.4/5 GHz) 和单频段 (3.5 GHz) 频率下实现了 MetaAI。大量实验证明了在不同分类任务中的稳健性能，即使使用简单的线性架构也能达到 82.8% 的平均准确率（高达 89.8%）。多传感器融合进一步提高准确率高达 27.06%。 MetaAI 代表了边缘 AI 架构的根本性转变，其中无线基础设施成为计算管道不可或缺的一部分。

papers.title: Falcon: A Reliable, Low Latency Hardware Transport.
papers.abstract: Hardware transports such as RoCE deliver high performance with minimal host CPU, but are best suited to special-purpose deployments that limit their use, e.g., backend networks or Ethernet with Priority Flow Control (PFC). We introduce Falcon , the first hardware transport that supports multiple Upper Layer Protocols (ULPs) and heterogeneous application workloads in general-purpose Ethernet datacenter environments (with losses and without special switch support). Key design elements include: delay-based congestion control with multipath load balancing; a layered design with a simple request-response transaction interface for multi-ULP support; hardware-based retransmissions and error-handling for scalability; and a programmable engine for flexibility. The first Falcon hardware implementation delivers a peak performance of 200 Gbps, 120 Mops/sec, with near-optimal operation completion times that are up to 8× lower than CX-7 RoCE under network congestion, and up to 65% higher goodput under lossy conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: RoCE 等硬件传输以最少的主机 CPU 提供高性能，但最适合限制其使用的特殊用途部署，例如具有优先级流量控制 (PFC) 的后端网络或以太网。我们推出 Falcon，这是第一个在通用以太网数据中心环境中支持多个上层协议 (ULP) 和异构应用程序工作负载的硬件传输（有损耗且无需特殊交换机支持）。关键设计元素包括：基于延迟的拥塞控制和多路径负载平衡；具有简单请求响应事务接口的分层设计，用于多 ULP 支持；基于硬件的重传和错误处理以实现可扩展性；以及一个具有灵活性的可编程引擎。第一个 Falcon 硬件实现可提供 200 Gbps、120 Mops/秒的峰值性能，在网络拥塞情况下，操作完成时间比 CX-7 RoCE 缩短 8 倍，在有损条件下，吞吐量提高 65%，接近最佳。

papers.title: Firefly: Scalable, Ultra-Accurate Clock Synchronization for Datacenters.
papers.abstract: Cloud-based financial exchanges require sub-10 ns device-to-device clock synchronization accuracy while adhering to Coordinated Universal Time (UTC). Existing clock sync techniques struggle to meet this demand at scale and are vulnerable to clock drift, jitter, and path asymmetries. Firefly, a software-driven datacenter clock sync system, scalably, cost-effectively, and reliably achieves very high clock sync accuracy. It employs a distributed consensus algorithm on a random overlay graph to rapidly converge to a common time while applying gradual adjustments to device hardware clocks. To realize consistent sync-to-UTC ( external sync ) across devices while maintaining a stable device-to-device internal sync , Firefly uses a novel technique, layered synchronization , that decouples internal and external syncs. In a 248-machine Clos network, Firefly achieves sub-10 ns device-to-device and ≤1 μ s device-to-UTC sync, and is resilient to time server failure and unstable clocks.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于云的金融交易需要低于 10 纳秒的设备到设备时钟同步精度，同时遵守协调世界时 (UTC)。现有的时钟同步技术难以大规模满足这一需求，并且容易受到时钟漂移、抖动和路径不对称的影响。 Firefly 是一种软件驱动的数据中心时钟同步系统，可扩展、经济高效且可靠地实现非常高的时钟同步精度。它在随机覆盖图上采用分布式共识算法，以快速收敛到公共时间，同时对设备硬件时钟进行逐步调整。为了实现跨设备一致的同步到 UTC（外部同步），同时保持稳定的设备间内部同步，Firefly 使用了一种新颖的技术，即分层同步，该技术可解耦内部和外部同步。在 248 台机器的 Clos 网络中，Firefly 实现了低于 10 ns 的设备到设备和 ≤1 μs 的设备到 UTC 同步，并且能够适应时间服务器故障和不稳定的时钟。

papers.title: Formalizing Dependence of Web Infrastructure.
papers.abstract: Over the past decade, Internet centralization and its implications for privacy, resilience, and innovation have become a topic of active debate. While the networking community informally agrees on the definition of centralization, we lack a formal metric for quantifying it, which has limited in-depth analysis. In this work, we introduce a rigorous statistical metric for Internet centralization. In doing so, we also uncover how regionalization—geopolitical dependence on the Internet—fundamentally affects centralization. We argue that centralization and regionalization are intertwined forms of dependence that both affect the lived experiences of users and should be jointly studied. We develop a suite of statistical tools, which we use to better understand dependence across three layers of web infrastructure—hosting providers, DNS infrastructure, certificate authorities—in 150 countries. We hope that this statistical toolkit can serve as the foundation for future analysis of Internet behavior.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，互联网集中化及其对隐私、弹性和创新的影响已成为人们热议的话题。虽然网络社区非正式地同意集中化的定义，但我们缺乏量化它的正式指标，这限制了深入分析。在这项工作中，我们引入了严格的互联网集中化统计指标。在此过程中，我们还揭示了区域化（地缘政治对互联网的依赖）如何从根本上影响集中化。我们认为，集中化和区域化是相互交织的依赖形式，两者都会影响用户的生活体验，应该共同研究。我们开发了一套统计工具，用于更好地了解 150 个国家/地区的三层网络基础设施（托管提供商、DNS 基础设施、证书颁发机构）之间的依赖关系。我们希望这个统计工具包可以作为未来分析互联网行为的基础。

papers.title: Fornax: A Hardware-Centric Session Management in Large Public Cloud Network.
papers.abstract: SmartNIC is increasingly utilized to accelerate cloud network components. The effectiveness and correctness of hardware acceleration heavily rely on its management mechanism. Unfortunately, traditional management mechanisms adopt software-centric architecture, which treats flow as the basic management unit and completely relies on one-way commands to manage the flow table, making it challenging to support various cloud network scenarios while managing extremely large tables. In this paper, we advocate for a radical new mechanism to shift the management paradigm from software-centric architecture to hardware-centric architecture, which adopts session as the basic management unit and designs two-way protocols to facilitate the management process. We propose and implement a first-of-its-kind system, called Fornax, a novel management architecture for large public cloud networks. At the core of Fornax is leveraging a session-empowered hardware engine to provide various management capabilities. Besides, Fornax utilizes a light-weight software manager to enhance system scalability, and hardware-driven management protocols to improve resource efficiency. Our testbed evaluations demonstrate that Fornax can reduce the software storage usage by 80% and CPU usage by 77% with little hardware resource overhead. Our large-scale production results show that Fornax can manage up to 16M session entries while significantly reducing the resource overhead by over 79%.
papers.abstract_zh: SmartNIC 越来越多地用于加速云网络组件。硬件加速的有效性和正确性很大程度上取决于其管理机制。遗憾的是，传统的管理机制采用以软件为中心的架构，以流为基本管理单元，完全依赖单向命令来管理流表，在管理超大表的同时，难以支持各种云网络场景。在本文中，我们提倡一种全新的机制，将管理范式从以软件为中心的架构转变为以硬件为中心的架构，采用会话作为基本管理单元，并设计双向协议来促进管理过程。我们提出并实施了一个名为 Fornax 的首创系统，这是一种针对大型公共云网络的新颖管理架构。 Fornax 的核心是利用会话授权的硬件引擎来提供各种管理功能。此外，Fornax利用轻量级软件管理器来增强系统可扩展性，并利用硬件驱动的管理协议来提高资源效率。我们的测试平台评估表明，Fornax 可以在几乎没有硬件资源开销的情况下将软件存储使用率降低 80%，CPU 使用率降低 77%。我们的大规模生产结果表明，Fornax 可以管理多达 16M 的会话条目，同时显着降低超过 79% 的资源开销。

papers.title: From ATOP to ZCube: Automated Topology Optimization Pipeline and A Highly Cost-Effective Network Topology for Large Model Training.
papers.abstract: The development of large language models (LLMs) poses new challenges in data center network topology design. To assist in exploring topology design, we propose ATOP, an Automated Topology Optimization Pipeline, which models network topology as a set of hyperparameters, enabling the discovery of potential topologies. With various optimization algorithms and customizable optimization objectives, ATOP achieves automated topology optimization on a scale of tens of thousands of GPUs. We apply ATOP on network topologies for 256, 1024, 4096, and 16384 GPUs, optimizing performance under LLMs training traffic patterns, collective communication performance, fault tolerance, and network cost. We also evaluate ATOP in different scenarios: building, optimizing, and expanding a data center. From ATOP's results, we discover a new topology — ZCube, which reaches the highest cost-effectiveness across various GPU scales. Simulation results show that ZCube, compared to the previous state-of-the-art topologies, including Rail-optimized Fat-tree (ROFT), Rail-only, and HPN, improves end-to-end LLM training speed by 3% to 7% and reduces network hardware costs by 26% to 46%. We also construct ZCube on a real-world testbed. Results show that ZCube reduces hardware costs by 25% compared to Rail-Optimized Topology while maintaining the same all-reduce and all-to-all performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的发展给数据中心网络拓扑设计带来了新的挑战。为了帮助探索拓扑设计，我们提出了 ATOP，一种自动拓扑优化管道，它将网络拓扑建模为一组超参数，从而能够发现潜在的拓扑。 ATOP通过丰富的优化算法和可定制的优化目标，实现了数万GPU规模的自动化拓扑优化。我们在 256、1024、4096 和 16384 GPU 的网络拓扑上应用 ATOP，优化 LLM 训练流量模式下的性能、集体通信性能、容错能力和网络成本。我们还在不同场景中评估 ATOP：构建、优化和扩展数据中心。从ATOP的结果中，我们发现了一种新的拓扑——ZCube，它在各种GPU规模上达到了最高的成本效益。仿真结果表明，与之前最先进的拓扑（包括Rail-optimized Fat-tree（ROFT）、Rail-only和HPN）相比，ZCube将端到端LLM训练速度提高了3％至7％，并将网络硬件成本降低了26％至46％。我们还在现实世界的测试平台上构建了 ZCube。结果表明，与轨道优化拓扑相比，ZCube 降低了 25% 的硬件成本，同时保持相同的 all-reduce 和 all-to-all 性能。

papers.title: HACK: Homomorphic Acceleration via Compression of the Key-Value Cache for Disaggregated LLM Inference.
papers.abstract:
Disaggregated Large Language Model (LLM) inference decouples the compute-intensive prefill stage from the memory-intensive decode stage, allowing low-end, compute-focused GPUs for prefill and high-end, memory-rich GPUs for decode, which reduces cost while maintaining high throughput. However, transmitting Key-Value (KV) data between the two stages can be a bottleneck, especially for long prompts. Additionally, the computational overhead in the two stages is key for optimizing Job Completion Time (JCT), and KV data size can become prohibitive for long prompts and sequences. Existing KV quantization methods can alleviate transmission and memory bottlenecks, but they introduce significant dequantization overhead, exacerbating the computation time.

We propose Homomorphic Acceleration via Compression of the KV cache (HACK) for disaggregated LLM inference. HACK eliminates the heavy KV dequantization and directly computes on quantized KV data to approximate and reduce the cost of expensive matrix multiplication. Extensive trace-driven experiments show that HACK reduces JCT by up to 70.9% compared to disaggregated LLM inference baseline and by up to 52.3% compared to state-of-the-art KV quantization methods.
papers.abstract_zh:
分解大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理将计算密集型预填充阶段与内存密集型解码阶段解耦，允许使用低端、以计算为重点的 GPU 进行预填充，使用高端、内存丰富的 GPU 进行解码，从而在保持高吞吐量的同时降低成本。然而，在两个阶段之间传输键值（KV）数据可能是一个瓶颈，特别是对于长提示。此外，这两个阶段的计算开销是优化作业完成时间 (JCT) 的关键，并且 KV 数据大小对于长提示和序列来说可能会变得令人望而却步。现有的KV量化方法可以缓解传输和内存瓶颈，但它们引入了显着的反量化开销，从而加剧了计算时间。

我们提出通过压缩 KV 缓存的同态加速 (HACK) 来进行分解的 LLM 推理。 HACK消除了繁重的KV反量化，直接对量化的KV数据进行计算以近似并减少昂贵的矩阵乘法的成本。大量的跟踪驱动实验表明，与分解的 LLM 推理基线相比，HACK 将 JCT 减少了高达 70.9%，与最先进的 KV 量化方法相比，减少了高达 52.3%。

papers.title: HardMesh: Enabling High-performance Service Mesh Ingress Processing with SmartNICs.
papers.abstract: Service meshes have become essential for enabling microservices in cloud environments; however, they also introduce substantial network overhead. In particular, the ingress gateway, which serves as the primary entry point for external traffic, has emerged as a major performance bottleneck due to CPU-intensive traffic analysis and prolonged forwarding paths through multiple network stack layers. Our analysis indicates that these inefficiencies can result in a 4-fold reduction in network throughput and increased CPU resource consumption. In response, we propose HardMesh , a hardware-software hybrid ingress gateway that leverages a Smart-NIC for high-performance traffic analysis and efficient traffic routing. This process is augmented by a lightweight CPU-based proxy for traffic management. Evaluations show that HardMesh outperforms existing ingress gateways, achieving up to 4.4× higher throughput while providing the same range of traffic management services.
papers.abstract_zh: 服务网格对于在云环境中启用微服务至关重要；然而，它们也带来了大量的网络开销。特别是，作为外部流量主要入口点的入口网关，由于 CPU 密集型流量分析和通过多个网络堆栈层的长时间转发路径，已成为主要性能瓶颈。我们的分析表明，这些低效率可能会导致网络吞吐量减少 4 倍，并增加 CPU 资源消耗。为此，我们提出了 HardMesh，这是一种硬件软件混合入口网关，利用智能 NIC 进行高性能流量分析和高效流量路由。这个过程通过基于 CPU 的轻量级流量管理代理得到增强。评估表明，HardMesh 的性能优于现有入口网关，在提供相同范围的流量管理服务的同时，吞吐量提高了 4.4 倍。

papers.title: Harnessing WebRTC for Large-Scale Live Streaming.
papers.abstract: Live streaming that supports real-time interaction has become increasingly popular. To support the ensuing requirements on low end-to-end latency, RTM, the state-of-the-art live streaming system at Douyin, replaces the HTTP-FLV streaming protocol with WebRTC. To tailor the WebRTC stack to the live streaming scenario, we focus on optimizing first-frame delay, startup video rebuffering, audio-to-video drift, and per-session CPU usage. Those are the top-priority metrics identified from an importance analysis with respect to two user engagement metrics, i.e. , viewer penetration and viewing time. To date, WebRTC-based streaming in RTM has been in operation for 4 years, and serves billions of viewer sessions every day. It dramatically optimizes QoE metrics ( e.g. , end-to-end latency reduced by 54.5%), and delivers statistically significant user engagement gains ( e.g. , number of paid orders increased by 0.8%). In this paper, we report our deployment experiences comprehensively.
papers.abstract_zh: 支持实时互动的直播越来越受欢迎。为了满足随之而来的低端到端延迟的要求，抖音最先进的直播系统RTM用WebRTC取代了HTTP-FLV流媒体协议。为了根据直播场景定制 WebRTC 堆栈，我们重点优化第一帧延迟、启动视频重新缓冲、音频到视频漂移和每个会话的 CPU 使用情况。这些是根据两个用户参与度指标（即观众渗透率和观看时间）的重要性分析确定的最优先指标。迄今为止，RTM 中基于 WebRTC 的流媒体已经运行了 4 年，每天为数十亿观众会话提供服务。它极大地优化了 QoE 指标（例如，端到端延迟减少了 54.5%），并提供了统计上显着的用户参与度增益（例如，付费订单数量增加了 0.8%）。在本文中，我们全面报告了我们的部署经验。

papers.title: Hattrick: Solving Multi-Class TE using Neural Models.
papers.abstract: While recent work shows ML-based approaches are a promising alternative to conventional optimization methods for Traffic Engineering (TE), existing research is limited to a single traffic class. In this paper, we present Hattrick, the first ML-based approach for handling multiple traffic classes, a key requirement of cloud and ISP WANs. As part of Hattrick we have developed (i) a novel neural architecture aligned with the sequence of optimization problems in multiclass TE; and (ii) a variant of classical multitask learning methods to deal with the unique challenge of optimizing multiple metrics that have a precedence relationship. Evaluations on a large private WAN and other public datasets show Hattrick outperforms state-of-the-art optimization-based multiclass TE methods by better coping with prediction error - e.g., for GEANT, Hattrick outperforms SWAN by 5.48% to 19.3% across classes when considering the traffic that can be supported 99% of the time.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然最近的研究表明基于机器学习的方法是流量工程 (TE) 传统优化方法的一种有前途的替代方法，但现有的研究仅限于单一流量类别。在本文中，我们介绍了 Hattrick，这是第一个基于 ML 的方法，用于处理多个流量类别，这是云和 ISP WAN 的关键要求。作为 Hattrick 的一部分，我们开发了 (i) 一种与多类 TE 中的优化问题序列相一致的新颖神经架构； (ii) 经典多任务学习方法的变体，用于应对优化具有优先关系的多个指标的独特挑战。对大型私有 WAN 和其他公共数据集的评估表明，Hattrick 通过更好地应对预测误差，优于最先进的基于优化的多类 TE 方法 - 例如，对于 GEANT，在考虑 99% 时间可支持的流量时，Hattrick 在各个类别中的性能优于 SWAN 5.48% 至 19.3%。

papers.title: Hawkeye: Diagnosing RDMA Network Performance Anomalies with PFC Provenance.
papers.abstract: RDMA is becoming increasingly prevalent from private data centers to public multi-tenant clouds, due to its remarkable performance improvement. However, its lossless traffic control, i.e., PFC, introduces new complexities in network performance anomalies (NPAs) due to its cascading congestion spreading property, which usually incurs complaints from customers/applications about certain flows' performance degradation. Existing studies fall short in fine-grained visibility of PFC impact and traceability of PFC causality, and are thus ineffective in diagnosing the root causes for RDMA NPAs. In this paper, we propose Hawkeye, an accurate and efficient RDMA NPA diagnosis system based on PFC provenance. Hawkeye comprises 1) a fine-grained PFC-aware telemetry mechanism to record the PFC impact on flows; 2) an in-network PFC causality analysis and tracing mechanism to quickly and efficiently collect causal telemetry for diagnosis; and 3) a provenance-based diagnosis algorithm to comprehensively present the anomaly breakdown, identifying the anomaly type and root causes accurately. Through extensive evaluations on both NS-3 simulations and a Tofino testbed, Hawkeye can quickly and accurately diagnose multiple RDMA NPAs with over 90% precision and 1–4 orders of magnitude lower overhead than baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其显着的性能提升，RDMA 从私有数据中心到公共多租户云变得越来越普遍。然而，其无损流量控制（即 PFC）由于其级联拥塞扩散特性，在网络性能异常（NPA）中引入了新的复杂性，这通常会引起客户/应用程序对某些流量性能下降的抱怨。现有研究缺乏 PFC 影响的细粒度可见性和 PFC 因果关系的可追溯性，因此无法有效诊断 RDMA NPA 的根本原因。在本文中，我们提出了 Hawkeye，一种基于 PFC 起源的准确高效的 RDMA NPA 诊断系统。 Hawkeye 包括 1) 细粒度 PFC 感知遥测机制，用于记录 PFC 对流量的影响； 2）网内PFC因果关系分析和追踪机制，可快速有效地收集因果遥测数据以进行诊断； 3）基于溯源的诊断算法，全面呈现异常故障，准确识别异常类型和根本原因。通过对 NS-3 模拟和 Tofino 测试台进行广泛评估，Hawkeye 可以快速准确地诊断多个 RDMA NPA，精度超过 90%，开销比基线低 1-4 个数量级。

papers.title: Hermes: Enhancing Layer-7 Cloud Load Balancers with Userspace-Directed I/O Event Notification.
papers.abstract:
Layer-7 load balancers (L7 LBs) improve service performance, availability, and scalability in public clouds. They rely on I/O event notification mechanisms such as epoll to dispatch connections from the kernel to userspace workers. However, early epoll versions suffered from the thundering herd problem. Epoll exclusive (available since Linux 4.5) mitigates this but introduces LIFO wakeups, causing connection concentration on a few workers. Reuseport (Linux 3.9) hashes connections across workers but suffers from hash collisions and lacks awareness of worker load. Since each worker serves multi-tenant traffic, inter-worker load balancing is critical to avoid worker overload and preserve tenant performance isolation.

In this work, we present Hermes , a userspace-directed I/O event notification framework to enhance L7 LBs. Hermes uses userspace worker status to direct kernel-space connection dispatch. It implements lock-free concurrency management for inter-process worker status updates and retrievals, as well as scheduling decision synchronization from userspace to the kernel. In the kernel, Hermes leverages eBPF to non-intrusively override the reuseport socket selection for custom worker scheduling. Hermes has been deployed on O(100K) CPU cores in Alibaba Cloud, handling O(10M) RPS of traffic. It reduces daily worker hangs by 99.8% and lowers the unit cost of L7 LB infrastructure by 18.9%.
papers.abstract_zh:
第 7 层负载均衡器 (L7 LB) 可提高公共云中的服务性能、可用​​性和可扩展性。它们依靠 I/O 事件通知机制（例如 epoll）将连接从内核分派到用户空间工作线程。然而，早期的 epoll 版本遭受了雷群问题的困扰。 Epoll 独有的（自 Linux 4.5 起可用）缓解了这种情况，但引入了 LIFO 唤醒，导致连接集中在少数工作人员上。 Reuseport (Linux 3.9) 对工作人员之间的连接进行哈希处理，但会遭受哈希冲突，并且缺乏对工作人员负载的了解。由于每个工作线程服务于多租户流量，因此工作线程间负载平衡对于避免工作线程过载和保持租户性能隔离至关重要。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Hermes，一个用于增强 L7 LB 的用户空间定向 I/O 事件通知框架。 Hermes 使用用户空间工作状态来指导内核空间连接调度。它实现了进程间工作状态更新和检索的无锁并发管理，以及从用户空间到内核的调度决策同步。在内核中，Hermes 利用 eBPF 以非侵入方式覆盖重用端口套接字选择，以进行自定义工作调度。 Hermes 已部署在阿里云的 O(100K) 个 CPU 核上，处理 O(10M) RPS 的流量。它减少了 99.8% 的日常工作挂起，并将 L7 LB 基础设施的单位成本降低了 18.9%。

papers.title: Hummingbird: Fast, Flexible, and Fair Inter-Domain Bandwidth Reservations.
papers.abstract:
To realize the long-standing vision of providing quality-of-service (QoS) guarantees on a public Internet, this paper introduces Hummingbird: a lightweight QoS-system that provides fine-grained inter-domain reservations for end hosts.

Hummingbird enables flexible and composable reservations with end-to-end guarantees, and addresses an often overlooked, but crucial, aspect of bandwidth-reservation systems: incentivization of network providers. Hummingbird represents bandwidth reservations as tradable assets, allowing markets to emerge. These markets then ensure fair and efficient resource allocation and encourage deployment by remunerating providers. This incentivization is facilitated by decoupling reservations from network identities, which enables novel control-plane mechanisms and allows the design of a control plane based on smart contracts.

Hummingbird also provides an efficient reservation data plane, which streamlines the processing on routers and thus simplifies the implementation, deployment, and traffic policing, while maintaining robust security properties. Our prototype implementation demonstrates the efficiency and scalability of Hummingbird's asset-based control plane, and our high-speed software implementation can fill a 160 Gbps link with Hummingbird packets on commodity hardware.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了实现在公共互联网上提供服务质量 (QoS) 保证的长期愿景，本文介绍了 Hummingbird：一种轻量级 QoS 系统，可为终端主机提供细粒度的域间预留。

Hummingbird 通过端到端保证实现灵活且可组合的预留，并解决了带宽预留系统中经常被忽视但至关重要的方面：网络提供商的激励。蜂鸟将带宽预留代表为可交易资产，从而允许市场出现。然后，这些市场可确保公平有效的资源分配，并鼓励为提供者提供报酬进行部署。通过将预留与网络身份解耦来促进这种激励，从而实现新颖的控制平面机制并允许基于智能合约设计控制平面。

Hummingbird 还提供高效的预留数据平面，简化路由器上的处理，从而简化实施、部署和流量监管，同时保持强大的安全属性。我们的原型实现展示了 Hummingbird 基于资产的控制平面的效率和可扩展性，我们的高速软件实现可以在商用硬件上用 Hummingbird 数据包填充 160 Gbps 链路。

papers.title: InfiniteHBD: Building Datacenter-Scale High-Bandwidth Domain for LLM with Optical Circuit Switching Transceivers.
papers.abstract:
Scaling Large Language Model (LLM) training relies on multidimensional parallelism, where High-Bandwidth Domains (HBDs) are critical for communication-intensive parallelism like Tensor Parallelism. However, existing HBD architectures face fundamental limitations in scalability, cost, and fault resiliency: switch-centric HBDs (e.g., NVL-72) incur prohibitive scaling costs, while GPU-centric HBDs (e.g., TPUv3/Dojo) suffer from severe fault propagation. Switch-GPU hybrid HBDs (e.g., TPUv4) take a middle-ground approach, but the fault explosion radius remains large.

We propose InfiniteHBD , a transceiver-centric HBD architecture that integrates connectivity and dynamic switching at the transceiver level by embedding Optical Circuit Switching (OCS) within each transceiver. It enables reconfigurable point-to-multipoint communication and scalable variable-size ring topologies. InfiniteHBD achieves datacenter-scale scalability without cost explosion, fault isolation at the node level, and full bandwidth utilization for healthy GPUs. Key innovations include a Silicon Photonic-based OCS transceiver ( OCSTrx ), a reconfigurable k-hop ring topology, and an HBD-DCN orchestration algorithm. The evaluation demonstrates that InfiniteHBD reduces cost to 31 % of NVL-72, achieves a near-zero GPU waste ratio (over 10x lower than NVL-72 and TPUv4), maintains near-zero cross-ToR traffic under 7% node fault ratio, and improves Model FLOPs Utilization by 3.37 × compared to NVIDIA DGX (8 GPUs/node).
papers.abstract_zh:
扩展大型语言模型 (LLM) 训练依赖于多维并行性，其中高带宽域 (HBD) 对于张量并行性等通信密集型并行性至关重要。然而，现有的 HBD 架构在可扩展性、成本和故障恢复方面面临着根本性的限制：以交换机为中心的 HBD（例如 NVL-72）会产生过高的扩展成本，而以 GPU 为中心的 HBD（例如 TPUv3/Dojo）会遭受严重的故障传播。 Switch-GPU混合HBD（例如TPUv4）采取中间立场，但故障爆炸半径仍然很大。

我们提出了 InfiniteHBD，这是一种以收发器为中心的 HBD 架构，通过在每个收发器中嵌入光路交换 (OCS)，在收发器级别集成连接和动态切换。它支持可重新配置的点对多点通信和可扩展的可变大小环拓扑。 InfiniteHBD 可在不增加成本的情况下实现数据中心规模的可扩展性、节点级别的故障隔离以及健康 GPU 的充分带宽利用。主要创新包括基于硅光子的 OCS 收发器 (OCSTrx)、可重新配置的 k-hop 环形拓扑和 HBD-DCN 编排算法。评估表明，InfiniteHBD 将成本降低至 NVL-72 的 31%，实现近乎零的 GPU 浪费率（比 NVL-72 和 TPUv4 低 10 倍以上），在 7% 的节点故障率下保持近零的跨 ToR 流量，并且与 NVIDIA DGX（8 个 GPU/节点）相比，模型 FLOP 利用率提高了 3.37 倍。

papers.title: Intent-Driven Network Management with Multi-Agent LLMs: The Confucius Framework.
papers.abstract: Advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) are significantly transforming network management practices. In this paper, we present our experience developing Confucius, a multi-agent framework for network management at Meta. We model network management workflows as directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) to aid planning. Our framework integrates LLMs with existing management tools to achieve seamless operational integration, employs retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to improve long-term memory, and establishes a set of primitives to systematically support human/model interaction. To ensure the accuracy of critical network operations, Confucius closely integrates with existing network validation methods and incorporates its own validation framework to prevent regressions. Remarkably, Confucius is a production-ready LLM development framework that has been operational for two years, with over 60 applications onboarded. To our knowledge, this is the first report on employing multi-agent LLMs for hyper-scale networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的进步正在显着改变网络管理实践。在本文中，我们介绍了我们在 Meta 上开发一个用于网络管理的多智能体框架 Confucius 的经验。我们将网络管理工作流程建模为有向无环图 (DAG) 以帮助规划。我们的框架将法学硕士与现有管理工具集成以实现无缝操作集成，采用检索增强生成（RAG）来改善长期记忆，并建立一组原语来系统地支持人类/模型交互。为了确保关键网络操作的准确性，孔子与现有的网络验证方法紧密结合，并结合了自己的验证框架来防止回归。值得注意的是，Confucius 是一个可投入生产的 LLM 开发框架，已运行两年，已有 60 多个应用程序上线。据我们所知，这是第一份关于在超大规模网络中使用多代理法学硕士的报告。

papers.title: Inter-domain Routing with Extensible Criteria.
papers.abstract:
With the rapid evolution and diversification of Internet applications, their communication-quality criteria are continuously evolving. To globally optimize communication quality, the Internet's control plane thus needs to optimize inter-domain paths on diverse criteria, and should provide extensibility for adding new criteria or modifying existing ones. However, current inter-domain routing protocols and proposals satisfy these requirements at best to a limited degree.

We argue that an inter-domain routing architecture with extensible routing criteria can be realized in path-aware networks, due to their stateless forwarding. We thus propose IREC, an inter-domain routing architecture for the SCION path-aware Internet architecture that enables path optimization with extensible criteria. IREC achieves this through parallel execution and real-time addition of independent route computations, together enabling end domains to express their desired criteria to the control plane. Through large-scale simulations with realistic Internet topologies, we show IREC's viability via implementation and emulation, and its negligible global cost compared to static routing protocols.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着互联网应用的快速发展和多样化，其通信质量标准也在不断发展。为了全局优化通信质量，互联网的控制平面需要根据不同的标准优化域间路径，并且应该提供可扩展性以添加新标准或修改现有标准。然而，当前的域间路由协议和建议最多只能在有限的程度上满足这些要求。

我们认为，由于其无状态转发，可以在路径感知网络中实现具有可扩展路由标准的域间路由架构。因此，我们提出了 IREC，这是一种用于 SCION 路径感知互联网架构的域间路由架构，可通过可扩展的标准实现路径优化。 IREC 通过并行执行和实时添加独立路由计算来实现这一目标，同时使端域能够向控制平面表达其所需的标准。通过使用真实互联网拓扑进行大规模模拟，我们通过实施和仿真展示了 IREC 的可行性，以及与静态路由协议相比其可忽略不计的全局成本。

papers.title: LeoCC: Making Internet Congestion Control Robust to LEO Satellite Dynamics.
papers.abstract:
The recent renaissance of low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite networks expands the boundaries of global Internet access, but also introduces substantial new challenges for existing end-to-end congestion control algorithms (CCAs). The rapid and continuous movement of LEO satellites leads to infrastructure-level dynamics, resulting in frequent, LEO-dynamics-induced changes in link capacity, delay, and packet loss rate, which can further mislead the rate control in existing CCAs and cause self-limited performance.

This paper presents LeoCC, a novel CCA that addresses the above challenges and is robust to LEO satellite dynamics. The core idea behind LeoCC lies in a critical characteristic of emerging LEO networks called "connection reconfiguration", which implicitly reflects satellite path changes and is strongly correlated to network variations. Specifically, LeoCC employs a suite of new techniques to: (i) efficiently detect reconfiguration on the endpoint; (ii) apply a reconfiguration-aware model to characterize and estimate network conditions accurately; and (iii) precisely regulate the sending rate. We implement LeoCC in Linux kernel and evaluate its performance through extensive experiments conducted in both real LEO networks and a controlled lab environment. The results show that LeoCC can achieve the best throughput-delay balance under various LEO network conditions as compared to other existing CCAs: it achieves 85~494% higher throughput than Cubic, Copa, BBRv3, and accomplishes 44~56% lower delay than BBRv1 and VIVACE.
papers.abstract_zh:
最近近地轨道（LEO）卫星网络的复兴扩大了全球互联网接入的边界，但也给现有的端到端拥塞控制算法（CCA）带来了巨大的新挑战。 LEO卫星的快速连续运动会导致基础设施级的动态变化，导致低地球轨道动态引起的链路容量、延迟和丢包率频繁变化，这可能会进一步误导现有CCA中的速率控制并导致性能自限。

本文提出了 LeoCC，这是一种新颖的 CCA，可以解决上述挑战，并且对 LEO 卫星动力学具有鲁棒性。 LeoCC背后的核心思想在于新兴LEO网络的一个关键特征，即“连接重新配置”，它隐式地反映了卫星路径的变化，并且与网络变化密切相关。具体来说，LeoCC 采用了一套新技术来： (i) 有效地检测端点上的重新配置； (ii) 应用重新配置感知模型来准确描述和估计网络状况； (iii) 精准调控发送速率。我们在 Linux 内核中实现 LeoCC，并通过在真实的 LEO 网络和受控实验室环境中进行的大量实验来评估其性能。结果表明，与现有的其他CCA相比，LeoCC在各种LEO网络条件下都能实现最佳的吞吐量-延迟平衡：比Cubic、Copa、BBRv3实现高85~494%的吞吐量，比BBRv1和VIVACE降低44~56%的延迟。

papers.title: Lessons Learned from Operating a Large Network Telescope.
papers.abstract: Network telescopes (aka darknets ) collect unsolicited Internet traffic (aka Internet background radiation or IBR ), which includes benign and malicious scanning as well as artifacts of spoofed denial-of-service attacks and misconfigured software and hosts. Analysis of this traffic has revealed macroscopic insights into security-related events and global network dynamics such as outages. Operating a large-scale network telescope is challenging but often taken for granted, more so than in more mature scientific disciplines. We offer the first study documenting our experiences operating the UCSD Network Telescope, the largest and longest-operating network telescope supporting scientific research. We provide background on the history of the telescope, and focus on increasing operational challenges as the underlying network evolves. We develop and apply techniques to leverage third-party scanning activity to validate the integrity of the data, and to discover misconfigurations in the instrumentation. These insights are crucial for understanding measurement results, which we illustrate using concrete examples. We discuss how our findings generalize to support the expanding ecosystem of other passive techniques, such as honeypots, to track security phenomena.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络望远镜（又名暗网）收集未经请求的互联网流量（又名互联网背景辐射或 IBR），其中包括良性和恶意扫描以及欺骗性拒绝服务攻击和错误配置的软件和主机。对这些流量的分析揭示了对安全相关事件和全球网络动态（例如中断）的宏观洞察。操作大型网络望远镜具有挑战性，但通常被认为是理所当然的，比在更成熟的科学学科中更是如此。我们提供了第一份研究报告，记录了我们操作加州大学圣地亚哥分校网络望远镜的经验，这是支持科学研究的最大、运行时间最长的网络望远镜。我们提供了望远镜的历史背景，并重点关注随着底层网络的发展而增加的操作挑战。我们开发并应用技术来利用第三方扫描活动来验证数据的完整性，并发现仪器中的错误配置。这些见解对于理解测量结果至关重要，我们使用具体示例进行说明。我们讨论我们的发现如何推广以支持其他被动技术（例如蜜罐）不断扩大的生态系统，以跟踪安全现象。

papers.title: Low-Overhead Distributed Application Observation with DeepTrace: Achieving Accurate Tracing in Production Systems.
papers.abstract: As microservices grow in scale and complexity, their operation and debugging become increasingly challenging. Even a single user request can involve interactions across hundreds of components. In such intricate systems, distributed tracing, which tracks the end-to-end execution flow of requests, has become a critical monitoring tool. Among these, non-intrusive tracing frameworks that do not require code modification are particularly valued for their convenience. However, existing non-intrusive solutions either have limited applicability or lack sufficient accuracy under high concurrency. To address these challenges, we propose DeepTrace, a transaction-based, non-intrusive distributed tracing framework designed for microservices. DeepTrace leverages API endpoints and transaction fields embedded within request content to categorize requests into distinct transactions, thereby reducing the likelihood of incorrectly merging traces from different transactions. Compared to state-of-the-art frameworks, DeepTrace maintains an accuracy rate of over 95% even under high concurrency. It has also been adopted by dozens of companies in their production systems for tasks such as failure diagnosis and resource optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着微服务规模和复杂性的增长，其操作和调试变得越来越具有挑战性。即使单个用户请求也可能涉及数百个组件之间的交互。在如此复杂的系统中，跟踪请求的端到端执行流程的分布式跟踪已成为关键的监控工具。其中，不需要修改代码的非侵入式跟踪框架因其便利性而特别受到重视。然而，现有的非侵入式解决方案要么适用性有限，要么在高并发下缺乏足够的准确性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 DeepTrace，这是一种专为微服务设计的基于事务的非侵入式分布式跟踪框架。 DeepTrace 利用请求内容中嵌入的 API 端点和事务字段将请求分类为不同的事务，从而降低错误合并来自不同事务的跟踪的可能性。与最先进的框架相比，DeepTrace 即使在高并发下也能保持超过 95% 的准确率。它还被数十家公司在其生产系统中采用，用于故障诊断和资源优化等任务。

papers.title: Making Cellular Networks More Efficient By Roaming-in-Place.
papers.abstract: We propose Roaming-in-Place (RinP), a technique for dynamically sharing capacity across mobile network operators. RinP is a new form of infrastructure sharing that expands the traditional notion of roaming in cellular networks such that users may roam between operators with overlapping coverage areas based on load and performance conditions. Using simulation and small-scale experiments, we show that deploying RinP would allow operators to run their networks at higher utilization and provide users with higher availability and performance, while achieving 30–40% infrastructure savings in our typical evaluation scenarios. We present a design for RinP that can be incrementally deployed with modest changes to existing cellular infrastructure. We build a prototype RinP testbed, and show that our proposed design can be realized feasibly with modest changes to existing cellular infrastructure, requires no change to current protocol standards, and adds minimal latency overheads.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了就地漫游 (RinP)，这是一种在移动网络运营商之间动态共享容量的技术。 RinP 是一种新形式的基础设施共享，它扩展了蜂窝网络中漫游的传统概念，以便用户可以根据负载和性能条件在具有重叠覆盖区域的运营商之间漫游。通过模拟和小规模实验，我们表明部署 RinP 将使运营商能够以更高的利用率运行其网络，并为用户提供更高的可用性和性能，同时在我们的典型评估场景中实现 30-40% 的基础设施节省。我们提出了一种 RinP 设计，可以通过对现有蜂窝基础设施进行适度更改来增量部署。我们构建了一个原型 RinP 测试台，并表明我们提出的设计可以通过对现有蜂窝基础设施进行适度更改来实现，无需更改当前协议标准，并且增加最小的延迟开销。

papers.title: MegaScale-Infer: Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Model Serving with Disaggregated Expert Parallelism.
papers.abstract:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) showcases tremendous potential to scale large language models (LLMs) with enhanced performance and reduced computational complexity. However, its sparsely activated architecture shifts feed-forward networks (FFNs) from being compute-intensive to memory-intensive during inference, leading to substantially lower GPU utilization and increased operational costs.

We present MegaScale-Infer, an efficient and cost-effective system for serving large-scale MoE models. MegaScale-Infer disaggregates attention and FFN modules within each model layer, enabling independent scaling, tailored parallelism strategies, and heterogeneous deployment for both modules. To fully exploit disaggregation in the presence of MoE's sparsity, MegaScale-Infer introduces ping-pong pipeline parallelism , which partitions a request batch into micro-batches and shuttles them between attention and FFNs for inference. Combined with distinct model parallelism for each module, MegaScale-Infer effectively hides communication overhead and maximizes GPU utilization. To adapt to disaggregated attention and FFN modules and minimize data transmission overhead (e.g., token dispatch), MegaScale-Infer provides a high-performance M2N communication library that eliminates unnecessary GPU-to-CPU data copies, group initialization overhead, and GPU synchronization. Experimental results indicate that MegaScale-Infer achieves up to 1.90× higher per-GPU throughput than state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
专家混合 (MoE) 展示了扩展大型语言模型 (LLM) 的巨大潜力，同时增强了性能并降低了计算复杂性。然而，其稀疏激活的架构在推理过程中将前馈网络 (FFN) 从计算密集型转变为内存密集型，从而导致 GPU 利用率大幅降低并增加运营成本。

我们推出 MegaScale-Infer，这是一种高效且经济高效的系统，用于为大规模 MoE 模型提供服务。 MegaScale-Infer 将注意力模块和 FFN 模块分解在每个模型层中，从而实现两个模块的独立扩展、定制并行策略和异构部署。为了在 MoE 稀疏性的情况下充分利用分解，MegaScale-Infer 引入了乒乓管道并行性，它将请求批次划分为微批次，并在注意力和 FFN 之间穿梭以进行推理。结合每个模块独特的模型并行性，MegaScale-Infer 有效隐藏了通信开销并最大限度地提高了 GPU 利用率。为了适应分解注意力和 FFN 模块并最大限度地减少数据传输开销（例如令牌调度），MegaScale-Infer 提供了高性能 M2N 通信库，消除了不必要的 GPU 到 CPU 数据复制、组初始化开销和 GPU 同步。实验结果表明，MegaScale-Infer 的每 GPU 吞吐量比最先进的解决方案高出 1.90 倍。

papers.title: MixNet: A Runtime Reconfigurable Optical-Electrical Fabric for Distributed Mixture-of-Experts Training.
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Expert (MoE) models outperform conventional models by selectively activating different subnets, named experts , on a per-token basis. This gated computation generates dynamic communications that cannot be determined beforehand, challenging the existing GPU interconnects that remain static during distributed training. In this paper, we advocate for a first-of-its-kind system, called MixNet, that unlocks topology reconfiguration during distributed MoE training. Towards this vision, we first perform a production measurement study and show that the MoE dynamic communication pattern has strong locality , alleviating the need for global reconfiguration. Based on this, we design and implement a regionally reconfigurable high-bandwidth domain that augments existing electrical interconnects using optical circuit switching (OCS), achieving scalability while maintaining rapid adaptability. We build a fully functional MixNet prototype with commodity hardware and a customized collective communication runtime. Our prototype trains state-of-the-art MoE models with in-training topology reconfiguration across 32 A100 GPUs. Large-scale packet-level simulations show that MixNet achieves performance comparable to a non-blocking fat-tree fabric while boosting the networking cost efficiency (e.g., performance per dollar) of four representative MoE models by 1.2×–1.5× and 1.9×–2.3× at 100 Gbps and 400 Gbps link bandwidths, respectively.
