papers.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过基于每个代币有选择地激活不同的子网（称为专家），优于传统模型。这种门控计算会生成无法事先确定的动态通信，对分布式训练期间保持静态的现有 GPU 互连提出了挑战。在本文中，我们提倡创建一种名为 MixNet 的首创系统，该系统可以在分布式 MoE 训练期间解锁拓扑重新配置。为了实现这一愿景，我们首先进行了生产测量研究，并表明 MoE 动态通信模式具有很强的局部性，从而减轻了全局重新配置的需要。基于此，我们设计并实现了一个区域可重构的高带宽域，该域使用光路交换（OCS）增强现有的电气互连，在保持快速适应性的同时实现可扩展性。我们使用商用硬件和定制的集体通信运行时构建了功能齐全的 MixNet 原型。我们的原型通过 32 个 A100 GPU 进行训练中拓扑重新配置来训练最先进的 MoE 模型。大规模数据包级仿真表明，MixNet 实现了与非阻塞胖树结构相当的性能，同时在 100 Gbps 和 400 Gbps 链路带宽下将四个代表性 MoE 模型的网络成本效率（例如，每美元性能）分别提高了 1.2×–1.5× 和 1.9×–2.3×。

papers.title: Mobile Underwater Backscatter Networking.
papers.abstract:
Underwater backscatter is a promising technology for ultra-low-power underwater networking, but existing systems break down in mobile scenarios. This paper presents EchoRider, the first system to enable reliable underwater backscatter networking under mobility.

EchoRider introduces three key components. First, it incorporates a robust and energy-efficient downlink architecture that uses chirp-modulated transmissions at the reader and a sub-Nyquist chirp decoder on backscatter nodes—bringing the resilience of LoRa-style signaling to underwater backscatter while remaining ultra-low-power. Second, it introduces a NACK-based full-duplex retransmission protocol , enabling efficient, reliable packet delivery. Third, it implements a Doppler-resilient uplink decoding pipeline that includes adaptive equalization, polar coding, and dynamic retraining to combat channel variation.

We built a full EchoRider prototype and evaluated it across over 1,200 real-world mobile experiments. EchoRider improves bit error rate by over 125× compared to a state-of-the-art baseline and maintains underwater goodput of 0.8 kbps at speeds up to 2.91 knots. In contrast, the baseline fails at speeds as low as 0.17 knots. Finally, we demonstrate EchoRider in end-to-end deployments involving mobile drones and sensor nodes, showing its effectiveness in practical underwater networked applications.
papers.abstract_zh:
水下反向散射是一种很有前途的超低功耗水下网络技术，但现有系统在移动场景中会崩溃。本文介绍了 EchoRider，这是第一个在移动条件下实现可靠​​的水下反向散射网络的系统。

EchoRider 引入了三个关键组件。首先，它采用了强大且节能的下行链路架构，在读取器处使用线性调频脉冲调制传输，并在反向散射节点上使用亚奈奎斯特线性调频解码器，从而将 LoRa 式信令的弹性引入水下反向散射，同时保持超低功耗。其次，它引入了基于NACK的全双工重传协议，实现高效、可靠的数据包传输。第三，它实现了多普勒弹性上行链路解码管道，其中包括自适应均衡、极性编码和动态再训练，以应对信道变化。

我们构建了完整的 EchoRider 原型，并通过 1,200 多个实际移动实验对其进行了评估。与最先进的基线相比，EchoRider 将误码率提高了 125 倍以上，并在高达 2.91 节的速度下保持 0.8 kbps 的水下有效吞吐量。相比之下，基线在低至 0.17 节的速度时就会失效。最后，我们在涉及移动无人机和传感器节点的端到端部署中演示了 EchoRider，展示了其在实际水下网络应用中的有效性。

papers.title: Mosaic: Breaking the Optics versus Copper Trade-off with a Wide-and-Slow Architecture and MicroLEDs.
papers.abstract:
Link technologies in today's data center networks impose a fundamental trade-off between reach, power, and reliability. Copper links are power-efficient and reliable but have very limited reach (< 2 m). Optical links offer longer reach but at the expense of high power consumption and lower reliability. As network speeds increase, this trade-off becomes more pronounced, constraining future scalability.

We introduce Mosaic, a novel optical link technology that breaks this trade-off. Unlike existing copper and optical links, which rely on a narrow-and-fast architecture with a few high-speed channels, Mosaic adopts a wide-and-slow design, employing hundreds of parallel low-speed channels. To make this approach practical, Mosaic uses directly modulated microLEDs instead of lasers, combined with multicore imaging fibers, and replaces complex, power-hungry electronics with a low-power analog backend. Mosaic achieves 10× the reach of copper, reduces power consumption by up to 68%, and offers 100× higher reliability than today's optical links. We demonstrate an end-to-end Mosaic prototype with 100 optical channels, each transmitting at 2 Gbps, and show how it scales to 800 Gbps and beyond with a reach of up to 50 m. Mosaic is protocol-agnostic and seamlessly integrates with existing network infrastructure, providing a practical and scalable solution for future networks.
papers.abstract_zh:
当今数据中心网络中的链路技术在覆盖范围、功率和可靠性之间进行了根本性的权衡。铜链路节能且可靠，但覆盖范围非常有限 (< 2 m)。光链路提供了更长的传输距离，但代价是高功耗和较低的可靠性。随着网络速度的提高，这种权衡变​​得更加明显，限制了未来的可扩展性。

我们推出了 Mosaic，这是一种打破这种权衡的新颖光链路技术。与现有的铜缆和光链路依赖于具有少量高速通道的窄而快速的架构不同，Mosaic 采用宽而慢的设计，采用数百个并行低速通道。为了使这种方法切实可行，Mosaic 使用直接调制的 microLED 代替激光器，与多芯成像光纤相结合，并用低功耗模拟后端取代复杂、耗电的电子设备。 Mosaic 的传输距离是铜的 10 倍，功耗降低高达 68%，可靠性比当今的光链路高 100 倍。我们演示了一个具有 100 个光通道的端到端 Mosaic 原型，每个光通道的传输速度为 2 Gbps，并展示了它如何扩展到 800 Gbps 及以上，传输距离可达 50 m。 Mosaic 与协议无关，可与现有网络基础设施无缝集成，为未来网络提供实用且可扩展的解决方案。

papers.title: Network Support For Scalable And High Performance Cloud Exchanges.
papers.abstract: Financial exchanges are migrating to the public cloud, but the best-effort nature of the cloud fabric is at odds with the stringent networking requirements of the exchanges. We present Onyx, a system for meeting such requirements which uses many well-studied techniques in a new context as well as introduces new techniques that enable a scalable cloud financial exchange. An overlay multicast tree is used to disseminate data to 1000 participants with ≤ 1 μs difference in data reception time between any two participants, crucial for maintaining fair competition. Several techniques for mitigating latency variance are introduced. Onyx also presents a scheduling policy for trade orders that enhances an exchange's performance and gracefully services bursty traffic. Onyx achieves ≈50% lower latency than the AWS multicast service [1]. Onyx outperforms an existing system, CloudEx [2] in terms of supported number of participants, exchange's throughput and multicast latency. Onyx's techniques can be applied to other existing systems (e.g., DBO) to enhance their performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 金融交易所正在迁移到公共云，但云结构的尽力而为的性质与交易所严格的网络要求不一致。我们推出了 Onyx，这是一个满足此类要求的系统，它在新的环境中使用了许多经过充分研究的技术，并引入了支持可扩展云金融交易的新技术。覆盖组播树用于向 1000 个参与者传播数据，任意两个参与者之间的数据接收时间差异≤ 1 μs，这对于维持公平竞争至关重要。介绍了几种减轻延迟差异的技术。 Onyx 还提出了交易订单调度策略，可增强交易所的性能并妥善处理突发流量。 Onyx 的延迟比 AWS 多播服务低约 50% [1]。 Onyx 在支持的参与者数量、交换吞吐量和多播延迟方面优于现有系统 CloudEx [2]。 Onyx 的技术可以应用于其他现有系统（例如 DBO）以增强其性能。

papers.title: New Evolution of Hoyan: Enhancing Scalability, Usability, and Accuracy for Alibaba's Global WAN Verification.
papers.abstract: The network verification system Hoyan has been deployed for Alibaba Cloud's wide-area network (WAN) for years and achieved considerable success in preventing misconfiguration-caused network incidents. However, recent years have seen the emergence of new challenges in scalability, usability , and accuracy for Hoyan. This paper presents the new evolution of Hoyan to address these challenges. First, to support the large increase in the number of routers and prefixes on our WAN, Hoyan's simulation has evolved from a centralized fashion to a distributed framework, which improves the efficiency by 5 times and can scale to O (10 4 ) routers, millions of prefixes, and billions of flows. Second, to improve Hoyan's usability in checking route change intents, we developed a specification language RCL , which supports the easy specification and automatic verification of route change intents. Third, to ensure high accuracy we enhanced Hoyan's accuracy diagnosis framework, which helped us identify and fix dozens of implementation and modeling issues. Hoyan is used on a daily basis for our WAN. It supports O (100) verification requests each week, prevents O (10) incidents each year, and helps reduce the percentage of misconfiguration-caused network incidents from 56% to 5%.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络验证系统Hoyan已在阿里云广域网（WAN）部署多年，在防止错误配置导致的网络事件方面取得了相当大的成功。然而，近年来，Hoyan 在可扩展性、可用性和准确性方面出现了新的挑战。本文介绍了 Hoyan 为应对这些挑战而进行的新演变。首先，为了支持广域网上路由器和前缀数量的大量增加，Hoyan的模拟从集中式方式演变成分布式框架，效率提高了5倍，并且可以扩展到O（10 4 ）个路由器、数百万个前缀和数十亿个流量。其次，为了提高Hoyan在检查路由变更意图方面的可用性，我们开发了一种规范语言RCL，它支持路由变更意图的简单规范和自动验证。第三，为了确保高精度，我们增强了 Hoyan 的准确性诊断框架，该框架帮助我们识别并修复了数十个实施和建模问题。 Hoyan 每天都用于我们的 WAN。它每周支持 O(100) 次验证请求，每年防止 O(10) 次事件，并有助于将错误配置导致的网络事件的百分比从 56% 降低到 5%。

papers.title: Nezha: SmartNIC-based Virtual Switch Load Sharing.
papers.abstract: Cloud providers use SmartNIC-accelerated virtual switches (vSwitches) to offer rich network functions (NFs) for tenant VMs. Constrained by limited SmartNIC resources, it is a challenge to provide sufficient network performance for high-demand VMs. Meanwhile, we observed a significant number of idle vSwitches in the data center, which led us to consider leveraging them to build a remote resource pool for high-demand virtual NICs (vNICs). In this work, we propose Nezha, a distributed vSwitch load sharing system. Nezha reuses the existing idle SmartNICs to handle the excess load from the local SmartNIC without adding new devices. Nezha offloads stateless rule/flow tables to the remote, while keeping states locally. This eliminates the need for state synchronization, facilitating load sharing and failover. The deployment cost of Nezha is only a small fraction of that required to deploy new devices. Data collected from production show that our CPS capability bottleneck has shifted from the vSwitch to the VM kernel stack, with #concurrent flows and #vNICs increased by up to 50.4x and 40x, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 云提供商使用 SmartNIC 加速的虚拟交换机 (vSwitches) 为租户虚拟机提供丰富的网络功能 (NF)。受SmartNIC资源有限的限制，为高需求的虚拟机提供足够的网络性能是一个挑战。同时，我们观察到数据中心内有大量闲置的 vSwitch，这促使我们考虑利用它们为高需求的虚拟 NIC (vNIC) 构建远程资源池。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Nezha，一种分布式 vSwitch 负载共享系统。哪吒复用现有闲置的SmartNIC来处理本地SmartNIC的过量负载，而无需添加新设备。 Nezha 将无状态规则/流表卸载到远程，同时在本地保留状态。这消除了状态同步的需要，从而促进负载共享和故障转移。哪吒的部署成本只是部署新设备所需成本的一小部分。从生产中收集的数据表明，我们的 CPS 能力瓶颈已从 vSwitch 转移到 VM 内核堆栈，#concurrent 流和 #vNIC 分别增加了 50.4 倍和 40 倍。

papers.title: NIER: Practical Neural-enhanced Low-bitrate Video Conferencing.
papers.abstract: We present NIER, a video conferencing system that can adaptively maintain a low bitrate ( e.g. , 10–100 Kbps) with reasonable visual quality while being robust to packet losses. We use key-point-based deep image animation (DIA) as a key building block and address a series of networking and system challenges to make NIER practical. Our evaluations show that NIER significantly outperforms the baseline solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 NIER，这是一种视频会议系统，可以自适应地保持低比特率（例如 10-100 Kbps），具有合理的视觉质量，同时对数据包丢失具有鲁棒性。我们使用基于关键点的深度图像动画 (DIA) 作为关键构建块，并解决了一系列网络和系统挑战，使 NIER 变得实用。我们的评估表明 NIER 显着优于基准解决方案。

papers.title: NPC: Rethinking Dataplane through Network-aware Packet Classification.
papers.abstract: Packet classification is a critical component for accurately categorizing traffic in network systems. The efficiency of packet classification algorithms is primarily determined by two key factors: the classifier's data structure and the characteristics of the traffic being classified. While significant efforts have been made to optimize data structures, the potential of leveraging traffic characteristics remains underexplored. In this study, we revisit the network dataplane by integrating the network measurement module with the packet classification module. We propose an innovative Network-aware Packet Classification system (NPC) that utilizes sketch techniques to extract network traffic features. These features guide the construction of decision trees, enabling efficient and adaptable packet classification across diverse network environments. Experimental results demonstrate that the NPC achieves speedups ranging from 1.86× to 23.88× over state-of-the-art algorithms, while significantly reducing memory overhead and construction time, highlighting its practical value in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, integrating NPC into Open vSwitch (OVS) yields throughput improvements of 10.71× to 13.01× compared to the native OVS.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据包分类是对网络系统中的流量进行准确分类的关键组件。数据包分类算法的效率主要由两个关键因素决定：分类器的数据结构和被分类的流量的特征。尽管我们在优化数据结构方面做出了巨大努力，但利用流量特征的潜力仍未得到充分开发。在本研究中，我们通过将网络测量模块与数据包分类模块集成来重新审视网络数据平面。我们提出了一种创新的网络感知数据包分类系统（NPC），该系统利用草图技术来提取网络流量特征。这些功能指导决策树的构建，从而在不同的网络环境中实现高效且适应性强的数据包分类。实验结果表明，NPC 比最先进的算法实现了 1.86 倍到 23.88 倍的加速，同时显着减少了内存开销和构建时间，凸显了其在现实场景中的实用价值。此外，与原生 OVS 相比，将 NPC 集成到 Open vSwitch (OVS) 中可将吞吐量提高 10.71 倍至 13.01 倍。

papers.title: Orderlock: A New Type of Deadlock and its Implications on High Performance Network Protocol Design.
papers.abstract: In the pursuit of designing high-performance network (HPN) protocols, three critical features for effective transmission have been extensively studied: In-order Delivery, Lossless Transmission, and Out-of-order Capability. However, no practical implementation has successfully achieved all three simultaneously. We identify and prove that the simultaneous realization of these features constitutes a necessary and sufficient condition for a new type of deadlock, which we term Orderlock. We demonstrate that operating in an Orderlock-risky network is impractical and conduct a comprehensive exploration and comparison of Orderlock-free protocols, through a case study tuning AI workload performance. From an Orderlock-prevention perspective, our findings provide insights into the requirements for future HPN protocol and hardware designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 在设计高性能网络 (HPN) 协议的过程中，有效传输的三个关键特性得到了广泛研究：按序传送、无损传输和乱序能力。然而，还没有任何实际实施能够同时成功实现这三个目标。我们确定并证明了这些功能的同时实现构成了一种新型死锁的充分必要条件，我们将其称为订单锁。我们证明在有 Orderlock 风险的网络中运行是不切实际的，并通过调整 AI 工作负载性能的案例研究对无 Orderlock 协议进行了全面的探索和比较。从订单锁定预防的角度来看，我们的研究结果为未来 HPN 协议和硬件设计的要求提供了见解。

papers.title: Palladium: A DPU-enabled Multi-Tenant Serverless Cloud over Zero-copy Multi-node RDMA Fabrics.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing offers resource efficiency but suffers from a heavyweight data plane. We present Palladium, a DPU-offloaded serverless data plane enabling distributed zero-copy communication. Palladium uses two-sided RDMA and cross-processor shared memory to mitigate limitations of wimpy DPU cores. Its DPU-enabled network engine (DNE) isolates RDMA resources and manages flows across tenants. By converting HTTP/TCP to RDMA at ingress, Palladium reduces protocol overhead on the critical path.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算提供了资源效率，但受到重量级数据平面的影响。我们推出 Palladium，这是一种 DPU 卸载的无服务器数据平面，可实现分布式零拷贝通信。 Palladium 使用两侧 RDMA 和跨处理器共享内存来缓解弱 DPU 内核的限制。其支持 DPU 的网络引擎 (DNE) 可隔离 RDMA 资源并管理跨租户的流量。通过在入口处将 HTTP/TCP 转换为 RDMA，Palladium 减少了关键路径上的协议开销。

papers.title: ParserHawk: Hardware-aware parser generator using program synthesis.
papers.abstract:
Parser programs are becoming increasingly complex to accommodate intricate network packet formats and advanced protocols. Existing parser compilers incorporate predefined program rewrite rules to output the low-level parser implementation. Yet, these rules are often brittle and sensitive to how the input parser program is written. As a result, generated implementations could consume more hardware resources than necessary. In some cases, these compilers unnecessarily reject valid parser programs that could have fit within the target device parser's resource constraints.

We leverage program-synthesis-based techniques to build a parser compiler, ParserHawk, for 2 network devices: the Intel Infrastructure Processing Unit (IPU) and the Barefoot Tofino programmable switch. Naively formulating code generation as a program synthesis problem can take hours, if not days, to complete. As a result, ParserHawk incorporates several optimization algorithms, which achieve a geometric mean speed-up of 309.44×. Within a compile time on the order of minutes for most benchmarks, ParserHawk can correctly compile parser programs rejected by existing compilers and can generate parser implementations that use fewer hardware resources.
papers.abstract_zh:
解析器程序变得越来越复杂，以适应复杂的网络数据包格式和高级协议。现有的解析器编译器合并预定义的程序重写规则来输出低级解析器实现。然而，这些规则通常很脆弱，并且对输入解析器程序的编写方式很敏感。因此，生成的实现可能会消耗比必要的更多的硬件资源。在某些情况下，这些编译器不必要地拒绝可能适合目标设备解析器资源限制的有效解析器程序。

我们利用基于程序综合的技术为 2 个网络设备构建解析器编译器 ParserHawk：Intel 基础设施处理单元 (IPU) 和 Barefoot Tofino 可编程交换机。将代码生成简单地表述为程序综合问题可能需要数小时甚至数天才能完成。因此，ParserHawk 结合了多种优化算法，实现了 309.44 倍的几何平均加速。对于大多数基准测试而言，在几分钟的编译时间内，ParserHawk 可以正确编译现有编译器拒绝的解析器程序，并且可以生成使用更少硬件资源的解析器实现。

papers.title: Pegasus: A Universal Framework for Scalable Deep Learning Inference on the Dataplane.
papers.abstract: The paradigm of Intelligent DataPlane (IDP) embeds deep learning (DL) models on the network dataplane to enable intelligent traffic analysis at line-speed. However, the current use of the match-action table (MAT) abstraction on the dataplane is misaligned with DL inference, leading to several key limitations, including accuracy degradation, limited scale, and lack of generality. This paper proposes Pegasus to address these limitations. Pegasus translates DL operations into three dataplane-oriented primitives to achieve generality: Partition, Map, and SumReduce. Specifically, Partition "divides" high-dimensional features into multiple low-dimensional vectors, making them more suitable for the dataplane; Map "conquers" computations on the low-dimensional vectors in parallel with the technique of Fuzzy Matching, while SumReduce "combines" the computation results. Additionally, Pegasus employs Primitive Fusion to merge computations, improving scalability. Finally, Pegasus adopts full-precision weights with fixed-point activations to improve accuracy. Our implementation on a P4 switch demonstrates that Pegasus can effectively support various types of DL models, including Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP), Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), and AutoEncoder models on the dataplane. Meanwhile, Pegasus outperforms state-of-the-art approaches with an average accuracy improvement of up to 22.8%, along with up to 248× larger model size and 212× larger input scale.
papers.abstract_zh: 智能数据平面 (IDP) 的范例在网络数据平面上嵌入深度学习 (DL) 模型，以实现线速智能流量分析。然而，当前在数据平面上使用的匹配动作表 (MAT) 抽象与深度学习推理不一致，导致了几个关键限制，包括准确性下降、规模有限和缺乏通用性。本文提出 Pegasus 来解决这些限制。 Pegasus 将 DL 操作转换为三个面向数据平面的原语以实现通用性：Partition、Map 和 SumReduce。具体来说，Partition将高维特征“划分”为多个低维向量，使其更适合dataplane； Map 与模糊匹配技术并行地“征服”低维向量的计算，而 SumReduce 则“组合”计算结果。此外，Pegasus 采用 Primitive Fusion 来合并计算，提高可扩展性。最后，Pegasus 采用带有定点激活的全精度权重来提高准确性。我们在 P4 交换机上的实现表明，Pegasus 可以有效支持各种类型的深度学习模型，包括数据平面上的多层感知器 (MLP)、循环神经网络 (RNN)、卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和自动编码器模型。与此同时，Pegasus 的性能优于最先进的方法，平均准确度提高了 22.8%，模型尺寸扩大了 248 倍，输入规模扩大了 212 倍。

papers.title: PreTE: Traffic Engineering with Predictive Failures.
papers.abstract: Fiber links in wide-area networks (WANs) are exposed to complicated environments and hence are vulnerable to failures like fiber cuts. The conventional approach of using static probabilistic failures falls short in fiber-cut scenarios because these fiber cuts are rare but disruptive, making it difficult for network operators to balance network utilization and availability in WAN traffic engineering. Our large-scale measurements of per-second optical-layer data reveal that the fiber's failure probability increases by several orders of magnitude when experiencing a rare and ephemeral degradation state. Therefore, we present a novel traffic engineering (TE) system called PreTE to factor in the dynamic fiber cut probabilities directly into TE systems. At the core of the PreTE system, fiber degradation facilitates failure predictions and traffic tunnels to be proactively updated, followed by traffic allocation optimizations among updated tunnels. We evaluate PreTE using a production-level WAN testbed and large-scale simulations. The testbed evaluation quantifies PreTE's runtime to demonstrate the feasibility to implement in large-scale WANs. Our large-scale simulation results show that PreTE can support up to 2× more demand at the same level of availability as compared to existing TE schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 广域网 (WAN) 中的光纤链路暴露在复杂的环境中，因此很容易出现断纤等故障。使用静态概率故障的传统方法在光纤切断场景中存在不足，因为这些光纤切断很少见，但具有破坏性，使得网络运营商很难在 WAN 流量工程中平衡网络利用率和可用性。我们对每秒光层数据的大规模测量表明，当经历罕见且短暂的退化状态时，光纤的故障概率会增加几个数量级。因此，我们提出了一种称为 PreTE 的新型流量工程 (TE) 系统，将动态光纤切断概率直接纳入 TE 系统。作为 PreTE 系统的核心，光纤退化有助于故障预测和主动更新流量隧道，进而优化更新隧道之间的流量分配。我们使用生产级 WAN 测试台和大规模模拟来评估 PreTE。测试台评估量化了 PreTE 的运行时间，以证明在大规模广域网中实施的可行性。我们的大规模仿真结果表明，与现有 TE 方案相比，PreTE 在相同可用性水平下可以支持高达 2 倍的需求。

papers.title: PtCAM: Scalable High-Speed Name Prefix Lookup using TCAM.
papers.abstract: Name prefix lookup is a core characteristic of name-based packet forwarding in ICN and also URL redirections in CDN. This operation is essentially a longest prefix match on URL-like names, which faces significant challenges in high-speed processing due to large set, length-unbounded names and per-packet lookup need. In this paper, we propose a scheme to support generic hierarchical name lookups on millions of prefixes with fast, constant and guaranteed performance using ternary content-addressable memory (TCAM). Our work has three contributions. First, a scheme, namely PtCAM, is proposed to exploit TCAM for name lookup using a binary Patricia trie. Second, several approaches are proposed to enhance efficiency and scalability. Third, experiments on various name datasets are carried out. The results show that our scheme has the potential to achieve high-speed lookup performance nearly equal to the given TCAM throughput. Notably, PtCAM can be implemented on TCAM-based IP linecards, which means that industrial commercial off-the-shelf devices can be directly involved in the advancement of information-centric innovation and deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 名称前缀查找是 ICN 中基于名称的数据包转发以及 CDN 中的 URL 重定向的核心特征。该操作本质上是对类似 URL 的名称进行最长前缀匹配，由于名称集大、长度无限制以及逐包查找的需要，该操作在高速处理方面面临着重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种方案，使用三态内容寻址存储器（TCAM）支持对数百万个前缀进行通用分层名称查找，并具有快速、恒定和有保证的性能。我们的工作有三个贡献。首先，提出了一种名为 PtCAM 的方案，利用二进制 Patricia trie 来利用 TCAM 进行名称查找。其次，提出了几种提高效率和可扩展性的方法。第三，在各种姓名数据集上进行实验。结果表明，我们的方案有潜力实现几乎等于给定 TCAM 吞吐量的高速查找性能。值得注意的是，PtCAM可以在基于TCAM的IP线卡上实施，这意味着工业商业现成设备可以直接参与以信息为中心的创新和部署的推进。

papers.title: Raha: A General Tool to Analyze WAN Degradation.
papers.abstract:
Raha is the first general tool that can analyze probable degradation of traffic engineered networks under arbitrary failures and traffic shifts to prevent outages. Raha addresses a significant gap in prior work which consider only (1) ≤ k failures; (2) specific traffic engineering schemes; and (3) the maximum impact of failures irrespective of the network design point.

Our insight is to formulate the problem in terms of heuristic analysis, where one seeks to maximize the performance gap between the network design point ( i.e. , the network with no failures) and the network under failures. We invent techniques that allow us to exploit the mechanisms within these tools to encode the problem into components which can handle them. We present extensive experiments on Microsoft's production network and those of Topology Zoo that demonstrate Raha is scalable and can effectively solve the problem. We use Raha to propose capacity augments that allow operators to mitigate potential problems and avoid future outages. Our results show Raha can find ≥ 2× higher degradations compared to those tools that only consider up to 2 failures.
papers.abstract_zh:
Raha 是第一个通用工具，可以分析流量工程网络在任意故障和流量转移情况下可能出现的退化情况，以防止中断。 Raha 解决了先前工作中仅考虑 (1) ≤ k 故障的重大差距； （二）具体交通工程方案； (3) 无论网络设计点如何，故障的最大影响。

我们的见解是根据启发式分析来阐述问题，其中寻求最大化网络设计点（即没有故障的网络）与发生故障的网络之间的性能差距。我们发明了一些技术，使我们能够利用这些工具中的机制将问题编码到可以处理它们的组件中。我们在 Microsoft 的生产网络和 Topology Zoo 上进行了广泛的实验，证明 Raha 具有可扩展性并且可以有效解决问题。我们使用 Raha 来提出容量增强建议，使运营商能够减轻潜在问题并避免未来的中断。我们的结果表明，与那些只考虑最多 2 次故障的工具相比，Raha 可以发现 ≥ 2 倍的降级。

papers.title: RANBooster: Democratizing advanced cellular connectivity through fronthaul middleboxes.
papers.abstract: The 5G Radio Access Network has shifted towards virtualization and disaggregation. This change aims to reduce costs and foster innovation by promoting vendor interoperability and by expanding the ecosystem. In this environment, smaller RAN vendors and open-source projects have emerged, focusing on low-cost, modular stacks. However, challenges such as achieving state-of-the-art performance and accessing data and control knobs hinder their widespread adoption. To address these issues, we propose a middlebox architecture, called RANBooster, that enhances the RAN capabilities without modifying existing network functions, by leveraging the open fronthaul interface. To demonstrate the benefits of the RANBooster framework, we build four reference applications (distributed antenna system, distributed MIMO, RU sharing, realtime physical resource block monitoring), and evaluate them on an enterprise-scale, commercial-grade 5G testbed.
papers.abstract_zh: 5G 无线接入网络已转向虚拟化和分解。这一变化旨在通过促进供应商互操作性和扩展生态系统来降低成本并促进创新。在这种环境下，规模较小的 RAN 供应商和开源项目应运而生，专注于低成本、模块化堆栈。然而，实现最先进的性能以及访问数据和控制旋钮等挑战阻碍了它们的广泛采用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为 RANBooster 的中间盒架构，通过利用开放前传接口，在不修改现有网络功能的情况下增强 RAN 功能。为了展示 RANBooster 框架的优势，我们构建了四个参考应用（分布式天线系统、分布式 MIMO、RU 共享、实时物理资源块监控），并在企业级商业级 5G 测试台上对其进行评估。

papers.title: Reliable and Decentralized Certificate Revocation via DNS: The Case for RevDNS.
papers.abstract:
The Online Certificate Status Protocol's long slide—after 25 years of soft-fail rules, privacy leakage, and shaky infrastructure—exposes a deeper failure in web-PKI revocation. Certificate Authorities increasingly route OCSP traffic through CDNs for speed, yet this recentralizes trust: our measurements show Akamai serves 62 percent of all revocation responses, creating single points of failure and betraying PKI's decentralized ideals.

We present RevDNS, a DNS-based revocation scheme that drops CDN dependence while preserving real-time guarantees. Revoked serial numbers live in DNSSEC-signed TXT records; NSEC proofs allow aggressive negative caching, so recursive resolvers answer 99.8 percent of checks without bothering a CA. From 1.1 billion certificates and 5 million revocations, we find a large CA such as Let's Encrypt can publish data for 612 million certificates in a 345 MB zone, with resolvers shouldering nearly every lookup.

Because answers piggyback on ordinary DNS lookups, RevDNS adds no latency and discloses no more about users than standard DNS traffic. By keeping revocation authority with CAs and avoiding fragile hacks like short-lived certificates, RevDNS delivers a durable, decentralized path for TLS revocation—one that finally aligns operational practicality with the web's security ambitions.
papers.abstract_zh:
在线证书状态协议的长期下滑——经过 25 年的软失败规则、隐私泄露和不稳定的基础设施——暴露了网络 PKI 撤销方面更深层次的失败。证书颁发机构越来越多地通过 CDN 路由 OCSP 流量以提高速度，但这会重新集中信任：我们的测量显示 Akamai 服务了 62% 的吊销响应，从而造成了单点故障并违背了 PKI 的去中心化理念。

我们提出了 RevDNS，这是一种基于 DNS 的撤销方案，可以在保持实时保证的同时消除对 CDN 的依赖。已撤销的序列号存在于 DNSSEC 签名的 TXT 记录中； NSEC 证明允许积极的负缓存，因此递归解析器可以回答 99.8% 的检查，而无需打扰 CA。从 11 亿个证书和 500 万个吊销中，我们发现像 Let's Encrypt 这样的大型 CA 可以在 345 MB 区域中发布 6.12 亿个证书的数据，解析器几乎承担所有查找。

由于答案搭载在普通 DNS 查找上，因此 RevDNS 不会增加延迟，并且不会比标准 DNS 流量透露更多有关用户的信息。通过保留 CA 的撤销权限并避免诸如短期证书之类的脆弱黑客攻击，RevDNS 为 TLS 撤销提供了一条持久、去中心化的路径，最终使操作实用性与网络的安全目标保持一致。

papers.title: ResCCL: Resource-Efficient Scheduling for Collective Communication.
papers.abstract: As distributed deep learning training (DLT) systems scale, collective communication has become a significant performance bottleneck. While current approaches optimize bandwidth utilization and task completion time, existing communication libraries (CCLs) backends fail to efficiently manage GPU resources during algorithm execution, limiting the performance of advanced algorithms. This paper proposes ResCCL , a novel CCL backend designed for Resource-Efficient Scheduling to address key limitations in current systems. ResCCL enhances execution efficiency by optimizing scheduling at the primitive level ( e.g. , send and recvReduceCopy), enabling flexible thread block (TB) allocation, and generating lightweight communication kernels to minimize runtime overhead. Our approach tackles the global scheduling problem, reduces idle TB resources, and enhances communication bandwidth. Evaluation results demonstrate that ResCCL achieves up to 2.5× improvement in bandwidth performance compared to both NCCL and MSCCL. It reduces SM resource overhead by 77.8% and increases TB utilization by 41.6% while running the same algorithms. In end-to-end DLT, ResCCL boosts Megatron's throughput by up to 39%.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着分布式深度学习训练（DLT）系统的规模扩大，集体通信已成为一个重要的性能瓶颈。虽然当前的方法优化了带宽利用率和任务完成时间，但现有的通信库 (CCL) 后端无法在算法执行期间有效管理 GPU 资源，从而限制了高级算法的性能。本文提出了 ResCCL，这是一种新颖的 CCL 后端，专为资源高效调度而设计，以解决当前系统中的关键限制。 ResCCL 通过优化原语级别的调度（例如 send 和 receiveReduceCopy）、实现灵活的线程块 (TB) 分配以及生成轻量级通信内核以最小化运行时开销来提高执行效率。我们的方法解决了全局调度问题，减少了空闲 TB 资源，并增强了通信带宽。评估结果表明，与 NCCL 和 MSCCL 相比，ResCCL 的带宽性能提高了 2.5 倍。在运行相同算法的情况下，它可以将 SM 资源开销降低 77.8%，并将 TB 利用率提高 41.6%。在端到端 DLT 中，ResCCL 将 Megatron 的吞吐量提高了 39%。

papers.title: Revisiting RDMA Reliability for Lossy Fabrics.
papers.abstract: Due to the high operational complexity and limited deployment scale of lossless RDMA networks, the community has been exploring efficient RDMA communication over lossy fabrics. State-of-the-art (SOTA) lossy RDMA solutions implement a simplified selective repeat mechanism in RDMA NICs (RNICs) to enhance loss recovery efficiency. However, these solutions still face performance challenges, such as unavoidable ECMP hash collisions and excessive retransmission timeouts (RTOs). In this paper, we revisit RDMA reliability with the goals of being independent of PFC, compatible with packet-level load balancing, free from RTO, and friendly to hardware offloading. To this end, we propose DCP, a transport architecture that co-designs both the switch and RNICs, fully meeting the design goals. At its core, DCP-Switch introduces a simple yet effective lossless control plane, which is leveraged by DCP-RNIC to enhance reliability support for high-speed lossy fabrics, primarily including header-only-based retransmission and bitmap-free packet tracking. We prototype DCP-Switch using P4 switch and DCP-RNIC using FPGA. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCP achieves 1.6× and 2.1× performance improvements, compared to SOTA lossless and lossy RDMA solutions, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于无损 RDMA 网络的高操作复杂性和有限的部署规模，社区一直在探索有损结构上的高效 RDMA 通信。最先进的 (SOTA) 有损 RDMA 解决方案在 RDMA NIC (RNIC) 中实施简化的选择性重复机制，以提高丢失恢复效率。然而，这些解决方案仍然面临性能挑战，例如不可避免的 ECMP 哈希冲突和过多的重传超时 (RTO)。在本文中，我们重新审视 RDMA 可靠性，目标是独立于 PFC、兼容数据包级负载均衡、不受 RTO 影响、对硬件卸载友好。为此，我们提出了DCP，一种将交换机和RNIC共同设计的传输架构，完全满足设计目标。 DCP-Switch 的核心是引入了一个简单而有效的无损控制平面，DCP-RNIC 利用该控制平面来增强对高速有损结构的可靠性支持，主要包括基于标头的重传和无位图数据包跟踪。我们使用 P4 交换机对 DCP-Switch 进行原型设计，并使用 FPGA 对 DCP-RNIC 进行原型设计。大量实验表明，与 SOTA 无损和有损 RDMA 解决方案相比，DCP 分别实现了 1.6 倍和 2.1 倍的性能提升。

papers.title: S2: A Distributed Configuration Verifier for Hyper-Scale Networks.
papers.abstract: Network configuration verifiers can proactively reason about a network's correctness to prevent network outages. However, even recent efforts have proposed algorithms to "scale up" the verification to several thousand switches, these algorithms still cannot be used for networks with more than 10K switches or 1000M routes, which is common for large service providers. In this paper, instead of further scaling up the verification limited to a single server, we study how to "scale out" the verification using the resources of multiple servers. To achieve this, we propose S2, a distributed verifier for network configurations. S2 partitions the network model and distributes the verification tasks, i.e. , control plane simulation and data plane verification, to run on multiple servers in parallel. Additionally, S2 uses prefix sharding during control plane simulation to further reduce the memory footprint on each server. We implement a prototype of S2 based on Batfish, the state-of-the-art network verifier. Based on real datacenter topologies of a large service provider and synthetic FatTree topologies, we show that S2 can verify networks with 10K routers and 1000M routes within 2 hours.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络配置验证者可以主动推断网络的正确性，以防止网络中断。然而，即使最近提出了将验证“扩展”到数千台交换机的算法，这些算法仍然无法用于具有超过 10K 交换机或 1000M 路由的网络，而这对于大型服务提供商来说很常见。在本文中，我们不是进一步扩展仅限于单个服务器的验证，而是研究如何利用多个服务器的资源来“扩展”验证。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 S2，一个用于网络配置的分布式验证器。 S2对网络模型进行划分，并将验证任务（即控制平面仿真和数据平面验证）分布在多个服务器上并行运行。此外，S2 在控制平面模拟期间使用前缀分片，以进一步减少每个服务器上的内存占用。我们基于最先进的网络验证器 Batfish 实现了 S2 原型。基于大型服务提供商的真实数据中心拓扑和合成的 FatTree 拓扑，我们表明 S2 可以在 2 小时内验证具有 10K 路由器和 1000M 路由的网络。

papers.title: SaTE: Low-Latency Traffic Engineering for Satellite Networks.
papers.abstract:
This paper explores traffic engineering (TE) for large-scale Low-Earth-Orbit satellite constellations. While there is rich prior work on TE algorithms for global cloud wide-area networks (WANs), they are designed for static network topologies and often require significant computation time for large-scale networks. Such limitations make existing WAN TE algorithms unsuitable for large-scale satellite networks which rapidly change topology and require computing optimal traffic allocation under stringent latency constraints.

We present SaTE, a low-latency TE algorithm for large-scale satellite networks, computing traffic allocation at millisecond latency. SaTE formulates a heterogeneous graph to model the TE problem, adapting to dynamic satellite topologies. By removing redundant graph relations, SaTE reduces computational latency, allowing the graph to be efficiently learned by a graph neural network that leverages GPUs to rapidly infer traffic allocations. SaTE also exploits the similarity of satellite network topologies and the geospatial distribution of traffic demands to facilitate model training. We evaluate SaTE through extensive data-driven simulation on today's largest satellite constellation, Starlink with 4236 satellites. Our results show over a 23.5% improvement in satisfied demand with an average TE runtime of 17 ms , achieving a 2738× speedup compared to commercial solvers.
papers.abstract_zh:
本文探讨了大规模低地球轨道卫星星座的流量工程（TE）。虽然针对全球云广域网 (WAN) 的 TE 算法有丰富的先前工作，但它们是针对静态网络拓扑设计的，并且通常需要大量的计算时间来处理大型网络。这些限制使得现有的 WAN TE 算法不适合快速改变拓扑并需要在严格的延迟约束下计算最佳流量分配的大规模卫星网络。

我们提出了 SaTE，一种用于大规模卫星网络的低延迟 TE 算法，以毫秒延迟计算流量分配。 SaTE 制定异构图来模拟 TE 问题，适应动态卫星拓扑。通过消除冗余图关系，SaTE 减少了计算延迟，使图神经网络能够利用 GPU 快速推断流量分配，从而有效地学习图。 SaTE 还利用卫星网络拓扑的相似性和流量需求的地理空间分布来促进模型训练。我们通过对当今最大的卫星星座（拥有 4236 颗卫星的星链）进行广泛的数据驱动模拟来评估 SaTE。我们的结果显示，平均 TE 运行时间为 17 毫秒，满足的需求提高了 23.5%，与商业求解器相比，实现了 2738 倍的加速。

papers.title: Scalable Video Conferencing Using SDN Principles.
papers.abstract: Video-conferencing applications face an unwavering surge in traffic, stressing their underlying infrastructure in unprecedented ways. This paper rethinks the key building block for conferencing infrastructures — selective forwarding units (SFUs). SFUs relay and adapt media streams between participants and, today, run in software on general-purpose servers. Our main insight, discerned from dissecting the operation of production SFU servers, is that SFUs largely mimic traditional packet-processing operations such as dropping and forwarding. Guided by this, we present Scallop, an SDN-inspired SFU that decouples video-conferencing applications into a hardware-based data plane for latency-sensitive and frequent media operations, and a software control plane for the (infrequent) remaining tasks, such as analyzing feedback signals and session management. Scallop is a general design that is suitable for a variety of hardware platforms, including programmable switches and SmartNICs. Our Tofino-based implementation fully supports WebRTC and delivers 7-422× improved scaling over a 32-core commodity server, while reaping performance improvements by cutting forwarding-induced latency by 26×. We also present an implementation of Scallop on the BlueField-3 SmartNIC.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频会议应用程序面临着流量的持续激增，以前所未有的方式对其底层基础设施造成压力。本文重新思考了会议基础设施的关键构建模块——选择性转发单元 (SFU)。 SFU 在参与者之间中继和调整媒体流，并且如今在通用服务器上的软件中运行。通过剖析生产 SFU 服务器的操作，我们得出的主要见解是，SFU 在很大程度上模仿了传统的数据包处理操作，例如丢弃和转发。在此指导下，我们推出了 Scallop，这是一种受 SDN 启发的 SFU，它将视频会议应用程序解耦到基于硬件的数据平面中，用于对延迟敏感和频繁的媒体操作，以及用于（不频繁的）剩余任务的软件控制平面，例如分析反馈信号和会话管理。 Scallop是一种通用设计，适用于各种硬件平台，包括可编程交换机和SmartNIC。我们基于 Tofino 的实施完全支持 WebRTC，并在 32 核商用服务器上提供 7-422 倍的改进扩展，同时通过将转发引起的延迟减少 26 倍来获得性能改进。我们还展示了 BlueField-3 SmartNIC 上的 Scallop 实现。

papers.title: Scaling SCIERA: A Journey Through the Deployment of a Next-generation Network.
papers.abstract:
The SCION Next-Generation Network (NGN) architecture has expanded steadily since 2017, with today 20+ ISPs offering SCION connectivity. In production, IP-to-SCION-to-IP translation by SCION-IP-Gateways (SIGs) is used, such that applications are unaware of the NGN communication. To accelerate innovation and deployments, our aim is to increase the number of native SCION use cases, where the application is fully SCION-aware and optimizes communication across all path choices offered by the network. We set out to achieve two core objectives: (1) facilitating simple native connectivity for applications, and (2) enhancing the scalability of SCION deployment at academic sites.

With these goals in mind, we built the SCION Education, Research, and Academic (SCIERA) network infrastructure. This paper presents key lessons learned from the SCIERA deployment, which we anticipate will offer actionable insights to researchers, network operators, and system builders seeking to overcome practical challenges also for other NGN deployments. We report on establishing native SCION connectivity at research and education institutions that can reach 250,000 people across five continents, without relying on BGP. Our evaluation demonstrates that our core objectives were reached. Today, the SCIERA deployment offers tangible real-world benefits to users by providing rich global connectivity through a multitude of inter-domain paths.
papers.abstract_zh:
SCION 下一代网络 (NGN) 架构自 2017 年以来稳步扩展，目前已有 20 多家 ISP 提供 SCION 连接。在生产中，使用 SCION-IP-网关 (SIG) 进行 IP 到 SCION 到 IP 的转换，这样应用程序就不会意识到 NGN 通信。为了加速创新和部署，我们的目标是增加本机 SCION 用例的数量，其中应用程序完全支持 SCION，并优化网络提供的所有路径选择之间的通信。我们着手实现两个核心目标：(1) 促进应用程序的简单本机连接，(2) 增强 SCION 在学术场所部署的可扩展性。

考虑到这些目标，我们构建了 SCION 教育、研究和学术 (SCIERA) 网络基础设施。本文介绍了从 SCIERA 部署中吸取的重要经验教训，我们预计这些经验教训将为寻求克服其他 NGN 部署的实际挑战的研究人员、网络运营商和系统构建者提供可操作的见解。我们报告了在研究和教育机构建立本地 SCION 连接的情况，该连接可以覆盖五大洲的 250,000 人，而无需依赖 BGP。我们的评估表明我们的核心目标已经实现。如今，SCIERA 部署通过多种域间路径提供丰富的全球连接，为用户带来了切实的现实好处。

papers.title: SCX: Stateless KV-Cache Encoding for Cloud-Scale Confidential Transformer Serving.
papers.abstract: Transformer models have revolutionized fields like natural language processing and computer vision but face privacy concerns in sensitive applications such as medical diagnostics. Existing confidential serving methods, including cryptography-based, memory isolation-based, and access control-based, offer trade-offs between privacy and efficiency but often struggle with high latency or hardware dependencies. This work proposes stateless KV-cache encoding (SCX), a novel framework that encodes the intermediate key-value cache during Transformer inference using user-controlled keys. SCX ensures that the cloud can neither recover the input nor independently complete the next token prediction, effectively preserving privacy. By introducing efficient encoding and decoding schemes, SCX addresses communication complexity and attack vulnerabilities while ensuring zero loss of inference quality. Experiments on large Transformer models demonstrate that SCX achieves lower latency (e.g., 36ms for LLaMA-7B), outperforming state-of-the-art cryptography and memory isolation methods by orders of magnitude. Moreover, SCX can complementarily work with advanced KV-cache management techniques to further enhance KV-cache communication efficiency by 85%, marking a significant step toward practical, privacy-preserving large Transformer serving.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型彻底改变了自然语言处理和计算机视觉等领域，但在医疗诊断等敏感应用中面临隐私问题。现有的机密服务方法，包括基于密码学、基于内存隔离和基于访问控制的方法，在隐私和效率之间提供了权衡，但常常面临高延迟或硬件依赖性的问题。这项工作提出了无状态 KV 缓存编码（SCX），这是一种新颖的框架，可在 Transformer 推理期间使用用户控制的密钥对中间键值缓存进行编码。 SCX确保云端既不能恢复输入，也不能独立完成下一个代币预测，有效保护隐私。通过引入高效的编码和解码方案，SCX 解决了通信复杂性和攻击漏洞，同时确保推理质量零损失。对大型 Transformer 模型的实验表明，SCX 实现了较低的延迟（例如，LLaMA-7B 为 36 毫秒），其性能优于最先进的密码学和内存隔离方法几个数量级。此外，SCX可以与先进的KV-cache管理技术互补，将KV-cache通信效率进一步提高85%，标志着向实用、保护隐私的大型Transformer服务迈出了重要一步。

papers.title: SGLB: Scalable and Robust Global Load Balancing in Commodity AI Clusters.
papers.abstract: Internet companies are constructing large-scale AI clusters with commodity Ethernet switches for AI model training to support their businesses. AI training workloads impose stringent network requirements, mandating that cluster networks deliver high peak throughput while maintaining robustness and resilience in the face of link failures. We present SGLB, a distributed, global congestion-aware load balancing system for AI clusters. SGLB operates a control-plane protocol, SyncMesh, to enable a new load balancing abstraction in modern commodity switches—Global Load Balancing (GLB) engine—which utilizes global congestion information to distribute traffic across all available paths. We address three key challenges in designing SGLB: fast routing convergence to minimize downtime in the event of link failures, scalable maintenance of congestion profiles within the constraints of limited switch hardware resources, and preventing GLB throughput suppression in scenarios where path bandwidths are asymmetric. We prototype SGLB and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate SGLB. SGLB ensures rapid routing convergence in the event of link failures, recovering in as little as 45 μs to guarantee network robustness for long-term, stable model training. Additionally, SGLB effectively load-balances traffic across paths, avoiding those with global congestion, which accelerates All-to-All collective communication by up to 60%.
papers.abstract_zh: 互联网公司正在利用商用以太网交换机构建大规模人工智能集群，用于人工智能模型训练以支持其业务。人工智能训练工作负载提出了严格的网络要求，要求集群网络提供高峰值吞吐量，同时在面临链路故障时保持鲁棒性和弹性。我们推出了 SGLB，一种用于 AI 集群的分布式全局拥塞感知负载平衡系统。 SGLB 运行控制平面协议 SyncMesh，以在现代商用交换机中启用新的负载平衡抽象 - 全局负载平衡 (GLB) 引擎 - 该引擎利用全局拥塞信息在所有可用路径上分配流量。我们解决了设计 SGLB 时的三个关键挑战：快速路由收敛以最大限度地减少链路故障时的停机时间、在有限交换机硬件资源的限制下可扩展地维护拥塞配置文件，以及在路径带宽不对称的情况下防止 GLB 吞吐量抑制。我们对 SGLB 进行原型设计并进行大量实验来评估 SGLB。 SGLB保证链路故障时路由快速收敛，最快45μs恢复，保证网络的鲁棒性，实现长期稳定的模型训练。此外，SGLB 有效地对路径间的流量进行负载均衡，避免出现全局拥塞，从而将 All-to-All 集体通信速度提高高达 60%。

papers.title: SkeletonHunter: Diagnosing and Localizing Network Failures in Containerized Large Model Training.
papers.abstract:
The flexibility and portability characteristics have made containers a popular serverless environment for large model training in recent years. Unfortunately, these advantages render the network support for containerized large model training extremely challenging, due to the high dynamics of containers, the complex interplay between underlay and overlay networks, and the stringent requirements on failure detection and localization. Existing data center network debugging tools, which rely on comprehensive or opportunistic monitoring, are either inefficient or inaccurate in this setting.

This paper presents SkeletonHunter, a container network monitoring and diagnosis system that leverages the intrinsic and regular sparsity of the network traffic incurred by large model training. Its key idea is to reason about the traffic skeleton , which comprises a crucial set of network paths consistently traversed by the training traffic, so as to reliably detect and localize network failures in short time. We deployed it in production for six months, uncovering 4,816 network failures with 98.2% precision and 99.3% recall, and localizing them with a high accuracy of 95.7%. After fixing 98% problematic network components, the monthly network failure rate has significantly dropped by 99.1%.
papers.abstract_zh:
灵活性和可移植性的特点使得容器成为近年来流行的大型模型训练的无服务器环境。不幸的是，由于容器的高动态性、底层网络和覆盖网络之间复杂的相互作用以及对故障检测和定位的严格要求，这些优势使得对容器化大型模型训练的网络支持变得极具挑战性。现有的数据中心网络调试工具依赖于全面或机会性监控，在这种情况下要么效率低下，要么不准确。

本文提出了 SkeletonHunter，这是一种容器网络监控和诊断系统，它利用了大型模型训练所产生的网络流量固有的和规律的稀疏性。其关键思想是对流量骨架进行推理，流量骨架由训练流量一致遍历的一组关键网络路径组成，以便在短时间内可靠地检测和定位网络故障。我们将其部署在生产环境中六个月，以 98.2% 的准确率和 99.3% 的召回率发现了 4,816 个网络故障，并以 95.7% 的高精度进行了定位。修复98%的问题网络组件后，月网络故障率大幅下降99.1%。

papers.title: SkyNet: Analyzing Alert Flooding from Severe Network Failures in Large Cloud Infrastructures.
papers.abstract: For providers operating large-scale global networks, the timeliness of network failure recovery significantly affects the reliability of network services. Ideally, a network monitoring system should have enough coverage to detect even minor issues, but high coverage means alert floods during severe network failures. In practice, there is a gap between the flooding raw alerts data collected by network monitoring tools and the readable information needed for failure diagnosis. Existing solutions using limited network monitoring data sources and heuristic diagnostic rules, lack comprehensive coverage and the capability to address severe failures, especially which network operators have never handled a similar one before. This paper presents SkyNet, a network analysis system to extract scope and severity information from alert floods. SkyNet ensures comprehensive coverage by integrating multiple monitoring data sources through a uniform input format, enhancing extensibility for new network monitoring tools. During alert floods, SkyNet groups alerts, assesses their severity, and filters out insignificant ones to aid network operators in mitigating network failures. To date, SkyNet has been running stably on our network for one and a half years without any false negatives and has successfully reduced the time-to-mitigation for over 80% of network failures since its deployment in production.
papers.abstract_zh: 对于运营大规模全球网络的提供商来说，网络故障恢复的及时性极大地影响着网络服务的可靠性。理想情况下，网络监控系统应该有足够的覆盖范围来检测即使是很小的问题，但高覆盖范围意味着在严重的网络故障期间警报泛滥。在实践中，网络监控工具收集的泛滥原始警报数据与故障诊断所需的可读信息之间存在差距。现有的解决方案使用有限的网络监控数据源和启发式诊断规则，缺乏全面的覆盖范围和解决严重故障的能力，尤其是网络运营商以前从未处理过的类似故障。本文介绍了 SkyNet，这是一个网络分析系统，用于从警报洪水中提取范围和严重性信息。 SkyNet通过统一的输入格式集成多个监控数据源，确保全面覆盖，增强了新网络监控工具的可扩展性。在警报泛滥期间，SkyNet 对警报进行分组、评估其严重性并过滤掉不重要的警报，以帮助网络运营商减轻网络故障。迄今为止，SkyNet 已在我们的网络上稳定运行了一年半，没有出现任何误报，并成功缩短了自部署生产以来超过 80% 的网络故障的缓解时间。

papers.title: Small-scale LEO Satellite Networking for Global-scale Demands.
papers.abstract: Do we really need 10,000s of Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites to meet huge global Internet demands? While proven feasible and valuable, such LEO mega-constellation networks have raised concerns about their prohibitive capital expenditures, market monopoly, and unsustainable use of space. Instead, our analysis reveals that most of their satellites can be wasted due to their mismatch with physically uneven demands. We thus propose TinyLEO, a software-defined solution to shrink LEO network size for enormous global demands via dynamic spatiotemporal supply-demand matching. TinyLEO sparsifies satellite supplies on demand by combining diverse yet sparse orbits, hides complexities of this sparse LEO network via orbital model predictive control, and shifts the responsibility for handling these complexities to its geographic segment anycast for higher network usability, lower resource wastes, faster failovers, simpler satellites, and more flexible network orchestration. We have prototyped TinyLEO as a community toolkit for open research. Our evaluation using this toolkit shows that TinyLEO can compress the existing LEO mega-constellation network size by 2.0–7.9×, cut control plane costs by 1–3 orders of magnitude, and maintain the same demands and comparable data plane performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们真的需要数万颗低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星来满足巨大的全球互联网需求吗？虽然被证明是可行且有价值的，但这种近地轨道巨型星座网络引起了人们对其高昂的资本支出、市场垄断和不可持续的空间利用的担忧。相反，我们的分析表明，他们的大部分卫星可能由于与物理不均匀需求不匹配而被浪费。因此，我们提出了 TinyLEO，一种软件定义的解决方案，通过动态时空供需匹配来缩小 LEO 网络规模，以满足巨大的全球需求。 TinyLEO 通过组合不同但稀疏的轨道来按需稀疏卫星供应，通过轨道模型预测控制隐藏这种稀疏 LEO 网络的复杂性，并将处理这些复杂性的责任转移到其地理分段选播，以实现更高的网络可用性、更低的资源浪费、更快的故障转移、更简单的卫星和更灵活的网络编排。我们将 TinyLEO 原型化为开放研究的社区工具包。我们使用该工具包进行的评估表明，TinyLEO 可以将现有 LEO 巨型星座网络规模压缩 2.0-7.9 倍，将控制平面成本降低 1-3 个数量级，并保持相同的需求和可比较的数据平面性能。

papers.title: Software-based Live Migration for RDMA.
papers.abstract: Live migration is critical to ensure services are not interrupted during host maintenance in data centers. On the other hand, RDMA has been widely adopted in data centers, and has attracted both academia and industry for years. However, live migration of RDMA is not supported in today's data centers. Although modifying RDMA NICs (RNICs) to be aware of live migration has been proposed for years, there is no sign of supporting it on commodity RNICs. This paper proposes MigrRDMA, a software-based RDMA live migration that does not rely on any extra hardware support. MigrRDMA provides a software indirection layer to achieve transparent switching to new RDMA communications. Unlike previous RDMA virtualization that provides sharing and isolation, MigrRDMA's indirection layer focuses on keeping the RDMA states on the migration source and destination identical from the perspective of applications. We implemented MigrRDMA prototype over Mellanox RNICs. Our evaluation shows that MigrRDMA adds little downtime when migrating a container with live RDMA connections running at line rate. Besides, the MigrRDMA virtualization layer only adds 3% ~ 9% extra overheads in the data path. When migrating Hadoop tasks, MigrRDMA only incurs an extra 3-second job completion time.
papers.abstract_zh: 热迁移对于保证数据中心主机维护期间业务不中断至关重要。另一方面，RDMA已在数据中心广泛采用，多年来吸引了学术界和工业界的关注。然而，当今的数据中心不支持 RDMA 的实时迁移。尽管修改 RDMA NIC (RNIC) 以支持实时迁移的建议已存在多年，但没有迹象表明在商用 RNIC 上支持它。本文提出了MigrRDMA，一种基于软件的RDMA实时迁移，不依赖任何额外的硬件支持。 MigrRDMA 提供软件间接层以实现到新 RDMA 通信的透明切换。与之前提供共享和隔离的 RDMA 虚拟化不同，MigrRDMA 的间接层侧重于从应用程序的角度保持迁移源和目标上的 RDMA 状态相同。我们在 Mellanox RNIC 上实现了 MigrRDMA 原型。我们的评估表明，当迁移具有线速运行的实时 RDMA 连接的容器时，MigrRDMA 几乎不会增加停机时间。此外，MigrRDMA虚拟化层仅在数据路径中增加3%~9%的额外开销。迁移 Hadoop 任务时，MigrRDMA 仅额外增加 3 秒的作业完成时间。

papers.title: SpliDT: Partitioned Decision Trees for Scalable Stateful Inference at Line Rate.
papers.abstract:
Machine learning is increasingly used in programmable data planes, such as switches [4, 12, 13] and smartNICs [1, 16], to enable real-time traffic analysis and security monitoring at line rate. Decision trees (DTs) are particularly well-suited for these tasks due to their interpretability and compatibility with the Reconfigurable Match-Action Table (RMT) architecture. However, current DT implementations require collecting all features upfront, which limits scalability and accuracy due to constrained data plane resources.

This paper introduces SpliDT, a scalable framework that reimagines DT deployment as a partitioned inference problem over a sliding window of packets (Figure 1). By dividing inference into sequential subtrees—each using its own set of top-k features—SpliDT supports more stateful features without exceeding hardware limits. An in-band control channel, implemented via packet recirculation, manages transitions between subtrees and reuses match keys and registers across partitions. This design allows physical resources to be shared efficiently while maintaining line-rate processing.

To maximize accuracy and scalability, SpliDT employs a custom training and design-space-exploration (DSE) workflow that jointly optimizes feature allocation, tree depth, and partitioning. Evaluations show that SpliDT supports up to 5× more features, scales to millions of flows, and outperforms baselines, with low overhead and minimal time-to-detection (TTD).
papers.abstract_zh:
机器学习越来越多地用于可编程数据平面，例如交换机 [4, 12, 13] 和 smartNIC [1, 16]，以实现线速的实时流量分析和安全监控。决策树 (DT) 由于其可解释性以及与可重新配置匹配操作表 (RMT) 架构的兼容性，特别适合这些任务。然而，当前的 DT 实现需要预先收集所有特征，由于数据平面资源有限，这限制了可扩展性和准确性。

本文介绍了 SpliDT，这是一个可扩展的框架，它将 DT 部署重新想象为数据包滑动窗口上的分区推理问题（图 1）。通过将推理划分为顺序子树（每个子树使用自己的一组 top-k 特征），SpliDT 支持更多有状态特征，而不会超出硬件限制。通过数据包再循环实现的带内控制通道管理子树之间的转换并跨分区重用匹配密钥和寄存器。这种设计允许有效地共享物理资源，同时保持线速处理。

为了最大限度地提高准确性和可扩展性，SpliDT 采用自定义训练和设计空间探索 (DSE) 工作流程，共同优化特征分配、树深度和分区。评估表明，SpliDT 支持多达 5 倍的功能，可扩展到数百万个流，并且性能优于基线，且开销较低，检测时间 (TTD) 最短。

papers.title: StarCDN: Moving Content Delivery Networks to Space.
papers.abstract: Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite networks, such as Starlink, provide global internet access and currently serve content to millions of users. Recent work has shown that existing network infrastructures, such as Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), are not well-suited to satellite network architectures. Traditional terrestrial CDNs degrade performance for satellite network users and do not alleviate the congestion in the ground-satellite links. We design StarCDN, a new CDN architecture that caches content in space to improve user experience and reduce ground-satellite bandwidth usage. The fundamental challenge in designing StarCDN lies in the orbital motion of satellites, which causes each satellite's coverage area to change rapidly, serving vastly different regions (e.g., US and Europe) within minutes. To address this, we introduce new consistent hashing and relayed fetching schemes tailored to LEO satellite networks. Our design enables cached content to flow in the opposite direction of the orbital motion to counter satellite motion. We evaluate StarCDN against multiple baselines using real-world traces from Akamai. Our evaluation demonstrates that StarCDN can reduce the ground-to-satellite bandwidth utilization by 80% and improve user-perceived latency by 2.5X. Further, we make available an open-source trace generator, SpaceGEN, for realistic simulations of satellite-based CDNs.
papers.abstract_zh: 低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星网络（例如 Starlink）提供全球互联网接入，目前为数百万用户提供内容。最近的研究表明，现有的网络基础设施，例如内容交付网络（CDN），不太适合卫星网络架构。传统的地面 CDN 会降低卫星网络用户的性能，并且不能缓解地面卫星链路的拥塞。我们设计了 StarCDN，这是一种新的 CDN 架构，可在太空中缓存内容，以改善用户体验并减少地面卫星带宽使用。设计 StarCDN 的根本挑战在于卫星的轨道运动，这会导致每颗卫星的覆盖区域快速变化，在几分钟内为截然不同的地区（例如美国和欧洲）提供服务。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了专为 LEO 卫星网络量身定制的新的一致哈希和中继获取方案。我们的设计使缓存的内容能够沿轨道运动的相反方向流动，以对抗卫星运动。我们使用 Akamai 的真实跟踪数据，根据多个基线来评估 StarCDN。我们的评估表明，StarCDN 可以将地面到卫星的带宽利用率降低 80%，并将用户感知的延迟提高 2.5 倍。此外，我们还提供开源跟踪生成器 SpaceGEN，用于基于卫星的 CDN 的真实模拟。

papers.title: SyCCL: Exploiting Symmetry for Efficient Collective Communication Scheduling.
papers.abstract: The performance of collective communication schedules is crucial for the efficiency of machine learning jobs and GPU cluster utilization. Existing open-source collective communication libraries (such as NCCL and RCCL) rely on fixed schedules and cannot adjust to varying topology and model requirements. State-of-the-art collective schedule synthesizers (such as TECCL and TACCL) utilize Mixed Integer Linear Program for modeling but encounter search space explosion and scalability challenges. In this paper, we propose SyCCL, a scalable collective schedule synthesizer that aims to synthesize near-optimal schedules in tens of minutes for production-scale machine-learning jobs. SyCCL leverages collective and topology symmetries to decompose the original collective communication demand into smaller sub-demands within smaller topology subsets. SyCCL proposes efficient search strategies to quickly explore potential sub-demands, synthesizes corresponding sub-schedules, and integrates these sub-schedules into complete schedules. Our 32-A100 testbed and production-scale simulation experiments show that SyCCL improves collective performance by up to 127% while reducing synthesis time by 2 to 4 orders of magnitude compared to state-of-the-art efforts.
papers.abstract_zh: 集体通信调度的性能对于机器学习作业的效率和 GPU 集群的利用率至关重要。现有的开源集体通信库（例如 NCCL 和 RCCL）依赖于固定的时间表，无法适应不同的拓扑和模型要求。最先进的集体调度合成器（例如 TECCL 和 TACCL）利用混合整数线性程序进行建模，但遇到搜索空间爆炸和可扩展性挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 SyCCL，一种可扩展的集体调度合成器，旨在在数十分钟内为生产规模的机器学习作业合成接近最优的调度。 SyCCL 利用集体和拓扑对称性将原始集体通信需求分解为较小拓扑子集中的较小子需求。 SyCCL提出高效的搜索策略来快速探索潜在的子需求，合成相应的子时间表，并将这些子时间表整合成完整的时间表。我们的 32-A100 测试台和生产规模模拟实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，SyCCL 将总体性能提高了 127%，同时将合成时间缩短了 2 到 4 个数量级。

papers.title: The Sweet Danger of Sugar: Debunking Representation Learning for Encrypted Traffic Classification.
papers.abstract: Recently we have witnessed the explosion of proposals that, inspired by Language Models like BERT, exploit Representation Learning models to create traffic representations. All of them promise astonishing performance in encrypted traffic classification (up to 98% accuracy). In this paper, with a networking expert mindset, we critically reassess their performance. Through extensive analysis, we demonstrate that the reported successes are heavily influenced by data preparation problems, which allow these models to find easy shortcuts - spurious correlation between features and labels - during fine-tuning that unrealistically boost their performance. When such shortcuts are not present - as in real scenarios - these models perform poorly. We also introduce Pcap-Encoder , an LM-based representation learning model that we specifically design to extract features from protocol headers. Pcap-Encoder appears to be the only model that provides an instrumental representation for traffic classification. Yet, its complexity questions its applicability in practical settings. Our findings reveal flaws in dataset preparation and model training, calling for a better and more conscious test design. We propose a correct evaluation methodology and stress the need for rigorous benchmarking.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近，我们目睹了提案的激增，这些提案受到 BERT 等语言模型的启发，利用表示学习模型来创建流量表示。它们都承诺在加密流量分类方面具有惊人的性能（准确率高达 98%）。在本文中，我们以网络专家的心态，批判性地重新评估他们的表现。通过广泛的分析，我们证明所报告的成功很大程度上受到数据准备问题的影响，这使得这些模型在微调过程中找到了简单的捷径——特征和标签之间的虚假相关性，从而不切实际地提高了它们的性能。当不存在这样的快捷方式时（如在实际场景中），这些模型的性能会很差。我们还介绍了 Pcap-Encoder，这是一种基于 LM 的表示学习模型，我们专门设计它来从协议标头中提取特征。 Pcap-Encoder 似乎是唯一为流量分类提供工具表示的模型。然而，其复杂性质疑其在实际环境中的适用性。我们的研究结果揭示了数据集准备和模型训练方面的缺陷，需要更好、更有意识的测试设计。我们提出了正确的评估方法，并强调需要严格的基准测试。

papers.title: Threading the Ocean: Mapping Digital Routes Across Submarine Cables using Calypso.
papers.abstract: The Internet's connectivity relies on a fragile submarine cable network (SCN), yet existing tools fall short in assessing its criticality. We introduce Calypso, a new framework that leverages traceroute data to map traffic to submarine cables. Validated through real-world case studies, Calypso reveals hidden risks and offers new insights to enhancing SCN resilience.
papers.abstract_zh: 互联网的连接依赖于脆弱的海底电缆网络 (SCN)，但现有工具无法评估其重要性。我们推出了 Calypso，这是一个新框架，它利用跟踪路由数据将流量映射到海底电缆。 Calypso 通过现实案例研究进行验证，揭示了隐藏的风险，并为增强 SCN 的弹性提供了新的见解。

papers.title: TLadder: QoE-Centric Video Ladder Optimization with Playback Feedback at Billion Scale.
papers.abstract:
We operate one of the largest short video streaming platforms in the world, serving billions of global users every day. Similar to other platforms, we employ Adaptive Bitrate (ABR) streaming, which adaptively selects an appropriate representation from a group of video representations forming a bitrate ladder. In this paper, instead of developing yet another ABR algorithm, we optimize the bitrate ladder configuration, which constitutes the decision space of ABR, by developing a system called TLadder.

TLadder explicitly maximizes the quality-of-experience (QoE) that a ladder is expected to incur, through a principled optimization framework with polynomial complexity and provable optimality. TLadder's optimization jointly considers the video content dimension ( i.e. , the bitrate-quality tradeoff of candidate representations) and the playback feedback dimension ( e.g. , network condition, rebuffering time, and playback bitrate). TLadder also introduces a high-fidelity simulator that provides the optimizer with accurate QoE estimation. We evaluate TLadder via a large-scale A/B test across 0.24 billion users. TLadder achieves a 6.2–20 % reduction in rebuffering time, a 2.7–3.5 unit increase in visual quality (in an 85–100 unit range), and a 1–4 % reduction in CDN traffic cost, compared to our previous bitrate laddering approach. It also outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches based on extensive trace-driven simulation.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们运营着全球最大的短视频流媒体平台之一，每天为全球数十亿用户提供服务。与其他平台类似，我们采用自适应比特率（ABR）流媒体，它自适应地从形成比特率阶梯的一组视频表示中选择适当的表示。在本文中，我们没有开发另一种 ABR 算法，而是通过开发一个名为 TLadder 的系统来优化构成 ABR 决策空间的比特率阶梯配置。

TLadder 通过具有多项式复杂度和可证明最优性的原则性优化框架，明确最大化梯子预期产生的体验质量 (QoE)。 TLadder的优化联合考虑了视频内容维度（即候选表示的比特率质量权衡）和播放反馈维度（例如网络状况、重新缓冲时间和播放比特率）。 TLadder 还引入了高保真模拟器，为优化器提供准确的 QoE 估计。我们通过对 2.4 亿用户进行大规模 A/B 测试来评估 TLadder。与我们之前的比特率阶梯方法相比，TLadder 的重新缓冲时间减少了 6.2-20%，视觉质量提高了 2.7-3.5 个单位（在 85-100 个单位范围内），CDN 流量成本降低了 1-4%。它还优于基于广泛跟踪驱动模拟的现有最先进方法。

papers.title: Towards LLM-Based Failure Localization in Production-Scale Networks.
papers.abstract: Root causing and failure localization are critical to maintain reliability in cloud network operations. When an incident is reported, network operators must review massive volumes of monitoring data and identify the root cause ( i.e. , error device) as fast as possible, making it extremely challenging even for experienced operators. Large language models (LLMs) have shown great potential in text understanding and reasoning. In this paper, we present BiAn, an LLM-based framework designed to assist operators in efficient incident investigation. BiAn processes monitoring data and generates error device rankings with detailed explanations. To date, BiAn has been deployed in our network infrastructure for 10 months and it has successfully assisted operators in identifying error devices more quickly, reducing time to root causing by 20.5% (55.2% for high-risk incidents). Extensive performance evaluations based on 17 months of real cases further demonstrate that BiAn achieves accurate and fast failure localization. It improves accuracy by 9.2% compared to the baseline approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 根本原因和故障定位对于维持云网络运行的可靠性至关重要。当报告事件时，网络运营商必须审查大量监控数据并尽快找出根本原因（即错误设备），这使得即使对于经验丰富的运营商来说也极具挑战性。大型语言模型（LLM）在文本理解和推理方面表现出了巨大的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了 BiAn，一个基于法学硕士的框架，旨在帮助运营商进行有效的事件调查。 BiAn处理监控数据并生成错误设备排名并附有详细说明。迄今为止，BiAn 已在我们的网络基础设施中部署了 10 个月，它已成功帮助运营商更快地识别错误设备，将根源问题缩短了 20.5%（高风险事件为 55.2%）。基于17个月真实案例的广泛性能评估进一步证明BiAn实现了准确、快速的故障定位。与基线方法相比，它的准确率提高了 9.2%。

papers.title: Towards Next-Generation Global IoT: Empowering Massive Connectivity with Harmonious Multi-Network Coexistence.
papers.abstract: LoRaWAN offers a compelling solution for delivering cost-effective network access to millions of IoT devices worldwide. However, operators face challenges in scaling their services to meet the growing demands of IoT connections. Moreover, current LoRaWANs foster competition rather than cooperation among coexisting networks, resulting in substantial capacity degradation as network density increases. To identify the root causes limiting LoRaWAN scalability and to enable harmonious coexistence among network operators, this paper conducts an in-depth investigation of operational LoRaWANs. For the first time, our study reveals that the capacity degradation in LoRaWAN is not due to traditionally believed issues (such as wireless contention or interference) but rather a newly-identified decoder contention problem. This problem cannot be resolved using conventional approaches and hinders the scaled deployment of LoRaWANs as a global IoT infrastructure. Based on our new findings, we propose design principles that guide our exploration for effective strategies to address this emerging practical problem. We develop concrete deployable solutions to mitigate contention, optimize spectrum utilization, and promote spectrum sharing among network operators. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our strategies effectively boost network capacity close to the theoretical bound, and support the coexistence of up to six networks with significant improvement in spectrum efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: LoRaWAN 提供了一种引人注目的解决方案，可为全球数百万个物联网设备提供经济高效的网络访问。然而，运营商在扩展服务以满足物联网连接不断增长的需求方面面临挑战。此外，当前的 LoRaWAN 促进了共存网络之间的竞争而不是合作，导致随着网络密度的增加而导致容量大幅下降。为了找出限制 LoRaWAN 可扩展性的根本原因并实现网络运营商之间的和谐共存，本文对运营中的 LoRaWAN 进行了深入调查。我们的研究首次表明，LoRaWAN 中的容量下降并不是由于传统认为的问题（例如无线争用或干扰）造成的，而是新发现的解码器争用问题。这个问题无法使用传统方法解决，并且阻碍了 LoRaWAN 作为全球物联网基础设施的大规模部署。根据我们的新发现，我们提出了设计原则，指导我们探索有效策略来解决这一新出现的实际问题。我们开发具体的可部署解决方案，以缓解争用、优化频谱利用率并促进网络运营商之间的频谱共享。广泛的评估表明，我们的策略有效地将网络容量提升到接近理论极限，并支持多达六个网络的共存，并显着提高了频谱效率。

papers.title: Towards User-level QoE: Large-scale Practice in Personalized Optimization of Adaptive Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: Traditional optimization methods based on system-wide Quality of Service (QoS) metrics have approached their performance limitations in modern large-scale streaming systems. However, aligning user-level Quality of Experience (QoE) with algorithmic optimization objectives remains an unresolved challenge. Therefore, we propose LingXi, the first large-scale deployed system for personalized adaptive video streaming based on user-level experience. LingXi dynamically optimizes the objectives of adaptive video streaming algorithms by analyzing user engagement. Utilizing exit rate as a key metric, we investigate the correlation between QoS indicators and exit rates based on production environment logs, subsequently developing a personalized exit rate predictor. Through Monte Carlo sampling and online Bayesian optimization, we iteratively determine optimal parameters. Large-scale A/B testing utilizing 8% of traffic on Kuaishou, one of the largest short video platforms, demonstrates LingXi's superior performance. LingXi achieves a 0.15% increase in total viewing time, a 0.1% improvement in bitrate, and a 1.3% reduction in stall time across all users, with particularly significant improvements for low-bandwidth users who experience a 15% reduction in stall time.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于系统范围服务质量 (QoS) 指标的传统优化方法在现代大规模流媒体系统中已接近性能极限。然而，将用户级体验质量 (QoE) 与算法优化目标保持一致仍然是一个尚未解决的挑战。因此，我们提出了LingXi，第一个大规模部署的基于用户体验的个性化自适应视频流系统。 LingXi 通过分析用户参与度动态优化自适应视频流算法的目标。利用退出率作为关键指标，我们根据生产环境日志研究 QoS 指标和退出率之间的相关性，随后开发个性化的退出率预测器。通过蒙特卡洛采样和在线贝叶斯优化，我们迭代确定最佳参数。在最大的短视频平台之一的快手上利用8%的流量进行的大规模A/B测试，展示了灵犀的优越性能。 LingXi 使所有用户的总观看时间增加了 0.15%，比特率提高了 0.1%，卡顿时间减少了 1.3%，尤其是低带宽用户的改善尤为显着，卡顿时间减少了 15%。

papers.title: Understanding and Profiling CXL.mem Using PathFinder.
papers.abstract:
CXL.mem and the resulting memory pool are promising and gaining great attention. Unlike local memory, CXL DIMMs stay at the I/O subsystem, whose inferior performance can easily impact the processor pipeline and memory subsystem, yielding performance interference, hardware contention, obscure behaviors, and underutilized communication and computing resources. However, our community lacks a tool to understand and profile the CXL.mem protocol execution end-to-end between CPU and remote DIMM.

This paper fills the gap by designing and implementing PathFinder 1 , a systematic, informative, and lightweight CXL.mem profiler. PathFinder leverages the capabilities of existing hardware performance monitors (PMUs) and dissects the CXL.mem protocol at adequate granularities. Our key idea is to view the server processor and its chipset as a multi-stage Clos network, equip each architectural module with a PMU-based telemetry engine, track different CXL.mem paths, and apply conventional traffic analysis techniques. PathFinder performs snapshot-based path-driven profiling and introduces four techniques, i.e., path construction, stall cycle breakdown, interference analyzer, and cross-snapshot analysis. We build PathFinder atop Linux Perf and apply it to seven case studies.
papers.abstract_zh:
CXL.mem 和由此产生的内存池很有前景并受到广泛关注。与本地内存不同，CXL DIMM 位于 I/O 子系统，其较差的性能很容易影响处理器管道和内存子系统，从而产生性能干扰、硬件争用、模糊行为以及未充分利用的通信和计算资源。然而，我们的社区缺乏一种工具来理解和分析 CPU 和远程 DIMM 之间端到端的 CXL.mem 协议执行。

本文通过设计和实现 PathFinder 1 填补了这一空白，PathFinder 1 是一个系统性、信息丰富且轻量级的 CXL.mem 分析器。 PathFinder 利用现有硬件性能监视器 (PMU) 的功能，并以足够的粒度剖析 CXL.mem 协议。我们的关键思想是将服务器处理器及其芯片组视为多级 Clos 网络，为每个架构模块配备基于 PMU 的遥测引擎，跟踪不同的 CXL.mem 路径，并应用传统的流量分析技术。 PathFinder 执行基于快照的路径驱动分析，并引入了四种技术，即路径构建、失速周期分解、干扰分析器和交叉快照分析。我们在 Linux Perf 之上构建 PathFinder 并将其应用于七个案例研究。

papers.title: Unlocking Superior Performance in Reconfigurable Data Center Networks with Credit-Based Transport.
papers.abstract: The large-scale, end-to-end implementation of microsecond-switched reconfigurable data center networks (RDCNs), coupled with innovative routing and topology designs that provide continuous routes abstracting away frequent topology changes, demonstrates promise as a viable alternative to Clos networks in the post-Moore's Law era. However, the gap remains in transport performance, with current transport solutions falling short of unlocking their full performance. In this paper, we introduce Flare, a novel credit-based transport protocol that ensures reliable traffic delivery, low latency, and leverages the rapidly reconfiguring circuits of the RDCN to opportunistically route traffic over short paths, maximizing throughput. In simulations, Flare enables RDCNs to outperform Clos networks, achieving up to 1.15× higher throughput even under adversarial traffic. Additionally, it delivers up to 2× and 1.5× higher throughput than NDP and ExpressPass, and up to 10×, 15×, and 3.5× shorter flow completion time (FCT) than ExpressPass, TDTCP, and Bolt. Our testbed implementation further demonstrates the feasibility of Flare's mechanisms with programmable switches and DPDK.
papers.abstract_zh: 微秒交换可重构数据中心网络 (RDCN) 的大规模端到端实施，加上创新的路由和拓扑设计，提供连续路由，消除频繁的拓扑变化，证明了在后摩尔定律时代作为 Clos 网络的可行替代方案的前景。然而，运输性能方面仍然存在差距，当前的运输解决方案未能充分发挥其性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 Flare，一种新型的基于信用的传输协议，可确保可靠的流量传输、低延迟，并利用 RDCN 的快速重新配置电路来机会性地通过短路径路由流量，从而最大化吞吐量。在模拟中，Flare 使 RDCN 的性能优于 Clos 网络，即使在对抗流量下也能实现高达 1.15 倍的吞吐量提升。此外，它的吞吐量比 NDP 和 ExpressPass 高 2 倍和 1.5 倍，并且流完成时间 (FCT) 比 ExpressPass、TDTCP 和 Bolt 短 10 倍、15 倍和 3.5 倍。我们的测试平台实施进一步证明了 Flare 机制与可编程开关和 DPDK 的可行性。

papers.title: Wisely Optimizing Short Video Streaming for a User-Vendor Win-Win Outcome.
papers.abstract: Short video streaming platforms widely employ video prefetching to ensure users' quality of experience (QoE), but frequent user swipes lead to massive data wastage, creating a significant financial burden for vendors. Existing academic and industrial solutions fail to strike a balance, often sacrificing either data savings or the authentic user-perceived QoE. We introduce a framework that intelligently reduces streaming data consumption without compromising user experience. The core idea is to make prefetching decisions adaptive to both user swiping behavior and dynamic network conditions. Real-world evaluations show our framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art solutions on data wastage as well as user-perceived QoE.
papers.abstract_zh: 短视频流媒体平台广泛采用视频预取来保证用户的体验质量（QoE），但用户频繁的刷屏会导致大量数据浪费，给厂商带来巨大的经济负担。现有的学术和工业解决方案无法取得平衡，通常会牺牲数据节省或真实的用户感知 QoE。我们引入了一个框架，可以在不影响用户体验的情况下智能地减少流数据消耗。核心思想是使预取决策适应用户滑动行为和动态网络条件。现实世界的评估表明，我们的框架在数据浪费以及用户感知的 QoE 方面显着优于最先进的解决方案。

papers.title: ZENITH: Towards A Formally Verified Highly-Available Control Plane.
papers.abstract: Today, large-scale software-defined networks use microservice-based controllers. Bugs in these controllers can reduce network availability by making the data plane state inconsistent with the high-level intent. To recover from such inconsistencies, modern controllers periodically reconcile the state of all the switches with the desired intent. However, periodic reconciliation limits the availability and performance of the network at scale. We introduce Zenith, a microservice-based controller that avoids inconsistencies by design rather than always relying on recovery mechanisms. We have formally verified Zenith's specifications and have proved that it ensures the network state will eventually be consistent with intent. We automatically generate Zenith's code from its specification to minimize the likelihood of errors in the final implementation. Zenith's guarantees and abstractions also enable developers to independently verify SDN applications and ensure end-to-end safety and correctness. Zenith resolves inconsistencies 5× faster than today's designs and significantly improves availability.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，大规模软件定义网络使用基于微服务的控制器。这些控制器中的错误可能会导致数据平面状态与高层意图不一致，从而降低网络可用性。为了从这种不一致中恢复过来，现代控制器会定期调整所有开关的状态与所需的意图。然而，定期协调会限制大规模网络的可用性和性能。我们引入 Zenith，这是一种基于微服务的控制器，它通过设计避免不一致，而不是始终依赖恢复机制。我们已经正式验证了Zenith的规范，并证明它可以确保网络状态最终与意图一致。我们根据 Zenith 的规范自动生成代码，以最大程度地减少最终实现中出现错误的可能性。 Zenith的保证和抽象还使开发人员能够独立验证SDN应用程序并确保端到端的安全性和正确性。 Zenith 解决不一致问题的速度比当今的设计快 5 倍，并显着提高了可用性。

papers.title: ZooRoute: Enhancing Cloud-Scale Network Reliability via Overlay Proactive Rerouting.
papers.abstract: This paper presents ZooRoute , a tenant-transparent, fast failure recovery service that requires no modifications to physical devices. ZooRoute leverages the overlay layer and enables traffic flows to bypass failures by altering source ports ( srcPorts ) in packet headers during encapsulation. To enable deployment in large-scale cloud networks, ZooRoute proposes: 1) On-demand probing to efficiently monitor a vast number of hosts while minimizing telemetry costs. 2) Table compression to record the states of numerous paths with limited on-chip resources. 3) A device-sensing mechanism to prevent unnecessary reconnections in stateful forwarding. Deployed in Alibaba Cloud for 18 months, ZooRoute has significantly improved network reliability, reducing cumulative outage time by 92.71%.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 ZooRoute，这是一种对租户透明的快速故障恢复服务，无需修改物理设备。 ZooRoute 利用覆盖层，通过在封装期间更改数据包标头中的源端口 ( srcPorts ) 来使流量绕过故障。为了实现大规模云网络中的部署，ZooRoute提出：1）按需探测，以有效监控大量主机，同时最大限度地降低遥测成本。 2）表压缩，以有限的片上资源记录大量路径的状态。 3) 设备感知机制，防止有状态转发中不必要的重新连接。 ZooRoute在阿里云部署18个月，网络可靠性显着提升，累计宕机时间减少92.71%。

papers.title: A Decentralized SDN Architecture for the WAN.
papers.abstract: Motivated by our experiences operating a global WAN, we argue that SDN's reliance on infrastructure external to the data plane has substantially complicated the challenge of maintaining high availability. We propose a new decentralized SDN (dSDN) architecture in which SDN control logic instead runs within routers, eliminating the control plane's reliance on external infrastructure and restoring fate-sharing between control and data planes. We present dSDN as a simpler approach to realizing the benefits of SDN in the WAN. Despite its much simpler design, we show that dSDN is practical from an implementation viewpoint, and outperforms centralized SDN in terms of routing convergence and SLO impact.
papers.abstract_zh: 受我们运营全球 WAN 经验的启发，我们认为 SDN 对数据平面外部基础设施的依赖使维护高可用性的挑战变得更加复杂。我们提出了一种新的去中心化SDN（dSDN）架构，其中SDN控制逻辑在路由器内运行，消除了控制平面对外部基础设施的依赖，并恢复了控制平面和数据平面之间的命运共享。我们将 dSDN 作为一种在 WAN 中实现 SDN 优势的更简单方法。尽管设计简单得多，但我们表明 dSDN 从实施角度来看是实用的，并且在路由收敛和 SLO 影响方面优于集中式 SDN。

papers.title: A General and Efficient Approach to Verifying Traffic Load Properties under Arbitrary k Failures.
papers.abstract: This paper presents YU, the first verification system for checking traffic load properties under arbitrary failure scenarios that can scale to production Wide Area Networks (WANs). Building a practical YU requires us to address two challenges in terms of generality and efficiency. The state-of-the-art efforts either assume shortest-path-based forwarding ( e.g. , QARC) or only target single-failure reasoning ( e.g. , Jingubang). As a result, the former inherently cannot generalize to widely used protocols ( e.g. , SR and iBGP) that are beyond shortest-path forwarding, while the latter cannot efficiently handle arbitrary failure scenarios. For the generality challenge, we propose an approach inspired by symbolic execution, called symbolic traffic execution, to model the forwarding behavior of a range of practically deployed protocols ( e.g. , eBGP, iBGP, iGP, and SR) under failure scenarios. For the efficiency challenge, we propose diverse equivalence classification techniques ( i.e. , k-failure-equivalence and link-local-equivalence reduction) to reduce the symbolic traffic execution overhead caused by both the large size of the production WAN and the huge number of traffic flows traversing it. YU has been used in the daily verification of our WAN for several months and has successfully identified potential failure scenarios that would lead to traffic load violations.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 YU，这是第一个用于在任意故障场景下检查流量负载属性的验证系统，该系统可以扩展到生产广域网 (WAN)。建设实用型YU需要我们解决通用性和效率两个方面的挑战。最先进的工作要么假设基于最短路径的转发（例如，QARC），要么仅针对单一故障推理（例如，Jingubang）。因此，前者本质上无法推广到最短路径转发之外的广泛使用的协议（例如 SR 和 iBGP），而后者则无法有效地处理任意故障场景。针对通用性挑战，我们提出了一种受符号执行启发的方法，称为符号流量执行，对一系列实际部署的协议（例如 eBGP、iBGP、iGP 和 SR）在故障场景下的转发行为进行建模。针对效率挑战，我们提出了多种等价分类技术（即 k 故障等价和链路本地等价缩减），以减少因生产 WAN 规模大和流经其的大量流量而导致的符号流量执行开销。 YU 已用于我们 WAN 的日常验证几个月，并成功识别出可能导致流量负载违规的潜在故障场景。

papers.title: Accelerating Model Training in Multi-cluster Environments with Consumer-grade GPUs.
papers.abstract: Rapid advances in machine learning necessitate significant computing power and memory for training, which is accessible only to large corporations today. Small-scale players like academics often only have consumer-grade GPU clusters locally and can afford cloud GPU instances to a limited extent. However, training performance significantly degrades in this multi-cluster setting. In this paper, we identify unique opportunities to accelerate training and propose StellaTrain, a holistic framework that achieves near-optimal training speeds in multi-cloud environments. StellaTrain dynamically adapts a combination of acceleration techniques to minimize time-to-accuracy in model training. StellaTrain introduces novel acceleration techniques such as cache-aware gradient compression and a CPU-based sparse optimizer to maximize GPU utilization and optimize the training pipeline. With the optimized pipeline, StellaTrain holistically determines the training configurations to optimize the total training time. We show that StellaTrain achieves up to 104× speedup over PyTorch DDP in inter-cluster settings by adapting training configurations to fluctuating dynamic network bandwidth. StellaTrain demonstrates that we can cope with the scarce network bandwidth through systematic optimization, achieving up to 257.3× and 78.1× speed-ups on the network bandwidths of 100 Mbps and 500 Mbps, respectively. Finally, StellaTrain enables efficient co-training using on-premises and cloud clusters to reduce costs by 64.5% in conjunction with a reduced training time of 28.9%.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习的快速发展需要大量的计算能力和内存来进行训练，而目前只有大公司才能获得这些能力。像学术机构这样的小规模参与者通常只在本地拥有消费级 GPU 集群，并且能够在有限的范围内负担云 GPU 实例。然而，在这种多集群设置中，训练性能显着下降。在本文中，我们确定了加速训练的独特机会，并提出了 StellaTrain，这是一个在多云环境中实现接近最佳训练速度的整体框架。 StellaTrain 动态调整加速技术的组合，以最大限度地缩短模型训练的准确时间。 StellaTrain 引入了新颖的加速技术，例如缓存感知梯度压缩和基于 CPU 的稀疏优化器，以最大限度地提高 GPU 利用率并优化训练管道。通过优化的管道，StellaTrain 整体确定训练配置以优化总训练时间。我们表明，通过调整训练配置以适应波动的动态网络带宽，StellaTrain 在集群间设置中比 PyTorch DDP 实现了高达 104 倍的加速。 StellaTrain 证明，我们可以通过系统优化来应对稀缺的网络带宽，在 100 Mbps 和 500 Mbps 的网络带宽上分别实现高达 257.3 倍和 78.1 倍的提速。最后，StellaTrain 能够使用本地和云集群进行高效的协同训练，从而将成本降低 64.5%，同时将训练时间缩短 28.9%。

papers.title: Algorithms for In-Place, Consistent Network Update.
papers.abstract:
Network configurations are regularly updated in response to issues such as congestion, failures, network changes, and modifications to security policies. We present a simple distributed algorithm for network update that operates on the fly and in place , and guarantees strong route-consistency. Existing methods are either weakly consistent, or do not operate in place and require excessive memory.

We prove that our method, called a causal update , appears to take effect instantaneously at a quiescent network state, even though it is actually carried out over time and interleaved with normal network operation. This property ensures per-packet consistency: i.e., a packet is processed either entirely within the old configuration or within the new one, never by a mix of the two. The price paid for these strong guarantees is that the algorithm may be forced to occasionally drop packets for consistency. We prove that forced drops cannot be avoided: any in-place and on-the-fly update method must drop packets or violate consistency. We show how to exploit network structure and update characteristics to reduce or entirely eliminate packet drops. Simulation experiments indicate that the (temporary) loss in throughput from forced packet drops falls within acceptable limits.
papers.abstract_zh:
网络配置会定期更新，以应对拥塞、故障、网络变化和安全策略修改等问题。我们提出了一种简单的分布式网络更新算法，可以即时、就地运行，并保证强大的路由一致性。现有的方法要么是弱一致的，要么是操作不到位并且需要过多的内存。

我们证明，我们的方法（称为因果更新）似乎在静态网络状态下立即生效，尽管它实际上是随着时间的推移而执行的，并且与正常网络操作交织在一起。此属性确保每个数据包的一致性：即，数据包要么完全在旧配置中处理，要么在新配置中处理，而不是两者混合处理。这些强有力的保证所付出的代价是算法可能被迫偶尔丢弃数据包以保持一致性。我们证明强制丢弃是无法避免的：任何就地和动态更新方法都必须丢弃数据包或违反一致性。我们展示了如何利用网络结构和更新特征来减少或完全消除数据包丢失。模拟实验表明，强制丢包造成的（暂时）吞吐量损失落在可接受的限度内。

papers.title: Alibaba HPN: A Data Center Network for Large Language Model Training.
papers.abstract: This paper presents HPN, Alibaba Cloud's data center network for large language model (LLM) training. Due to the differences between LLMs and general cloud computing ( e.g. , in terms of traffic patterns and fault tolerance), traditional data center networks are not well-suited for LLM training. LLM training produces a small number of periodic, bursty flows ( e.g. , 400Gbps) on each host.
