This characteristic of LLM training predisposes Equal-Cost Multi-Path (ECMP) to hash polarization, causing issues such as uneven traffic distribution. HPN introduces a 2-tier, dual-plane architecture capable of interconnecting 15K GPUs within one Pod, typically accommodated by the traditional 3-tier Clos architecture. Such a new architecture design not only avoids hash polarization but also greatly reduces the search space for path selection. Another challenge in LLM training is that its requirement for GPUs to complete iterations in synchronization makes it more sensitive to singlepoint failure (typically occurring on ToR). HPN proposes a new dual-ToR design to replace the single-ToR in traditional data center networks. HPN has been deployed in our production for more than eight months. We share our experience in designing, and building HPN, as well as the operational lessons of HPN in production.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍 HPN，阿里云用于大语言模型 (LLM) 训练的数据中心网络。由于LLM和一般云计算之间的差异（例如，在流量模式和容错方面），传统的数据中心网络不太适合LLM训练。 LLM 训练在每个主机上产生少量周期性突发流（例如 400Gbps）。 LLM训练的这一特性使等价多路径（ECMP）容易出现哈希极化，从而导致流量分布不均匀等问题。 HPN 引入了一种 2 层双平面架构，能够在一个 Pod 内互连 15K GPU，通常由传统的 3 层 Clos 架构容纳。这种新的架构设计不仅避免了哈希极化，而且大大减少了路径选择的搜索空间。 LLM 训练的另一个挑战是它要求 GPU 同步完成迭代，这使得它对单点故障（通常发生在 ToR 上）更加敏感。 HPN提出了一种新的双ToR设计来取代传统数据中心网络中的单ToR。 HPN 已在我们的生产中部署了八个多月。我们分享设计和构建 HPN 的经验，以及 HPN 在生产中的操作经验。

papers.title: An Architecture For Edge Networking Services.
papers.abstract: The layered Internet architecture, while far from perfect, has provided a global and neutral platform for the development of a wide range of applications. However, this core architecture has been increasingly augmented with additional in-network functionality that improves the performance, security, and privacy of these applications. These additional in-network functions, which are typically implemented at the network edge, are consistent with the layering of the Internet architecture but deviate from two of the core tenets of the Internet: interconnection and end-to-end simplicity. In this paper, we propose an architecture for these edge networking services called the InterEdge that applies these two Internet tenets in a manner appropriate to edge services while not requiring changes to the underlying Internet architecture or infrastructure.
papers.abstract_zh: 分层的互联网架构虽然远非完美，但为各种应用程序的开发提供了一个全球性的、中立的平台。然而，这个核心架构已经越来越多地通过额外的网络内功能进行增强，从而提高了这些应用程序的性能、安全性和隐私性。这些额外的网内功能通常在网络边缘实现，与互联网架构的分层一致，但偏离了互联网的两个核心原则：互连和端到端简单性。在本文中，我们为这些边缘网络服务提出了一种称为 InterEdge 的架构，该架构以适合边缘服务的方式应用这两个互联网原则，同时不需要更改底层互联网架构或基础设施。

papers.title: An exabyte a day: throughput-oriented, large scale, managed data transfers with Effingo.
papers.abstract: WAN bandwidth is never too broad --- and the speed of light stubbornly constant. These two fundamental constraints force globally-distributed systems to carefully replicate data close to where they are processed or served. A large organization owning such systems adds dimensions of complexity with ever-changing network topologies, strict requirements on failure domains, multiple competing transfers, and layers of software and hardware with multiple kinds of quotas. We present Effingo, a throughput-oriented, massively-parallel data copy service we built at Google. For its users, Effingo delivers high-throughput transfers with an scp-like interface. For Google, Effingo optimizes the network cost with a small footprint on datacenters. We experimentally show how Effingo achieves fairness and efficiency through copy tree optimization and dynamic adaptation to changing network conditions. On a typical day, Effingo transfers over an exabyte of data between dozens of clusters spread across continents and serves more than 10,000 users.
papers.abstract_zh: 广域网带宽永远不会太宽——而且光速始终保持恒定。这两个基本限制迫使全球分布式系统小心地将数据复制到靠近数据处理或服务的位置。拥有此类系统的大型组织会因不断变化的网络拓扑、对故障域的严格要求、多个竞争传输以及具有多种配额的软件和硬件层而增加复杂性。我们推出 Effingo，这是我们在 Google 构建的一种面向吞吐量的大规模并行数据复制服务。对于用户来说，Effingo 通过类似 scp 的界面提供高吞吐量传输。对于 Google 来说，Effingo 优化了网络成本，并且在数据中心上占用空间很小。我们通过实验展示了 Effingo 如何通过复制树优化和动态适应不断变化的网络条件来实现公平性和效率。在典型的一天中，Effingo 在分布于各大洲的数十个集群之间传输超过 EB 的数据，并为 10,000 多名用户提供服务。

papers.title: Bad Packets Come Back, Worse Ones Don't.
papers.abstract:
ISPs may notice that traffic from certain sources is entering their network at an unexpected location, but it is hard to know if this represents a problem or is just normal spoofed background noise. If such traffic is not spoofed, it would be useful to generate alerts, but alerting on background noise is not useful.

We describe Penny, a test ISPs can run to tell unspoofed traffic aggregates arriving on the wrong port from spoofed ones. The idea is simple: when receiving new traffic at unexpected routers, drop a few TCP packets. Non-spoofed TCP packets ("bad packets") will be retransmitted while spoofed ones ("worse packets") will not. However, building a robust test on top of this simple idea is subtle. We show how to deal with conflicting goals: minimizing performance degradation for legitimate flows, dealing with external conditions such as path changes and remote packet loss, and ensuring robustness against spoofers trying to evade our test.
papers.abstract_zh:
ISP 可能会注意到来自某些来源的流量正在意外位置进入其网络，但很难知道这是否代表问题或只是正常的欺骗性背景噪音。如果此类流量未被欺骗，则生成警报将很有用，但针对背景噪音发出警报是没有用的。

我们描述了 Penny，这是 ISP 可以运行的一个测试，可以区分到达错误端口的未欺骗流量聚合和欺骗流量聚合。这个想法很简单：当在意外的路由器上接收到新流量时，丢弃一些 TCP 数据包。非欺骗性 TCP 数据包（“坏数据包”）将被重新传输，而欺骗性 TCP 数据包（“更糟糕的数据包”）则不会。然而，在这个简单的想法之上构建一个强大的测试是很微妙的。我们展示了如何处理相互冲突的目标：最大限度地减少合法流的性能下降，处理路径更改和远程数据包丢失等外部条件，并确保针对试图逃避我们测试的欺骗者的鲁棒性。

papers.title: CacheGen: KV Cache Compression and Streaming for Fast Large Language Model Serving.
papers.abstract:
As large language models (LLMs) take on complex tasks, their inputs are supplemented with longer contexts that incorporate domain knowledge. Yet using long contexts is challenging as nothing can be generated until the whole context is processed by the LLM. While the context-processing delay can be reduced by reusing the KV cache of a context across different inputs, fetching the KV cache, which contains large tensors, over the network can cause high extra network delays.

CacheGen is a fast context-loading module for LLM systems. First, CacheGen uses a custom tensor encoder, leveraging KV cache's distributional properties to encode a KV cache into more compact bitstream representations with negligible decoding overhead, to save bandwidth usage. Second, CacheGen adapts the compression level of different parts of a KV cache to cope with changes in available bandwidth, in order to maintain low context-loading delay and high generation quality. We test CacheGen on popular LLMs and datasets. Compared to the recent systems that reuse the KV cache, CacheGen reduces the KV cache size by 3.5--4.3x and the total delay in fetching and processing contexts by 3.2--3.7x with negligible impact on the LLM response quality. Our code is at: https://github.com/UChi-JCL/CacheGen.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 承担复杂的任务，它们的输入会得到包含领域知识的较长上下文的补充。然而，使用长上下文具有挑战性，因为在法学硕士处理整个上下文之前，无法生成任何内容。虽然可以通过在不同输入之间重用上下文的 KV 缓存来减少上下文处理延迟，但通过网络获取包含大张量的 KV 缓存可能会导致较高的额外网络延迟。

CacheGen 是 LLM 系统的快速上下文加载模块。首先，CacheGen 使用自定义张量编码器，利用 KV 缓存的分布式属性将 KV 缓存编码为更紧凑的比特流表示形式，解码开销可以忽略不计，以节省带宽使用。其次，CacheGen 会调整 KV 缓存不同部分的压缩级别来应对可用带宽的变化，以保持低上下文加载延迟和高生成质量。我们在流行的法学硕士和数据集上测试 CacheGen。与最近重用 KV 缓存的系统相比，CacheGen 将 KV 缓存大小减少了 3.5--4.3 倍，将获取和处理上下文的总延迟减少了 3.2--3.7 倍，对 LLM 响应质量的影响可以忽略不计。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/UCi-JCL/CacheGen。

papers.title: Canal Mesh: A Cloud-Scale Sidecar-Free Multi-Tenant Service Mesh Architecture.
papers.abstract:
In recent years, service mesh frameworks have gained significant popularity in building microservice-based applications. A key component of these frameworks is a proxy in each K8s pod, named sidecar, which handles inter-pod traffic. Our empirical measurement reveals that such per-pod sidecars cause numerous problems, including intrusion into the user pod, excessive resource occupation, significant overhead in managing many sidecars, and performance degradation caused by passing traffic through the sidecar.

In this paper, we introduce Canal Mesh , a cloud-scale sidecar-free multi-tenant service mesh architecture. Canal decouples service mesh functions from the user cluster and deploys a centralized mesh gateway in the public cloud to handle these functions, thus reducing user intrusion and orchestration overhead. Through service consolidation and multi-tenancy, the infra costs of service mesh are also reduced. To address the rising issues due to cloud-based deployment, such as service availability, tenant isolation, noisy neighbor, service elasticity, and additional infra costs, we leverage techniques including hierarchical failure recovery, shuffle sharding, rapid intervention, precise scaling, cloud infra reuse and resource aggregation, etc. Our evaluation shows that Canal Mesh's performance, resource consumption, and control plane overhead are significantly better than Istio and Ambient. We also share experiences from years of deploying Istio and Canal in production.
papers.abstract_zh:
近年来，服务网格框架在构建基于微服务的应用程序中获得了广泛的欢迎。这些框架的一个关键组件是每个 K8s pod 中的代理，名为 sidecar，用于处理 pod 间的流量。我们的经验测量表明，这种 per-pod sidecar 会导致许多问题，包括入侵用户 pod、过度占用资源、管理许多 sidecar 的巨大开销以及通过 sidecar 传递流量导致的性能下降。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Canal Mesh，这是一种云规模的无 sidecar 多租户服务网格架构。 Canal 将服务网格功能与用户集群解耦，并在公有云中部署集中式网格网关来处理这些功能，从而减少用户入侵和编排开销。通过服务整合和多租户，服务网格的基础设施成本也降低了。为了解决云部署带来的服务可用性、租户隔离、嘈杂邻居、服务弹性和额外基础设施成本等问题，我们采用了分层故障恢复、洗牌分片、快速干预、精确扩展、云基础设施复用和资源聚合等技术。我们的评估表明，Canal Mesh 的性能、资源消耗和控制平面开销明显优于 Istio 和 Ambient。我们还分享了多年来在生产中部署 Istio 和 Canal 的经验。

papers.title: CCAnalyzer: An Efficient and Nearly-Passive Congestion Control Classifier.
papers.abstract: We present CCAnalyzer, a novel classifier for deployed Internet congestion control algorithms (CCAs) which is more accurate, more generalizable, and more human-interpretable than prior classifiers. CCAnalyzer requires no knowledge of the underlying CCA algorithms, and it can identify when a CCA is novel - i.e. not in the training set. Furthermore, CCAnalyzer can cluster together servers it believes use the same novel/unknown algorithm. CCAnalyzer correctly identifies all 15 of the default Internet CCAs deployed with Linux, including BBRv1, which no existing classifier can do. Finally, CCAnalyzer can classify server CCAs while being as efficient or better than prior approaches in terms of bytes transferred and runtime. We conduct a measurement study using CCAnalyzer measuring the CCA for 5000+ websites. We find widespread deployment of BBRv1 at large CDNs, and demonstrate how our clustering technique can detect deployments of new algorithms as it discovers BBRv3 although BBRv3 is not in its training set.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CCAnalyzer，这是一种用于部署互联网拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 的新型分类器，它比以前的分类器更准确、更通用、更易于人类解释。 CCAnalyzer 不需要了解底层 CCA 算法，并且它可以识别 CCA 何时是新颖的 - 即不在训练集中。此外，CCAnalyzer 可以将它认为使用相同新颖/未知算法的服务器聚集在一起。 CCAnalyzer 正确识别了 Linux 部署的所有 15 个默认 Internet CCA，包括 BBRv1，这是现有分类器无法做到的。最后，CCAnalyzer 可以对服务器 CCA 进行分类，同时在传输字节数和运行时间方面与以前的方法一样高效甚至更好。我们使用 CCAnalyzer 进行了一项测量研究，测量了 5000 多个网站的 CCA。我们发现 BBRv1 在大型 CDN 中广泛部署，并演示了我们的集群技术如何在发现 BBRv3 时检测新算法的部署，尽管 BBRv3 不在其训练集中。

papers.title: ConfMask: Enabling Privacy-Preserving Configuration Sharing via Anonymization.
papers.abstract: Real-world network configurations play a critical role in network management and research tasks. While valuable, data holders often hesitate to share them due to business and privacy concerns. Existing methods are deficient in concealing the implicit information that can be inferred from configurations, such as topology and routing paths. To address this, we present ConfMask, a novel framework designed to systematically anonymize network topology and routing paths in configurations. Our approach tackles key privacy, utility, and scalability challenges, which arise from the strong dependency between different datasets and complex routing protocols. Our anonymization algorithm is scalable to large networks and effectively mitigates de-anonymization risk. Moreover, it maintains essential network properties such as reachability, waypointing and multi-path consistency, making it suitable for a wide range of downstream tasks. Compared to existing dataplane anonymization algorithm (i.e., NetHide), ConfMask reduces ~75% specification differences between the original and the anonymized networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 现实世界的网络配置在网络管理和研究任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然数据很有价值，但出于商业和隐私方面的考虑，数据持有者常常犹豫是否共享它们。现有方法不足以隐藏可以从配置推断出的隐式信息，例如拓扑和路由路径。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ConfMask，这是一种新颖的框架，旨在系统地匿名化配置中的网络拓扑和路由路径。我们的方法解决了关键的隐私、实用性和可扩展性挑战，这些挑战是由不同数据集和复杂路由协议之间的强烈依赖性引起的。我们的匿名算法可扩展到大型网络，并有效降低去匿名化风险。此外，它还保持了基本的网络属性，例如可达性、路径指向和多路径一致性，使其适用于广泛的下游任务。与现有的数据平面匿名算法（即 NetHide）相比，ConfMask 减少了原始网络和匿名网络之间约 75% 的规范差异。

papers.title: Crux: GPU-Efficient Communication Scheduling for Deep Learning Training.
papers.abstract: Deep learning training (DLT), e.g. , large language model (LLM) training, has become one of the most important services in multitenant cloud computing. By deeply studying in-production DLT jobs, we observed that communication contention among different DLT jobs seriously influences the overall GPU computation utilization, resulting in the low efficiency of the training cluster. In this paper, we present Crux, a communication scheduler that aims to maximize GPU computation utilization by mitigating the communication contention among DLT jobs. Maximizing GPU computation utilization for DLT, nevertheless, is NP-Complete; thus, we formulate and prove a novel theorem to approach this goal by GPU intensity -aware communication scheduling. Then, we propose an approach that prioritizes the DLT flows with high GPU computation intensity, reducing potential communication contention. Our 96-GPU testbed experiments show that Crux improves 8.3% to 14.8% GPU computation utilization. The large-scale production trace-based simulation further shows that Crux increases GPU computation utilization by up to 23% compared with alternatives including Sincronia, TACCL, and CASSINI.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习训练（DLT），例如大语言模型（LLM）训练，已经成为多租户云计算中最重要的服务之一。通过深入研究生产中的 DLT 作业，我们发现不同 DLT 作业之间的通信竞争严重影响整体 GPU 计算利用率，导致训练集群效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 Crux，一种通信调度程序，旨在通过减轻 DLT 作业之间的通信争用来最大化 GPU 计算利用率。然而，最大化 DLT 的 GPU 计算利用率是 NP 完全的；因此，我们制定并证明了一个新颖的定理，通过 GPU 强度感知的通信调度来实现这一目标。然后，我们提出了一种方法，优先考虑具有高 GPU 计算强度的 DLT 流，从而减少潜在的通信争用。我们的 96-GPU 测试台实验表明，Crux 将 GPU 计算利用率提高了 8.3% 至 14.8%。基于大规模生产跟踪的模拟进一步表明，与 Sincronia、TACCL 和 CASSINI 等替代方案相比，Crux 将 GPU 计算利用率提高了 23%。

papers.title: dAuth: A Resilient Authentication Architecture for Federated Private Cellular Networks.
papers.abstract: We present dAuth, an approach to device authentication in private cellular networks which refactors the responsibilities of authentication to enable multiple small private cellular networks to federate together to provide a more reliable and resilient service than could be achieved on their own. dAuth is designed to be backwards compatible with off-the-shelf 4G and 5G cellular devices and can be incrementally deployed today. It uses cryptographic secret sharing and a division of concerns between sensitive data stored with backup networks and non-sensitive public directory data to securely scale authentication across multiple redundant nodes operating among different and untrusted organizations. Specifically, it allows a collection of pre-configured backup networks to authenticate users on behalf of their home network while the home network is unavailable. We evaluate dAuth's performance with production equipment from an active federated community network, finding that it is able to work with existing systems. We follow this with an evaluation using a simulated 5G RAN and find that it performs comparably to a standalone cloud-based 5G core at low load, and outperforms a centralized core at high load due to its innate load-sharing properties.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 dAuth，一种专用蜂窝网络中的设备身份验证方法，它重构了身份验证的职责，使多个小型专用蜂窝网络能够联合在一起，提供比单独使用更可靠、更有弹性的服务。 dAuth 旨在向后兼容现成的 4G 和 5G 蜂窝设备，并且现在可以增量部署。它使用加密秘密共享以及备份网络存储的敏感数据和非敏感公共目录数据之间的关注点划分，跨不同且不受信任的组织之间运行的多个冗余节点安全地扩展身份验证。具体来说，它允许一组预配置的备份网络在家庭网络不可用时代表其家庭网络对用户进行身份验证。我们使用活跃的联合社区网络的生产设备评估 dAuth 的性能，发现它能够与现有系统配合使用。我们随后使用模拟 5G RAN 进行了评估，发现它在低负载下的性能与独立的基于云的 5G 核心相当，并且由于其固有的负载共享属性，在高负载下的性能优于集中式核心。

papers.title: Dissecting Carrier Aggregation in 5G Networks: Measurement, QoE Implications and Prediction.
papers.abstract: By aggregating multiple channels, Carrier Aggregation (CA) is an important technology for boosting cellular network bandwidth. Given diverse radio bands made available in 5G networks, CA plays a particularly critical role in achieving the goal of multi-Gbps throughput performance. In this paper, we carry out a timely comprehensive measurement study of CA deployment in commercial 5G networks (as well as 4G networks). We identify the key factors that influence whether CA is deployed and when, as well as which band combinations are used. Thus, we reveal the challenges posed by CA in 5G performance analysis and prediction as well as their implications in application quality-of-experience (QoE). We argue for and develop a novel CA-aware deep learning framework, dubbed Prism5G , which explicitly accounts for the complexity introduced by CA to more effectively predict 5G network throughput performance. Through extensive evaluations, we demonstrate the superiority of Prism5G over existing throughput prediction algorithms. Prism5G improves 5G throughput prediction accuracy by over 14% on average and a maximum of 22%. Using two use cases as examples, we further illustrate how Prism5G can aid applications in optimizing QoE performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过聚合多个信道，载波聚合（CA）是提高蜂窝网络带宽的重要技术。鉴于 5G 网络中提供了多种无线电频段，CA 在实现多 Gbps 吞吐量性能目标方面发挥着特别关键的作用。在本文中，我们对商用5G网络（以及4G网络）中的CA部署进行了及时的综合测量研究。我们确定了影响是否部署 CA、何时部署以及使用哪些频段组合的关键因素。因此，我们揭示了 CA 在 5G 性能分析和预测中带来的挑战及其对应用体验质量 (QoE) 的影响。我们主张并开发一种新颖的 CA 感知深度学习框架，称为 Prism5G，它明确考虑了 CA 引入的复杂性，以更有效地预测 5G 网络吞吐量性能。通过广泛的评估，我们证明了 Prism5G 相对于现有吞吐量预测算法的优越性。 Prism5G 将 5G 吞吐量预测精度平均提高超过 14%，最高提高 22%。我们以两个用例为例，进一步说明 Prism5G 如何帮助应用程序优化 QoE 性能。

papers.title: Eagle: Toward Scalable and Near-Optimal Network-Wide Sketch Deployment in Network Measurement.
papers.abstract: Sketches are useful for network measurement thanks to their low resource overheads and theoretically bounded accuracy. However, their network-wide deployment suffers from the trade-off between optimality and scalability: (1) Most solutions rely on mixed integer linear programming (MILP) solvers to provide the optimal decisions. But they are time-consuming and can hardly scale to large-scale deployment scenarios. (2) While heuristics achieve scalability, they deteriorate resource and performance overheads. We propose Eagle, a framework that achieves scalable and near-optimal network-wide sketch deployment. Our key idea is to decompose network-wide sketch deployment into sub-problems. Such decomposition allows Eagle to (1) simultaneously optimize switch resource consumption and end-to-end performance (retaining optimality), and (2) incorporate time-saving techniques into sub-problem solving (achieving scalability). Compared to existing solutions, Eagle improves scalability by up to 255× with negligible loss of optimality. It has also saved administrators in a production network days of efforts and reduced the operation time from O (hour) to O (second).
papers.abstract_zh: 草图对于网络测量非常有用，因为它们的资源开销较低且理论上有一定的精度。然而，它们的网络范围部署面临着最优性和可扩展性之间的权衡：（1）大多数解决方案依赖混合整数线性规划（MILP）求解器来提供最优决策。但它们非常耗时，并且很难扩展到大规模部署场景。 (2) 虽然启发式方法实现了可扩展性，但它们会恶化资源和性能开销。我们提出了 Eagle，这是一个实现可扩展且近乎最佳的网络范围草图部署的框架。我们的关键思想是将网络范围的草图部署分解为子问题。这种分解使 Eagle 能够 (1) 同时优化交换机资源消耗和端到端性能（保持最优性），以及 (2) 将节省时间的技术纳入子问题解决中（实现可扩展性）。与现有解决方案相比，Eagle 将可扩展性提高了 255 倍，而最优性的损失可以忽略不计。它还为生产网络中的管理员节省了几天的精力，并将操作时间从O（小时）缩短到O（秒）。

papers.title: Efficient Policy-Rich Rate Enforcement with Phantom Queues.
papers.abstract: ISPs routinely rate-limit user traffic. In addition to correctly enforcing the desired rates, rate-limiting mechanisms must be able to support rich rate-sharing policies within each traffic aggregate (e.g. per-flow fairness, weighted fairness, and prioritization). This must be done at scale to support the vast magnitude of users efficiently. There are two primary rate-limiting mechanisms - traffic shaping (that buffers packets in queues to enforce the desired rates and policies) and traffic policing (that filters packets as per the desired rates without buffering them). Policers are lightweight and scalable but don't support rich policy enforcement and often provide poor rate enforcement (being notoriously hard to configure). Shapers, on the other hand, achieve desired rates and policies, but at the cost of high system resource (memory and CPU) utilization impacting scalability. This paper explores whether we can get the best of both worlds. We present our system BC-PQP, which augments a policer with (i) multiple phantom queues that simulate buffer occupancy using counters and enable rich policy enforcement, and (ii) a novel burst-control mechanism that enables auto-configuration of the queues for correct rate enforcement. Our system achieves the rate and policy enforcement properties close to that of a shaper with 7× higher efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: ISP 通常会对用户流量进行速率限制。除了正确执行所需的速率之外，速率限制机制还必须能够支持每个流量聚合内丰富的速率共享策略（例如每流公平性、加权公平性和优先级）。这必须大规模地完成，以有效地支持大量用户。有两种主要的速率限制机制 - 流量整形（在队列中缓冲数据包以强制执行所需的速率和策略）和流量监管（根据所需的速率过滤数据包而不缓冲它们）。监管器是轻量级且可扩展的，但不支持丰富的策略执行，并且通常提供较差的速率执行（众所周知，很难配置）。另一方面，Shapers 可以实现所需的速率和策略，但代价是系统资源（内存和 CPU）利用率较高，从而影响可扩展性。本文探讨了我们是否可以两全其美。我们提出了我们的系统 BC-PQP，它通过以下方式增强了监管器：(i) 多个虚拟队列，使用计数器模拟缓冲区占用情况并实现丰富的策略执行；(ii) 一种新颖的突发控制机制，可以自动配置队列以实现正确的速率执行。我们的系统的速率和策略执行特性接近整形器，但效率提高了 7 倍。

papers.title: Expresso: Comprehensively Reasoning About External Routes Using Symbolic Simulation.
papers.abstract: Existing network verifiers can efficiently identify failure-induced bugs. However, an equally-important concern is identification of external-routes-induced bugs, which has not been well addressed. Comprehensively reasoning about external routes is challenging, since each external neighbor can advertise an arbitrary set of routes, which is quite a huge space. This paper introduces a new network verifier, Expresso, which uses symbolic simulation to explore the equivalences in the space of external routes. We evaluate the effectiveness and scalability of Expresso on the WAN of a large cloud service provider and Internet2. Expresso found various property violations, some of which have already been confirmed by the operators. To the best of our knowledge, Expresso is the only verifier that can check the correctness of WANs amidst arbitrary external routes in a tractable amount of time, while other verifiers time-out after 1 day.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的网络验证器可以有效地识别故障引起的错误。然而，一个同样重要的问题是外部路由引起的错误的识别，该问题尚未得到很好的解决。全面推理外部路由具有挑战性，因为每个外部邻居可以通告任意一组路由，这是一个相当巨大的空间。本文介绍了一种新的网络验证器 Expresso，它使用符号模拟来探索外部路由空间中的等价性。我们评估 Expresso 在大型云服务提供商的 WAN 和 Internet2 上的有效性和可扩展性。 Expresso 发现了各种侵犯财产的行为，其中一些已经得到运营商的确认。据我们所知，Expresso 是唯一一个能够在易于处理的时间内检查任意外部路由中 WAN 正确性的验证器，而其他验证器则在 1 天后超时。

papers.title: Fast, Scalable, and Accurate Rate Limiter for RDMA NICs.
papers.abstract: RDMA NICs desire a rate limiter that is accurate, scalable, and fast: to precisely enforce the policies such as congestion control and traffic isolation, to support a large number of flows, and to sustain high packet rates. Prior works such as SENIC and PIEO can achieve accuracy and scalability, but they are not fast enough, thus fail to fulfill the performance requirement of RNICs, due primarily to their monolithic design and one-packet-per-sorting transmission. We present Tassel, a hierarchical rate limiter for RDMA NICs that can deliver high packet rates by enabling multiple-packet-per-sorting transmission, while preserving accuracy and scalability. At its heart, Tassel renovates the workflow of the rate limiter hierarchically: by first applying scalable rate limiting to the flows to be scheduled, followed by accurate rate limiting to the packets to be transmitted, while leveraging adaptive batching and packet filtering to improve the performance of these two steps. We integrate Tassel into the RNIC architecture by replacing the original QP scheduler module and implement the prototype of Tassel using FPGA. Experimental results show that Tassel delivers 125 Mpps packet rate, outperforming SENIC and PIEO by 3.6×, while supporting 16 K flows with low resource usage, 7.5% - 25.6% as compared to SENIC and PIEO, and preserving high accuracy, precisely enforcing rate limits from 100 Kbps to 100 Gbps.
papers.abstract_zh: RDMA NIC 需要一个准确、可扩展且快速的速率限制器：精确执行拥塞控制和流量隔离等策略，支持大量流并维持高数据包速率。诸如SENIC和PIEO之类的先前工作可以实现准确性和可扩展性，但它们的速度不够快，因此无法满足RNIC的性能要求，这主要是由于它们的单片设计和每次排序一个数据包的传输。我们推出了 Tassel，这是一种用于 RDMA NIC 的分层速率限制器，它可以通过启用每个排序多个数据包传输来提供高数据包速率，同时保持准确性和可扩展性。从本质上讲，Tassel 分层革新了速率限制器的工作流程：首先对要调度的流应用可扩展的速率限制，然后对要传输的数据包进行精确的速率限制，同时利用自适应批处理和数据包过滤来提高这两个步骤的性能。我们通过替换原有的QP调度器模块将Tassel集成到RNIC架构中，并使用FPGA实现了Tassel的原型。实验结果表明，Tassel 可提供 125 Mpps 的数据包速率，性能优于 SENIC 和 PIEO 3.6 倍，同时支持 16 K 流，资源占用率低，与 SENIC 和 PIEO 相比为 7.5% - 25.6%，并保持高精度，精确执行从 100 Kbps 到 100 Gbps 的速率限制。

papers.title: FIGRET: Fine-Grained Robustness-Enhanced Traffic Engineering.
papers.abstract: Traffic Engineering (TE) is critical for improving network performance and reliability. A key challenge in TE is the management of sudden traffic bursts. Existing TE schemes either do not handle traffic bursts or uniformly guard against traffic bursts, thereby facing difficulties in achieving a balance between normal-case performance and burst-case performance. To address this issue, we introduce FIGRET, a Fine-Grained Robustness-Enhanced TE scheme. FIGRET offers a novel approach to TE by providing varying levels of robustness enhancements, customized according to the distinct traffic characteristics of various source-destination pairs. By leveraging a burst-aware loss function and deep learning techniques, FIGRET is capable of generating high-quality TE solutions efficiently. Our evaluations of real-world production networks, including Wide Area Networks and data centers, demonstrate that FIGRET significantly outperforms existing TE schemes. Compared to the TE scheme currently deployed in Google's Jupiter data center networks, FIGRET achieves a 9%-34% reduction in average Maximum Link Utilization and improves solution speed by 35×-1800×. Against DOTE, a state-of-the-art deep learning-based TE method, FIGRET substantially lowers the occurrence of significant congestion events triggered by traffic bursts by 41%-53.9% in topologies with high traffic dynamics.
papers.abstract_zh: 流量工程 (TE) 对于提高网络性能和可靠性至关重要。 TE 的一个关键挑战是突发流量突发的管理。现有的TE方案要么不处理流量突发，要么统一防范流量突发，因此难以在正常情况下的性能和突发情况下的性能之间取得平衡。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了FIRET，一种细粒度鲁棒性增强的TE方案。 Figret 提供了一种新颖的 TE 方法，提供不同级别的鲁棒性增强，并根据各种源-目的地对的不同流量特征进行定制。通过利用突发感知损失函数和深度学习技术，FIRET 能够高效生成高质量的 TE 解决方案。我们对现实世界生产网络（包括广域网和数据中心）的评估表明，FIRET 显着优于现有的 TE 方案。与目前谷歌Jupiter数据中心网络中部署的TE方案相比，FIRET实现了平均最大链路利用率降低9%-34%，求解速度提高35×-1800×。与最先进的基于深度学习的 TE 方法 DOTE 相比，FIRET 在高流量动态拓扑中将流量突发触发的严重拥塞事件的发生率大幅降低了 41%-53.9%。

papers.title: In-Network Address Caching for Virtual Networks.
papers.abstract:
Packet routing in virtual networks requires virtual-to-physical address translation. The address mappings are updated by a single party, i.e., the network administrator, but they are read by multiple devices across the network when routing tenant packets. Existing approaches face an inherent read-write performance tradeoff: they either store these mappings in dedicated gateways for fast updates at the cost of slower forwarding or replicate them at end-hosts and suffer from slow updates.

SwitchV2P aims to escape this tradeoff by leveraging the network switches to transparently cache the address mappings while learning them from the traffic. SwitchV2P brings the mappings closer to the sender, thus reducing the first packet latency and translation overheads, while simultaneously enabling fast mapping updates, all without changing existing routing policies and deployed gateways. The topology-aware data-plane caching protocol allows the switches to transparently adapt to changing network conditions and varying in-switch memory capacity.

Our evaluation shows the benefits of in-network address mapping, including an up to 7.8× and 4.3× reduction in FCT and first packet latency respectively, and a substantial reduction in translation gateway load. Additionally, SwitchV2P achieves up to a 1.9× reduction in bandwidth overheads and requires order-of-magnitude fewer gateways for equivalent performance.
papers.abstract_zh:
虚拟网络中的数据包路由需要虚拟到物理地址转换。地址映射由单方（即网络管理员）更新，但在路由租户数据包时由网络上的多个设备读取。现有方法面临着固有的读写性能权衡：它们要么将这些映射存储在专用网关中以实现快速更新，但代价是转发速度较慢，要么在终端主机上复制它们并遭受更新缓慢的影响。

SwitchV2P 旨在通过利用网络交换机透明地缓存地址映射，同时从流量中学习地址映射来避免这种权衡。 SwitchV2P 使映射更接近发送方，从而减少第一个数据包延迟和转换开销，同时实现快速映射更新，所有这些都无需更改现有路由策略和部署的网关。拓扑感知数据平面缓存协议允许交换机透明地适应不断变化的网络条件和变化的交换机内内存容量。

我们的评估显示了网络内地址映射的优势，包括 FCT 和第一个数据包延迟分别减少了 7.8 倍和 4.3 倍，以及转换网关负载大幅减少。此外，SwitchV2P 的带宽开销最多可减少 1.9 倍，并且实现同等性能所需的网关数量要少几个数量级。

papers.title: Integrated Two-way Radar Backscatter Communication and Sensing with Low-power IoT Tags.
papers.abstract: Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) represents an innovative paradigm for enhancing spectrum and hardware utilization for both sensing and communication. A specific type of ISAC, radar backscatter communication, involves low-power nodes embedding data onto radar signal reflections rather than generating new signals. However, existing radar backscatter techniques only facilitate uplink communication from the tag to the radar, neglecting downlink communication. This paper introduces BiScatter, an integrated radar backscatter communication and sensing system that enables simultaneous uplink and downlink backscatter communication, radar sensing, and backscatter localization. This is achieved through the design of chirp-slope-shift-keying modulation on top of Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radars, complemented by passive differential circuitry at the backscatter tags for low-power decoding. BiScatter also presents a packet structure compatible with off-the-shelf radars that offer accurate data processing and synchronization between radar and tag. We prototype this backscatter network in both 9GHz and 24GHz, demonstrating its capability to extend across different frequency bands. Our evaluations demonstrate that BiScatter supports two-way backscatter communication with BER lower than 10 -3 up to 7m range and centimeter-level tag localization accuracy on top of off-the-shelf FMCW radars. The presented approach significantly augments the versatility and efficiency of ISAC for low-power devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 集成传感和通信 (ISAC) 代表了增强传感和通信频谱和硬件利用率的创新范例。 ISAC 的一种特定类型，即雷达反向散射通信，涉及低功耗节点将数据嵌入到雷达信号反射上，而不是生成新信号。然而，现有的雷达反向散射技术仅促进从标签到雷达的上行链路通信，而忽略了下行链路通信。本文介绍了 BiScatter，这是一种集成的雷达反向散射通信和传感系统，可同时实现上行链路和下行链路反向散射通信、雷达传感和反向散射定位。这是通过在调频连续波 (FMCW) 雷达之上设计线性调频斜率移键控调制来实现的，并辅以反向散射标签上用于低功耗解码的无源差分电路。 BiScatter 还提供了与现成雷达兼容的数据包结构，可在雷达和标签之间提供准确的数据处理和同步。我们在 9GHz 和 24GHz 下制作了该反向散射网络原型，展示了其跨不同频段扩展的能力。我们的评估表明，BiScatter 支持双向反向散射通信，误码率低于 10 -3 ，范围可达 7m，并且在现成的 FMCW 雷达上具有厘米级标签定位精度。所提出的方法显着增强了低功耗设备 ISAC 的多功能性和效率。

papers.title: IPD: Detecting Traffic Ingress Points at ISPs.
papers.abstract:
Detecting where traffic enters a network enhances network operation, but poses a complex measurement problem that requires analyzing a continuous traffic stream from all border routers---a challenging task for ISPs in the absence of a scalable approach.

To enable ISPs to perform Ingress Point Detection ( IPD ), we propose an efficient approach that accurately identifies traffic ingress points at ISPs of any size using flow-level traffic traces. IPD identifies the specific router and interface through which a particular segment of the Internet address space enters a network. IPD splits the address space into fine-grained ranges to identify the specific router and interface through which segments of the address space enter the network. We have deployed IPD for six years at a major tier-1 ISP with an international network that handles multi-digit Tbit/s traffic levels, and our experience shows that IPD can accurately identify ingress points and scale to high traffic loads on a single commodity server. IPD enabled the ISP to improve network operations by identifying performance issues and realizing advanced traffic engineering practices.
papers.abstract_zh:
检测流量进入网络的位置可以增强网络运行，但会带来复杂的测量问题，需要分析来自所有边界路由器的连续流量——在缺乏可扩展方法的情况下，这对于 ISP 来说是一项具有挑战性的任务。

为了使 ISP 能够执行入口点检测 (IPD)，我们提出了一种有效的方法，可以使用流级流量跟踪准确识别任何规模 ISP 的流量入口点。 IPD 标识特定的路由器和接口，互联网地址空间的特定段通过它们进入网络。 IPD 将地址空间分割为细粒度范围，以识别地址空间段进入网络的特定路由器和接口。我们已经在一家主要的一级 ISP 部署 IPD 六年了，该 ISP 拥有处理多位数 Tbit/s 流量水平的国际网络，我们的经验表明，IPD 可以准确识别入口点并扩展到单个商用服务器上的高流量负载。 IPD 使 ISP 通过识别性能问题和实现先进的流量工程实践来改善网络运营。

papers.title: Keeping an Eye on Congestion Control in the Wild with Nebby.
papers.abstract: The Internet congestion control landscape is rapidly evolving. Since the introduction of BBR and the deployment of QUIC, it has become increasingly commonplace for companies to modify and implement their own congestion control algorithms (CCAs). To respond effectively to these developments, it is crucial to understand the state of CCA deployments in the wild. Unfortunately, existing CCA identification tools are not future-proof and do not work well with modern CCAs and encrypted protocols like QUIC. In this paper, we articulate the challenges in designing a future-proof CCA identification tool and propose a measurement methodology that directly addresses these challenges. The resulting measurement tool, called Nebby , can identify all the CCAs currently available in the Linux kernel and BBRv2 with an average accuracy of 96.7%. We found that among the Alexa Top 20k websites, the share of BBR has shrunk since 2019 and that only 8% of them responded to QUIC requests. Among these QUIC servers, CUBIC and BBR seem equally popular. We show that Nebby is extensible by extending it for Copa and an undocumented family of CCAs that is deployed by 6% of the measured websites, including major corporations like Hulu and Apple.
papers.abstract_zh: 互联网拥塞控制领域正在迅速发展。自从引入 BBR 和部署 QUIC 以来，公司修改和实施自己的拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 已变得越来越普遍。为了有效应对这些发展，了解 CCA 的实际部署状况至关重要。遗憾的是，现有的 CCA 识别工具无法面向未来，并且不能与现代 CCA 和 QUIC 等加密协议很好地配合。在本文中，我们阐明了设计面向未来的 CCA 识别工具所面临的挑战，并提出了一种直接解决这些挑战的测量方法。由此产生的测量工具 Nebby 可以识别 Linux 内核和 BBRv2 中当前可用的所有 CCA，平均准确度为 96.7%。我们发现，在 Alexa Top 20k 网站中，BBR 的份额自 2019 年以来不断萎缩，只有 8% 的网站响应了 QUIC 请求。在这些 QUIC 服务器中，CUBIC 和 BBR 似乎同样受欢迎。我们通过将 Nebby 扩展到 Copa 和未记录的 CCA 系列来证明 Nebby 是可扩展的，该系列由 6% 的被测网站部署，包括 Hulu 和 Apple 等大公司。

papers.title: m3: Accurate Flow-Level Performance Estimation using Machine Learning.
papers.abstract:
Data center network operators often need accurate estimates of aggregate network performance. Unfortunately, existing methods for estimating aggregate network statistics are either inaccurate or too slow to be practical at the data center scale.

In this paper, we develop and evaluate a scale-free, fast, and accurate model for estimating data center network tail latency performance for a given workload, topology, and network configuration. First, we show that path-level simulations---simulations of traffic that intersects a given path---produce almost the same aggregate statistics as full network-wide packet-level simulations. We use a simple and fast flow-level fluid simulation in a novel way to capture and summarize essential elements of the path workload, including the effect of cross-traffic on flows on that path. We use this coarse simulation as input to a machine-learning model to predict path-level behavior, and run it on a sample of paths to produce accurate network-wide estimates. Our model generalizes over the choice of congestion control (CC) protocol, CC protocol parameters, and routing. Relative to Parsimon, a state-of-the-art system for rapidly estimating aggregate network tail latency, our approach is significantly faster (5.7×), more accurate (45.9% less error), and more robust.
papers.abstract_zh:
数据中心网络运营商通常需要准确估计总体网络性能。不幸的是，现有的估计聚合网络统计数据的方法要么不准确，要么太慢，无法在数据中心规模上实用。

在本文中，我们开发并评估了一个无标度、快速且准确的模型，用于估计给定工作负载、拓扑和网络配置的数据中心网络尾部延迟性能。首先，我们表明路径级模拟（与给定路径相交的流量的模拟）产生与全网络范围的数据包级模拟几乎相同的聚合统计数据。我们以一种新颖的方式使用简单快速的流级流体模拟来捕获和总结路径工作负载的基本要素，包括交叉流量对该路径上流的影响。我们使用这种粗略模拟作为机器学习模型的输入来预测路径级行为，并在路径样本上运行它以产生准确的网络范围估计。我们的模型概括了拥塞控制 (CC) 协议、CC 协议参数和路由的选择。相对于 Parsimon（一种用于快速估计聚合网络尾部延迟的最先进系统），我们的方法明显更快（5.7 倍）、更准确（误差减少 45.9%）且更稳健。

papers.title: MCCS: A Service-based Approach to Collective Communication for Multi-Tenant Cloud.
papers.abstract: Performance of collective communication is critical for distributed systems. Using libraries to implement collective communication algorithms is not a good fit for a multi-tenant cloud environment because the tenant is not aware of the underlying physical network configuration or how other tenants use the shared cloud network---this lack of information prevents the library from selecting an optimal algorithm. In this paper, we explore a new approach for collective communication that more tightly integrates the implementation with the cloud network instead of the applications. We introduce MCCS, or Managed Collective Communication as a Service, which exposes traditional collective communication abstractions to applications while providing control and flexibility to the cloud provider for their implementations. Realizing MCCS involves overcoming several key challenges to integrate collective communication as part of the cloud network, including memory management of tenant GPU buffers, synchronizing changes to collective communication strategies, and supporting policies that involve cross-layer traffic optimization. Our evaluations show that MCCS improves tenant collective communication performance by up to 2.4× compared to one of the state-of-the-art collective communication libraries (NCCL), while adding more management features including dynamic algorithm adjustment, quality of service, and network-aware traffic engineering.
papers.abstract_zh: 集体通信的性能对于分布式系统至关重要。使用图书馆来实现集体通信算法不太适合多租户云环境，因为租户不知道底层物理网络配置或其他租户如何使用共享云网络——这种信息的缺乏阻止了图书馆选择最佳算法。在本文中，我们探索了一种集体通信的新方法，该方法将实现与云网络而不是应用程序更紧密地集成。我们引入了 MCCS（托管集体通信即服务），它将传统的集体通信抽象公开给应用程序，同时为云提供商的实施提供控制和灵活性。实现 MCCS 需要克服几个关键挑战，将集体通信集成为云网络的一部分，包括租户 GPU 缓冲区的内存管理、同步集体通信策略的更改以及支持涉及跨层流量优化的策略。我们的评估表明，与最先进的集体通信库 (NCCL) 之一相比，MCCS 将租户集体通信性能提高了 2.4 倍，同时添加了更多管理功能，包括动态算法调整、服务质量和网络感知流量工程。

papers.title: MegaTE: Extending WAN Traffic Engineering to Millions of Endpoints in Virtualized Cloud.
papers.abstract: In today's virtualized cloud, containers and virtual machines (VMs) are prevailing methods to deploy applications with different tenant requirements. However, these requirements are at odds with the resource allocation capabilities of conventional networking stacks in wide-area networks (WANs). In particular, existing WAN traffic engineering (TE) systems at the granularity of aggregated traffic flows are not designed to cater to each individual flow. In this paper, we advocate for a radical new approach to extend TE systems to involve millions of virtual instance endpoints. We propose and implement a first-of-its-kind system, called MegaTE, to satisfy the needs of each fine-grained traffic flow at the virtual instance level. At the core of the MegaTE system is the paradigm shift from the top-down centralized control to the bottom-up asynchronous query in the TE control loop, combined with eBPF-based segment routing on the data plane and TE optimization contraction on the control plane. We evaluate MegaTE using flow-level simulations with production traffic traces. Our results show that MegaTE supports 20× more endpoints with the similar algorithm run time compared to prior work. MegaTE has been adopted by large-scale public cloud providers. Notably, Tencent rolled out MegaTE in its cloud WAN since December 2022. Our production analysis shows that MegaTE reduces the packet latency of real-time applications by up to 51%.
papers.abstract_zh: 在当今的虚拟化云中，容器和虚拟机 (VM) 是部署具有不同租户需求的应用程序的流行方法。然而，这些要求与广域网 (WAN) 中传统网络堆栈的资源分配能力不一致。特别是，现有的以聚合流量为粒度的 WAN 流量工程 (TE) 系统并不是为了满足每个单独的流量而设计的。在本文中，我们提倡采用一种全新的方法来扩展 TE 系统以涉及数百万个虚拟实例端点。我们提出并实现了一个名为 MegaTE 的首创系统，以满足虚拟实例级别每个细粒度流量的需求。 MegaTE系统的核心是TE控制环路从自上而下的集中控制到自下而上的异步查询的范式转变，结合数据平面上基于eBPF的分段路由和控制平面上的TE优化收缩。我们使用流级模拟和生产流量跟踪来评估 MegaTE。我们的结果表明，与之前的工作相比，MegaTE 在相似的算法运行时间下支持多 20 倍的端点。 MegaTE已被大型公有云提供商采用。值得注意的是，腾讯自 2022 年 12 月起在其云广域网中推出了 MegaTE。我们的生产分析表明，MegaTE 将实时应用程序的数据包延迟降低了高达 51%。

papers.title: NegotiaToR: Towards A Simple Yet Effective On-demand Reconfigurable Datacenter Network.
papers.abstract: Recent advances in fast optical switching technology show promise in meeting the high goodput and low latency requirements of datacenter networks (DCN). We present NegotiaToR, a simple network architecture for optical reconfigurable DCNs that utilizes on-demand scheduling to handle dynamic traffic. In NegotiaToR, racks exchange scheduling messages through an in-band control plane and distributedly calculate non-conflicting paths from binary traffic demand information. Optimized for incasts, it also provides opportunities to bypass scheduling delays. NegotiaToR is compatible with prevalent flat topologies, and is tailored towards a minimalist design for on-demand reconfigurable DCNs, enhancing practicality. Through large-scale simulations, we show that NegotiaToR achieves both small mice flow completion time (FCT) and high goodput on two representative flat topologies, especially under heavy loads. Particularly, the FCT of mice flows is one to two orders of magnitude better than the state-of-the-art traffic-oblivious reconfigurable DCN design.
papers.abstract_zh: 快速光交换技术的最新进展有望满足数据中心网络 (DCN) 的高吞吐量和低延迟要求。我们推出 NegotiaToR，这是一种用于光学可重配置 DCN 的简单网络架构，它利用按需调度来处理动态流量。在 NegotiaToR 中，机架通过带内控制平面交换调度消息，并根据二进制流量需求信息分布式计算非冲突路径。它针对直播进行了优化，还提供了绕过调度延迟的机会。 NegotiaToR兼容流行的扁平拓扑，专为按需可重构DCN的极简设计而定制，增强了实用性。通过大规模模拟，我们表明 NegotiaToR 在两种代表性的平面拓扑上实现了小小鼠流完成时间 (FCT) 和高吞吐量，尤其是在重负载下。特别是，小鼠流的 FCT 比最先进的流量无关可重构 DCN 设计好一到两个数量级。

papers.title: NetEdit: An Orchestration Platform for eBPF Network Functions at Scale.
papers.abstract:
Managing the performance of thousands of services across millions of servers demands a networking stack that can dynamically adjust protocol settings to match diverse priorities and network characteristics. Moreover, given the constantly evolving nature of services and their requirements, the set of configurable protocols must remain adaptable. However, current host networking stacks lack the necessary flexibility and adaptability. Although eBPF shows promise in this regard, it lacks essential primitives for efficient development and safe deployment of multiple co-existing services.

This paper presents our experience developing NetEdit, a system that orchestrates the composition, deployment, and life-cycle management of eBPF programs across a large fleet of servers at Meta. Our design offers a unified abstraction for various kernel hookpoints, decouples policies from programs using a rich configuration language, supports explicit object management for reliable deployment and provides extensive testing methods. NetEdit has been deployed in our production network for five years and now supports thirteen Network Function applications. We have observed that NetEdit-enabled functions improve average service performance by 3X and network performance by 4.6X, showcasing its significant real-world impact.
papers.abstract_zh:
管理数百万台服务器上数千个服务的性能需要一个网络堆栈，该堆栈可以动态调整协议设置以匹配不同的优先级和网络特征。此外，考虑到服务及其需求不断变化的性质，可配置协议集必须保持适应性。然而，当前的主机网络堆栈缺乏必要的灵活性和适应性。尽管 eBPF 在这方面表现出了希望，但它缺乏高效开发和安全部署多个共存服务的基本原语。

本文介绍了我们开发 NetEdit 的经验，NetEdit 是一个系统，可以在 Meta 的大量服务器上协调 eBPF 程序的组合、部署和生命周期管理。我们的设计为各种内核挂钩点提供了统一的抽象，使用丰富的配置语言将策略与程序解耦，支持显式对象管理以实现可靠的部署，并提供广泛的测试方法。 NetEdit 已在我们的生产网络中部署了五年，现在支持 13 个网络功能应用程序。我们观察到，支持 NetEdit 的功能将平均服务性能提高了 3 倍，网络性能提高了 4.6 倍，展示了其对现实世界的重大影响。

papers.title: NetLLM: Adapting Large Language Models for Networking.
papers.abstract:
Many networking tasks now employ deep learning (DL) to solve complex prediction and optimization problems. However, current design philosophy of DL-based algorithms entails intensive engineering overhead due to the manual design of deep neural networks (DNNs) for different networking tasks. Besides, DNNs tend to achieve poor generalization performance on unseen data distributions/environments.

Motivated by the recent success of large language models (LLMs), this work studies the LLM adaptation for networking to explore a more sustainable design philosophy. With the powerful pre-trained knowledge, the LLM is promising to serve as the foundation model to achieve "one model for all tasks" with even better performance and stronger generalization. In pursuit of this vision, we present NetLLM, the first framework that provides a coherent design to harness the powerful capabilities of LLMs with low efforts to solve networking problems. Specifically, NetLLM empowers the LLM to effectively process multimodal data in networking and efficiently generate task-specific answers. Besides, NetLLM drastically reduces the costs of fine-tuning the LLM to acquire domain knowledge for networking. Across three networking-related use cases - viewport prediction, adaptive bitrate streaming and cluster job scheduling, we showcase that the NetLLM-adapted LLM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh:
现在，许多网络任务都采用深度学习 (DL) 来解决复杂的预测和优化问题。然而，由于针对不同网络任务的深度神经网络（DNN）的手动设计，当前基于深度学习的算法的设计理念需要大量的工程开销。此外，DNN 在未见过的数据分布/环境上往往表现不佳。

受大型语言模型 (LLM) 最近成功的推动，这项工作研究了 LLM 对网络的适应，以探索更可持续的设计理念。凭借强大的预训练知识，LLM有望作为基础模型，实现“一个模型适用于所有任务”，具有更好的性能和更强的泛化能力。为了实现这一愿景，我们推出了 NetLLM，这是第一个提供连贯设计的框架，可以轻松利用 LLM 的强大功能来解决网络问题。具体来说，NetLLM 使法学硕士能够有效处理网络中的多模式数据并有效生成特定于任务的答案。此外，NetLLM 大大降低了微调 LLM 以获得网络领域知识的成本。在三个与网络相关的用例（视口预测、自适应比特率流和集群作业调度）中，我们展示了适应 NetLLM 的 LLM 显着优于最先进的算法。

papers.title: OptimusPrime: Unleash Dataplane Programmability through a Transformable Architecture.
papers.abstract: Network dataplane calls for better programmability. Current programmable network processing chips are based on either pipeline or multi-core Run-To-Completion (RTC) architecture with various trade-offs in flexibility, performance, and cost. The existing attempts to amalgamate the strengths of the two are stilted and inflexible. In this paper, we challenge the status quo by introducing a more fluid and organic programmable chip architecture, OptimusPrime , built from identical hardware blocks. Unlike the conventional static hybrid architecture, OptimusPrime allows each block to be transformed into either a pipeline stage processor or a multi-core RTC processor through software-defined configuration, enabling versatile data plane programming tailored to a wide range of applications (e.g., stateful packet processing and in-network computing). We integrate the C and P4 languages for application programming and develop algorithms to map a user program to the optimal distribution of pipeline stages and RTC cores. We demonstrate the viability of OptimusPrime through practical use cases such as in-network aggregation, in-network caching, and network function integration. We developed an FPGA-based prototype and a software-based ASIC simulator to validate the feasibility of OptimusPrime , which can be used by switches and smartNICs to enhance their programmability to a new level with high performance and low cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络数据平面需要更好的可编程性。当前的可编程网络处理芯片基于管道或多核运行到完成 (RTC) 架构，在灵活性、性能和成本方面进行了各种权衡。现有的融合两者优势的尝试是生硬且缺乏灵活性的。在本文中，我们通过引入一种更流畅、更有机的可编程芯片架构 OptimusPrime（由相同的硬件模块构建）来挑战现状。与传统的静态混合架构不同，OptimusPrime 允许通过软件定义的配置将每个模块转换为流水线级处理器或多核 RTC 处理器，从而实现针对各种应用（例如有状态数据包处理和网络内计算）量身定制的通用数据平面编程。我们集成 C 和 P4 语言进行应用程序编程，并开发算法将用户程序映射到管道阶段和 RTC 内核的最佳分布。我们通过网络内聚合、网络内缓存和网络功能集成等实际用例证明了 OptimusPrime 的可行性。我们开发了基于FPGA的原型和基于软件的ASIC模拟器来验证OptimusPrime的可行性，它可以被交换机和smartNIC使用，以高性能和低成本将其可编程性提高到新的水平。

papers.title: P4runpro: Enabling Runtime Programmability for RMT Programmable Switches.
papers.abstract: Programmable switches have revolutionized network operations by enabling the flexible customization of packet processing logic using language like P4. However, changing the programs running on the switch requires disturbing traffic and suspending other unrelated programs. In this paper, we present P4runpro, enabling runtime data plane updates with dynamic resource allocation. The P4runpro data plane abstracts hardware resources and defines dynamically reconfigurable atomic operations that form packet processing logic. P4runpro provides runtime programming interfaces called P4runpro primitives for the operator to write high-level programs. We have designed the P4runpro compiler to automatically and consistently link the P4runpro programs to the running data plane. We implement our prototype on a Tofino switch. We implement 15 example runtime programs using P4runpro to demonstrate its generality and expressiveness. Our evaluation results show that compared to the state-of-the-art, P4runpro can respond within hundreds of milliseconds, achieve an average of 60% to 80% dynamic resource utilization, concurrently run ≈0.6K to ≈2.8K programs, and introduce lower overhead. Our case studies illustrate the benefit of runtime programming and prove the same functionality between P4runpro and conventional P4 programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 可编程交换机通过使用 P4 等语言实现数据包处理逻辑的灵活定制，彻底改变了网络操作。然而，更改交换机上运行的程序需要扰乱流量并暂停其他不相关的程序。在本文中，我们介绍了 P4runpro，它可以通过动态资源分配来实现运行时数据平面更新。 P4runpro 数据平面抽象硬件资源并定义形成数据包处理逻辑的动态可重新配置原子操作。 P4runpro 提供称为 P4runpro 原语的运行时编程接口，供操作员编写高级程序。我们设计了 P4runpro 编译器来自动、一致地将 P4runpro 程序链接到正在运行的数据平面。我们在 Tofino 交换机上实现了我们的原型。我们使用 P4runpro 实现了 15 个示例运行时程序，以展示其通用性和表现力。我们的评估结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，P4runpro可以在数百毫秒内响应，实现平均60％至80％的动态资源利用率，同时运行约0.6K至约2.8K程序，并引入较低的开销。我们的案例研究说明了运行时编程的好处，并证明 P4runpro 和传统 P4 程序之间具有相同的功能。

papers.title: PPT: A Pragmatic Transport for Datacenters.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces PPT, a pragmatic transport that achieves comparable performance to proactive transports while maintaining good deployability as reactive transports. Our key idea is to run a low-priority control loop to leverage the available bandwidth left by the reactive transports. The main challenge is to send just enough packets to improve performance without harming the primary control loop. We combine two unconventional techniques: an intermittent loop initialization and an exponential window decrease, enabling us to dynamically identify and fill the spare bandwidth. We further complement PPT's design with a buffer-aware flow scheduling scheme to optimize the average FCT of small flows without prior knowledge of flow size information. We have implemented a PPT prototype in the Linux kernel with ~400 lines of code and demonstrated that compared to Homa, it delivers up to 46.3% lower overall average FCT and even 25%/55.5% lower average/tail FCT of small flows in an Memcached workload.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 PPT，这是一种实用的传输，它可以实现与主动传输相当的性能，同时保持响应式传输良好的可部署性。我们的关键想法是运行低优先级控制循环来利用反应式传输留下的可用带宽。主要挑战是发送足够的数据包以提高性能而不损害主控制环路。我们结合了两种非常规技术：间歇循环初始化和指数窗口减小，使我们能够动态识别和填充空闲带宽。我们通过缓冲区感知流调度方案进一步补充 PPT 的设计，以优化小流的平均 FCT，而无需事先了解流大小信息。我们在 Linux 内核中实现了大约 400 行代码的 PPT 原型，并证明与 Homa 相比，它的总体平均 FCT 降低了 46.3%，甚至 Memcached 工作负载中小流的平均/尾部 FCT 降低了 25%/55.5%。

papers.title: Practical Rateless Set Reconciliation.
papers.abstract: Set reconciliation, where two parties hold fixed-length bit strings and run a protocol to learn the strings they are missing from each other, is a fundamental task in many distributed systems. We present Rateless Invertible Bloom Lookup Tables (Rateless IBLTs), the first set reconciliation protocol, to the best of our knowledge, that achieves low computation cost and near-optimal communication cost across a wide range of scenarios: set differences of one to millions, bit strings of a few bytes to megabytes, and workloads injected by potential adversaries. Rateless IBLT is based on a novel encoder that incrementally encodes the set difference into an infinite stream of coded symbols, resembling rateless error-correcting codes. We compare Rateless IBLT with state-of-the-art set reconciliation schemes and demonstrate significant improvements. Rateless IBLT achieves 3--4× lower communication cost than non-rateless schemes with similar computation cost, and 2--2000× lower computation cost than schemes with similar communication cost. We show the real-world benefits of Rateless IBLT by applying it to synchronize the state of the Ethereum blockchain, and demonstrate 5.6× lower end-to-end completion time and 4.4× lower communication cost compared to the system used in production.
papers.abstract_zh: 集合协调是许多分布式系统中的一项基本任务，其中两方持有固定长度的位字符串并运行协议来学习彼此丢失的字符串。据我们所知，我们提出了无速率可逆布隆查找表（Rateless IBLT），这是第一个集合协调协议，它在各种场景中实现了低计算成本和接近最优的通信成本：设置差异为一到数百万，位串为几字节到兆字节，以及潜在对手注入的工作负载。无速率 IBLT 基于一种新颖的编码器，该编码器将设置差异增量编码为无限的编码符号流，类似于无速率纠错码。我们将无比率 IBLT 与最先进的集合协调方案进行比较，并展示了显着的改进。无速率 IBLT 的通信成本比具有相似计算成本的非无速率方案低 3--4 倍，比具有相似通信成本的方案低 2--2000 倍。我们通过应用无速率 IBLT 来同步以太坊区块链的状态来展示其在现实世界中的优势，并证明与生产中使用的系统相比，端到端完成时间降低了 5.6 倍，通信成本降低了 4.4 倍。

papers.title: Principles for Internet Congestion Management.
papers.abstract: Given the technical flaws with---and the increasing non-observance of---the TCP-friendliness paradigm, we must rethink how the Internet should manage bandwidth allocation. We explore this question from first principles, but remain within the constraints of the Internet's current architecture and commercial arrangements. We propose a new framework, Recursive Congestion Shares (RCS), that provides bandwidth allocations independent of which congestion control algorithms flows use but consistent with the Internet's economics. We show that RCS achieves this goal using game-theoretic calculations and simulations as well as network emulation.
papers.abstract_zh: 鉴于 TCP 友好范式的技术缺陷以及越来越多的不遵守行为，我们必须重新思考互联网应如何管理带宽分配。我们从首要原则出发探讨这个问题，但仍然受到互联网当前架构和商业安排的限制。我们提出了一个新的框架，即递归拥塞共享（RCS），它提供独立于拥塞控制算法流使用的带宽分配，但与互联网的经济一致。我们证明 RCS 使用博弈论计算和模拟以及网络仿真实现了这一目标。

papers.title: Prudentia: Findings of an Internet Fairness Watchdog.
papers.abstract: With the rise of heterogeneous congestion control algorithms and increasingly complex application control loops (e.g. adaptive bitrate algorithms), the Internet community has expressed growing concern that network bandwidth allocations are unfairly skewed, and that some Internet services are 'winners' at the expense of 'losing' services when competing over shared bottlenecks. In this paper, we provide the first study of fairness between live, end-to-end services with distinct workloads. Rather than focusing on individual components of an application stack (e.g., studying the fairness of an individual congestion control algorithm), we want to provide a direct study over real-world deployed applications. Among our findings, we observe that services typically achieve less-than-fair outcomes: on average, the 'losing' service achieves only 72% of its max-min fair share of link bandwidth. We also find that some services are significantly more contentious than others: for example, one popular file distribution service causes competing applications to obtain as low as 16% of their max-min fair share of bandwidth when competing in a moderately-constrained setting.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着异构拥塞控制算法的兴起和日益复杂的应用控制循环（例如自适应比特率算法），互联网社区越来越担心网络带宽分配不公平，以及一些互联网服务在共享瓶颈竞争时以“失去”服务为代价成为“赢家”。在本文中，我们首次研究了具有不同工作负载的实时端到端服务之间的公平性。我们不想关注应用程序堆栈的各个组件（例如，研究单个拥塞控制算法的公平性），而是希望对实际部署的应用程序进行直接研究。在我们的研究结果中，我们观察到服务通常会实现不太公平的结果：平均而言，“失败”的服务仅实现其链路带宽最大-最小公平份额的 72%。我们还发现，某些服务比其他服务更具争议性：例如，一种流行的文件分发服务会导致竞争应用程序在适度受限的环境中竞争时获得低至其最大-最小公平带宽份额的 16%。

papers.title: R-Pingmesh: A Service-Aware RoCE Network Monitoring and Diagnostic System.
papers.abstract:
RoCE services are sensitive to network failures and performance bottlenecks, which become more common as the RoCE network scales. In addition, some non-network problems behave like network problems and can waste troubleshooting time. However, existing mechanisms cannot quickly detect and locate network problems or determine whether the service problem is network-related.

In this paper, we propose R-Pingmesh, the first service-aware RoCE network monitoring and diagnostic system based on end-to-end probing. R-Pingmesh can accurately measure network RTT and end-host processing delay based on commodity RDMA NICs (RNICs), distinguish between RNIC and in-network packet drops, and judge whether a problem is network-related and assess its impact on services. We have deployed R-Pingmesh on tens of thousands of RNICs for over 6 months. One-month evaluation results show that 85% of the problems located by R-Pingmesh are accurate, where all 157 switch network problems are accurate. R-Pingmesh efficiently detects and locates 14 types of problems during deployment, and we share our experience in dealing with them.
papers.abstract_zh:
RoCE 服务对网络故障和性能瓶颈很敏感，随着 RoCE 网络的扩展，这种情况变得更加常见。此外，一些非网络问题的行为类似于网络问题，可能会浪费故障排除时间。但现有机制无法快速检测和定位网络问题或判断业务问题是否与网络相关。

在本文中，我们提出了 R-Pingmesh，这是第一个基于端到端探测的服务感知 RoCE 网络监控和诊断系统。 R-Pingmesh可以基于商用RDMA网卡（RNIC）精确测量网络RTT和终端主机处理延迟，区分RNIC和网内丢包，判断问题是否与网络相关并评估其对业务的影响。我们已在数万个 RNIC 上部署 R-Pingmesh 超过 6 个月。一个月的评估结果显示，R-Pingmesh定位的问题准确率达到85%，其中157个交换机网络问题全部准确。 R-Pingmesh高效检测并定位部署过程中的14类问题，并分享处理经验。

papers.title: RD-Probe: Scalable Monitoring With Sufficient Coverage In Complex Datacenter Networks.
papers.abstract:
Ensuring service availability in large-scale datacenters hinges on network monitoring. For monitoring quality, it is essential to attain sufficient coverage of all physical components. However, given the ever-evolving complexity of industrial environments, even measuring coverage metrics becomes challenging, let alone attaining sufficient coverage. In fact, insufficient coverage widely existed in our production datacenters and caused many missed failures.

To address this, we design RD-Probe, an industrial monitoring system with coverage and scalability guarantees. Specifically, it first constructs a network topology encoding the industrial complexity. Then, it combines Randomized and Deterministic methods to efficiently generate probe tasks that meet the coverage requirement.

We have deployed RD-Probe in three large production regions in Huawei Cloud. Within the first month, RD-Probe improved coverage from 80.9% to 99.5% and unearthed several previously unnoticed issues while tolerating numerous faults. Large-scale simulation of four industry solutions shows that RD-Probe is the only one achieving both sufficient coverage and scalability in complex datacenter networks. We plan to expand RD-Probe to other regions soon.
papers.abstract_zh:
确保大规模数据中心的服务可用性取决于网络监控。为了监控质量，必须充分覆盖所有物理组件。然而，鉴于工业环境不断变化的复杂性，即使测量覆盖率指标也变得具有挑战性，更不用说获得足够的覆盖率了。事实上，我们的生产数据中心广泛存在覆盖不足的问题，并导致了许​​多漏检的故障。

为了解决这个问题，我们设计了RD-Probe，这是一种具有覆盖范围和可扩展性保证的工业监控系统。具体来说，它首先构建一个编码工业复杂性的网络拓扑。然后，它结合随机和确定性方法，有效生成满足覆盖要求的探测任务。

我们在华为云的三个大型生产区域部署了RD-Probe。在第一个月内，RD-Probe 将覆盖率从 80.9% 提高到 99.5%，并在容忍大量故障的同时发现了一些以前未被注意到的问题。对四种行业解决方案的大规模仿真表明，RD-Probe是唯一在复杂数据中心网络中同时实现足够覆盖和可扩展性的解决方案。我们计划很快将 RD-Probe 扩展到其他地区。

papers.title: RDMA over Ethernet for Distributed Training at Meta Scale.
papers.abstract:
The rapid growth in both computational density and scale in AI models in recent years motivates the construction of an efficient and reliable dedicated network infrastructure. This paper presents the design, implementation, and operation of Meta's Remote Direct Memory Access over Converged Ethernet (RoCE) networks for distributed AI training.

Our design principles involve a deep understanding of the workloads, and we translated these insights into the design of various network components: Network Topology - To support the rapid evolution of generations of AI hardware platforms, we separated GPU-based training into its own "backend" network. Routing - Training workloads inherently impose load imbalance and burstiness, so we deployed several iterations of routing schemes to achieve near-optimal traffic distribution. Transport - We outline how we initially attempted to use DCQCN for congestion management but then pivoted away from DCQCN to instead leverage the collective library itself to manage congestion. Operations - We share our experience operating large-scale AI networks, including toolings we developed and troubleshooting examples.
papers.abstract_zh:
近年来，人工智能模型计算密度和规模的快速增长推动了高效可靠的专用网络基础设施的建设。本文介绍了用于分布式 AI 训练的 Meta 融合以太网远程直接内存访问 (RoCE) 网络的设计、实现和操作。

我们的设计原则涉及对工作负载的深入理解，并将这些见解转化为各种网络组件的设计： 网络拓扑 - 为了支持几代人工智能硬件平台的快速发展，我们将基于 GPU 的训练分离到自己的“后端”网络中。路由 - 训练工作负载本质上会带来负载不平衡和突发性，因此我们部署了多次迭代的路由方案以实现近乎最佳的流量分配。传输 - 我们概述了我们最初如何尝试使用 DCQCN 进行拥塞管理，但后来从 DCQCN 转向利用集体库本身来管理拥塞。运营 - 我们分享运营大规模人工智能网络的经验，包括我们开发的工具和故障排除示例。

papers.title: Realizing RotorNet: Toward Practical Microsecond Scale Optical Networking.
papers.abstract: We describe our experience building and deploying a demand-oblivious optically-switched network based on the RotorNet and Opera architectures. We detail the design, manufacture, deployment, and end-to-end operation of a 128-port optical rotor switch along with supporting NIC hardware and host software. Using this prototype, we assess yield, synchronization, and interoperability with commodity hardware and software at a scale of practical relevance. We provide the first real-world measurements of Linux TCP throughput and host-to-host latency in an operational RotorNet, achieving 98% of link rate with 99th-percentile ping times faster than commodity packet-switching hardware. In the process, we uncover unexpected challenges with link-level dropouts and devise a novel and flexible way to address them. Our deployment experience demonstrates the feasibility of our implementation approach and identifies opportunities for future exploration.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们描述了我们构建和部署基于 RotorNet 和 Opera 架构的无需求光交换网络的经验。我们详细介绍了 128 端口光学转子交换机的设计、制造、部署和端到端操作以及支持 NIC 硬件和主机软件。使用这个原型，我们在实际相关的范围内评估了产量、同步性以及与商品硬件和软件的互操作性。我们在运行的 RotorNet 中首次对 Linux TCP 吞吐量和主机到主机延迟进行了实际测量，实现了 98% 的链路速率，并且 ping 时间比商用数据包交换硬件快 99%。在此过程中，我们发现了链路级丢失带来的意外挑战，并设计了一种新颖且灵活的方法来解决这些问题。我们的部署经验证明了我们实施方法的可行性，并确定了未来探索的机会。

papers.title: RedTE: Mitigating Subsecond Traffic Bursts with Real-time and Distributed Traffic Engineering.
papers.abstract:
Internet traffic bursts usually happen within a second, thus conventional burst mitigation methods ignore the potential of Traffic Engineering (TE). However, our experiments indicate that a TE system, with a sub-second control loop latency, can effectively alleviate burst-induced congestion. TE-based methods can leverage network-wide tunnel-level information to make globally informed decisions ( e.g. , balancing traffic bursts among multiple paths). Our insight in reducing control loop latency is to let each router make local TE decisions, but this introduces the key challenge of minimizing performance loss compared to centralized TE systems.

In this paper, we present RedTE, a novel distributed TE system with a control loop latency of < 100 ms , while achieving performance comparable to centralized TE systems. RedTE's innovation is the modeling of TE as a distributed cooperative multi-agent problem, and we design a novel multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithm to solve it, which enables each agent to make globally informed decisions solely based on local information. We implement real RedTE routers and deploy them on a WAN spanning six city datacenters. Evaluation reveals notable improvements compared to existing solutions: < 100 ms of control loop latency, a 37.4% reduction in maximum link utilization, and a 78.9% reduction in average queue length.
papers.abstract_zh:
互联网流量突发通常在一秒钟内发生，因此传统的突发缓解方法忽略了流量工程（TE）的潜力。然而，我们的实验表明，具有亚秒级控制环路延迟的 TE 系统可以有效缓解突发引起的拥塞。基于 TE 的方法可以利用全网络隧道级信息来做出全局明智的决策（例如，平衡多条路径之间的流量突发）。我们对减少控制环路延迟的见解是让每个路由器做出本地 TE 决策，但这带来了与集中式 TE 系统相比最小化性能损失的关键挑战。

在本文中，我们提出了 RedTE，这是一种新型分布式 TE 系统，其控制循环延迟< 100 ms，同时实现了与集中式 TE 系统相当的性能。 RedTE 的创新之处在于将 TE 建模为分布式协作多智能体问题，并设计了一种新颖的多智能体深度强化学习算法来解决该问题，该算法使每个智能体能够仅根据本地信息做出全局明智的决策。我们实施真正的 RedTE 路由器并将其部署在跨越六个城市数据中心的 WAN 上。评估显示，与现有解决方案相比，有显着改进：控制循环延迟小于 100 毫秒，最大链路利用率减少 37.4%，平均队列长度减少 78.9%。

papers.title: Relational Network Verification.
papers.abstract:
Relational network verification is a new approach for validating network changes. In contrast to traditional network verification, which analyzes specifications for a single network snapshot, it analyzes specifications that capture similarities and differences between two network snapshots (e.g., pre- and post-change snapshots). Relational specifications are compact and precise because they focus on the flows and paths that change between snapshots and then simply mandate that all other network behaviors "stay the same", without enumerating them. To achieve similar guarantees, single-snapshot specifications would need to enumerate all flow and path behaviors that are not expected to change in order to enable checking that nothing has accidentally changed. Such specifications are proportional to network size, which makes them impractical to generate for many real-world networks.

We demonstrate the value of relational reasoning by developing Rela, a high-level relational specification language and verification tool for network changes. Rela compiles input specifications and network snapshot representations to finite state automata, and it then verifies compliance by checking automaton equivalence. Our experiments using data from a global backbone with over 10 3 routers find that Rela specifications need fewer than 10 terms for 93% of the complex, high-risk changes. Rela validates 80% of the changes within 20 minutes.
papers.abstract_zh:
关系网络验证是一种验证网络更改的新方法。与分析单个网络快照规范的传统网络验证相反，它分析捕获两个网络快照（例如，更改前和更改后快照）之间的相似性和差异的规范。关系规范紧凑而精确，因为它们关注快照之间变化的流和路径，然后简单地要求所有其他网络行为“保持不变”，而不枚举它们。为了实现类似的保证，单快照规范需要枚举所有预计不会更改的流和路径行为，以便能够检查是否没有任何意外更改。此类规范与网络规模成正比，这使得为许多现实世界的网络生成它们是不切实际的。

我们通过开发 Rela（一种高级关系规范语言和网络变化验证工具）来展示关系推理的价值。 Rela 将输入规范和网络快照表示编译为有限状态自动机，然后通过检查自动机等效性来验证合规性。我们使用来自具有超过 10 3 个路由器的全球主干网的数据进行的实验发现，对于 93% 的复杂、高风险变更，Rela 规范只需要不到 10 个术语。 Rela 在 20 分钟内验证 80% 的更改。

papers.title: Rethinking Machine Learning Collective Communication as a Multi-Commodity Flow Problem.
papers.abstract: Cloud operators utilize collective communication optimizers to enhance the efficiency of the single-tenant, centrally managed training clusters they manage. However, current optimizers struggle to scale for such use cases and often compromise solution quality for scalability. Our solution, TE-CCL, adopts a traffic-engineering-based approach to collective communication. Compared to a state-of-the-art optimizer, TACCL, TE-CCL produced schedules with 2× better performance on topologies TACCL supports (and its solver took a similar amount of time as TACCL's heuristic-based approach). TECCL additionally scales to larger topologies than TACCL. On our GPU testbed, TE-CCL outperformed TACCL by 2.14× and RCCL by 3.18× in terms of algorithm bandwidth.
papers.abstract_zh: 云运营商利用集体通信优化器来提高他们管理的单租户集中管理培训集群的效率。然而，当前的优化器很难针对此类用例进行扩展，并且经常会为了可扩展性而牺牲解决方案的质量。我们的解决方案TE-CCL采用基于流量工程的方法进行集体通信。与最先进的优化器 TACCL 相比，TE-CCL 生成的调度表在 TACCL 支持的拓扑上性能提高了 2 倍（其求解器花费的时间与 TACCL 基于启发式的方法相似）。 TECCL 还可以扩展到比 TACCL 更大的拓扑。在我们的 GPU 测试台上，就算法带宽而言，TE-CCL 的性能优于 TACCL 2.14 倍，优于 RCCL 3.18 倍。

papers.title: Shale: A Practical, Scalable Oblivious Reconfigurable Network.
papers.abstract:
Circuit-switched technologies have long been proposed for handling high-throughput traffic in datacenter networks, but recent developments in nanosecond-scale reconfiguration have created the enticing possibility of handling low-latency traffic as well. The novel Oblivious Reconfigurable Network (ORN) design paradigm promises to deliver on this possibility. Prior work in ORN designs achieved latencies that scale linearly with system size, making them unsuitable for large-scale deployments. Recent theoretical work showed that ORNs can achieve far better latency scaling, proposing theoretical ORN designs that are Pareto optimal in latency and throughput.

In this work, we bridge multiple gaps between theory and practice to develop Shale, the first ORN capable of providing low-latency networking at datacenter scale while still guaranteeing high throughput. By interleaving multiple Pareto optimal schedules in parallel, both latency- and throughput-sensitive flows can achieve optimal performance. To achieve the theoretical low latencies in practice, we design a new congestion control mechanism which is best suited to the characteristics of Shale. In datacenter-scale packet simulations, our design compares favorably with both an in-network congestion mitigation strategy, modern receiver-driven protocols such as NDP, and an idealized analog for sender-driven protocols. We implement an FPGA-based prototype of Shale, achieving orders of magnitude better resource scaling than existing ORN proposals. Finally, we extend our congestion control solution to handle node and link failures.
papers.abstract_zh:
电路交换技术长期以来一直被提议用于处理数据中心网络中的高吞吐量流量，但纳秒级重新配置的最新发展也创造了处理低延迟流量的诱人可能性。新颖的不经意可重构网络（ORN）设计范式有望实现这种可能性。 ORN 设计中的先前工作实现了随系统规模线性扩展的延迟，这使得它们不适合大规模部署。最近的理论工作表明，ORN 可以实现更好的延迟扩展，并提出了延迟和吞吐量方面帕累托最优的理论 ORN 设计。

在这项工作中，我们弥合了理论与实践之间的多重差距，开发了 Shale，这是第一个能够在数据中心规模提供低延迟网络同时仍保证高吞吐量的 ORN。通过并行交错多个帕累托最优调度，延迟和吞吐量敏感的流都可以实现最佳性能。为了在实践中实现理论上的低延迟，我们设计了一种最适合Shale特点的新的拥塞控制机制。在数据中心规模的数据包模拟中，我们的设计与网络内拥塞缓解策略、现代接收器驱动协议（例如 NDP）以及发送器驱动协议的理想模拟相比具有优势。我们实现了基于 FPGA 的 Shale 原型，实现了比现有 ORN 提案好几个数量级的资源扩展。最后，我们扩展了拥塞控制解决方案来处理节点和链路故障。

papers.title: SODA: An Adaptive Bitrate Controller for Consistent High-Quality Video Streaming.
papers.abstract: The primary objective of adaptive bitrate (ABR) streaming is to enhance users' quality of experience (QoE) by dynamically adjusting the video bitrate in response to changing network conditions. However, users often find frequent bitrate switching frustrating due to the resulting inconsistency in visual quality over time, especially during live streaming when buffer lengths are short. In this paper, we propose a practical smoothness optimized dynamic adaptive (SODA) controller that specifically addresses this problem while remaining deployable. SODA is backed by theoretical guarantees and has shown superior performance in empirical evaluations. Specifically, our numerical simulations show a 9.55% to 27.8% QoE improvement and our prototype evaluation shows a 30.4% QoE improvement compared to the state-of-the-art baselines. In order to be widely deployable, SODA performs bitrate horizon planning in polynomial time compared to brute force approaches that suffer from exponential complexity. To demonstrate its real-world practicality, we deployed SODA on a wide range of devices within the production network of Amazon Prime Video. Production experiments show that SODA reduced bitrate switching by up to 88.8% and increased average stream viewing duration by up to 5.91% compared to a fine-tuned production baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 自适应比特率 (ABR) 流媒体的主要目标是通过动态调整视频比特率来响应不断变化的网络条件，从而提高用户的体验质量 (QoE)。然而，用户经常发现频繁的比特率切换令人沮丧，因为随着时间的推移，视觉质量会不一致，尤其是在缓冲区长度较短的直播过程中。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的平滑度优化动态自适应（SODA）控制器，专门解决这个问题，同时保持可部署性。 SODA 有理论保证，并在实证评估中表现出优越的性能。具体来说，我们的数值模拟显示 QoE 提高了 9.55% 至 27.8%，我们的原型评估显示与最先进的基准相比 QoE 提高了 30.4%。为了广泛部署，SODA 在多项式时间内执行比特率水平规划，而暴力方法则具有指数复杂性。为了展示其现实世界的实用性，我们在 Amazon Prime Video 制作网络内的各种设备上部署了 SODA。生产实验表明，与微调的生产基准相比，SODA 将比特率切换减少了高达 88.8%，并将平均流观看持续时间延长了高达 5.91%。

papers.title: SUSS: Improving TCP Performance by Speeding Up Slow-Start.
papers.abstract: The traditional slow-start mechanism in TCP can result in slow ramping-up of the data delivery rate, inefficient bandwidth utilization, and prolonged completion time for small-size flows, especially in networks with a large bandwidth-delay product ( BDP ). Existing solutions either only work in specific situations, or require network assistance, making them challenging (if even possible) to deploy. This paper presents SUSS (Speeding Up Slow Start): a lightweight, sender-side add-on to the traditional slow-start mechanism, that aims to safely expedite the growth of the congestion window when a flow is significantly below its optimal fair share of the available bandwidth. SUSS achieves this by accelerating the growth in cwnd when exponential growth is predicted to continue in the next round. SUSS employs a novel combination of ACK clocking and packet pacing to effectively mitigate traffic burstiness caused by accelerated increases in cwnd. We have implemented SUSS in the Linux kernel, integrated into the CUBIC congestion control algorithm. Our real-world experiments span many device types and Internet locations, demonstrating that SUSS consistently outperforms traditional slow-start with no measured negative impacts. SUSS achieves over 20% improvement in flow completion time in all experiments with flow sizes less than 5MB and RTT larger than 50 ms.
papers.abstract_zh: TCP 中传统的慢启动机制会导致数据传输速率缓慢上升、带宽利用率低下以及小规模流的完成时间延长，尤其是在具有较大带宽延迟积 (BDP) 的网络中。现有的解决方案要么只能在特定情况下工作，要么需要网络帮助，这使得它们的部署具有挑战性（如果可能的话）。本文介绍了 SUSS（加速慢启动）：传统慢启动机制的轻量级发送方附加组件，旨在当流量明显低于其可用带宽的最佳公平份额时，安全地加速拥塞窗口的增长。当预测下一轮将继续呈指数增长时，SUSS 通过加速 cwnd 的增长来实现这一目标。 SUSS 采用 ACK 时钟和数据包调步的新颖组合来有效缓解 cwnd 加速增加引起的流量突发。我们在Linux内核中实现了SUSS，并集成到了CUBIC拥塞控制算法中。我们的现实世界实验涵盖了许多设备类型和互联网位置，证明 SUSS 始终优于传统的慢启动，并且没有测量到负面影响。在流大小小于 5MB 且 RTT 大于 50 ms 的所有实验中，SUSS 的流完成时间提高了 20% 以上。

papers.title: Ten years of the Venezuelan crisis - An Internet perspective.
papers.abstract:
The Venezuelan crisis, unfolding over the past decade, has garnered international attention due to its impact on various sectors of civil society. While studies have extensively covered the crisis's effects on public health, energy, and water management, this paper delves into a previously unexplored area - the impact on Venezuela's Internet infrastructure. Amidst Venezuela's multifaceted challenges, understanding the repercussions of this critical aspect of modern society becomes imperative for the country's recovery.

Leveraging measurements from various sources, we present a comprehensive view of the changes undergone by the Venezuelan network in the past decade. Our study reveals the significant impact of the crisis captured by different signals, including bandwidth stagnation, limited growth on network infrastructure growth, and high latency compared to the Latin American average. Beyond offering a new perspective on the Venezuelan crisis, our study can help inform attempts at devising strategies for its recovery.
papers.abstract_zh:
过去十年来发生的委内瑞拉危机因其对民间社会各个部门的影响而引起了国际社会的关注。虽然研究广泛涵盖了这场危机对公共卫生、能源和水管理的影响，但本文深入探讨了一个以前未探索过的领域——对委内瑞拉互联网基础设施的影响。在委内瑞拉面临的多方面挑战中，了解现代社会这一关键方面的影响对于该国的复苏至关重要。

利用各种来源的测量结果，我们全面了解了委内瑞拉网络在过去十年中所经历的变化。我们的研究揭示了不同信号捕获的危机的重大影响，包括带宽停滞、网络基础设施增长有限以及与拉丁美洲平均水平相比的高延迟。除了提供关于委内瑞拉危机的新视角之外，我们的研究还可以帮助为制定其复苏战略的尝试提供信息。

papers.title: The Efficacy of the Connect America Fund in Addressing US Internet Access Inequities.
papers.abstract: Residential fixed broadband internet access in the US remains inequitable, despite significant taxpayer investment. This paper evaluates the efficacy of the Connect America Fund (CAF), which subsidizes new broadband monopolies in underserved areas to provide internet access comparable to that in urban regions. CAF's oversight relies heavily on self-reported data from internet service providers (ISPs). Unfortunately, the reliability of this self-reported data has always been open to question. We use the broadband-plan querying tool (BQT) to create a novel dataset that complements ISP-reported information with ISP-advertised broadband plan details from publicly accessible websites for 537k residential addresses across 15 states. Our analysis reveals significant discrepancies, with a serviceability rate of only 55.45%, indicating that a significant fraction of addresses certified as served are still unserved. Furthermore, we observe a compliance rate of only 33.03%, indicating that a significant fraction of served addresses receive download speeds that are non-compliant with the FCC's 10 Mbps threshold for CAF-served addresses. Although we observe that CAF-served addresses occasionally receive higher download speeds than their monopoly-served neighbors, overall, the CAF program has largely failed to achieve its intended goal, leaving many targeted rural communities with inadequate or no broadband connectivity.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管纳税人进行了大量投资，但美国的住宅固定宽带互联网接入仍然不公平。本文评估了连通美国基金 (CAF) 的功效，该基金为服务欠缺地区的新宽带垄断企业提供补贴，以提供与城市地区相当的互联网接入。 CAF 的监督在很大程度上依赖于互联网服务提供商 (ISP) 的自我报告数据。不幸的是，这种自我报告数据的可靠性一直受到质疑。我们使用宽带计划查询工具 (BQT) 创建一个新颖的数据集，该数据集利用来自 15 个州的 537,000 个可公开访问网站的 ISP 公布的宽带计划详细信息来补充 ISP 报告的信息。我们的分析显示存在显着差异，服务可用率仅为 55.45%，这表明很大一部分经认证为服务的地址仍未得到服务。此外，我们观察到合规率仅为 33.03%，这表明很大一部分服务地址的下载速度不符合 FCC 对 CAF 服务地址的 10 Mbps 阈值。尽管我们观察到 CAF 服务的地址偶尔会比其垄断服务的邻居获得更高的下载速度，但总体而言，CAF 计划在很大程度上未能实现其预期目标，导致许多目标农村社区宽带连接不足或根本没有宽带连接。

papers.title: The Next Generation of BGP Data Collection Platforms.
papers.abstract: BGP data collection platforms as currently architected face fundamental challenges that threaten their long-term sustainability. Inspired by recent work, we analyze, prototype, and evaluate a new optimization paradigm for BGP collection. Our system scales data collection with two components: analyzing redundancy between BGP updates and using it to optimize sampling of the incoming streams of BGP data. An appropriate definition of redundancy across updates depends on the analysis objective. Our contributions include: a survey, measurements, and simulations to demonstrate the limitations of current systems; a general framework and algorithms to assess and remove redundancy in BGP observations; and quantitative analysis of the benefit of our approach in terms of accuracy and coverage for several canonical BGP routing analyses such as hijack detection and topology mapping. Finally, we implement and deploy a new BGP peering collection system that automates peering expansion using our redundancy analytics, which provides a path forward for more thorough evaluation of this approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 目前构建的 BGP 数据收集平台面临着威胁其长期可持续性的根本挑战。受最近工作的启发，我们对 BGP 收集的新优化范例进行了分析、原型设计和评估。我们的系统通过两个组件扩展数据收集：分析 BGP 更新之间的冗余并使用它来优化 BGP 数据传入流的采样。更新之间的冗余的适当定义取决于分析目标。我们的贡献包括：通过调查、测量和模拟来证明当前系统的局限性；用于评估和消除 BGP 观察中的冗余的通用框架和算法；并对我们的方法在几种规范 BGP 路由分析（例如劫持检测和拓扑映射）的准确性和覆盖范围方面的优势进行定量分析。最后，我们实施并部署了一个新的 BGP 对等收集系统，该系统使用我们的冗余分析自动进行对等扩展，这为更彻底地评估此方法提供了一条前进的道路。

papers.title: Topaz: Declarative and Verifiable Authoritative DNS at CDN-Scale.
papers.abstract:
Today, when a CDN nameserver receives a DNS query for a customer's domain, it decides which CDN IP to return based on servicelevel objectives such as managing load or maintaining performance, but also internal needs like split testing. Many of these decisions are made a priori by assignment systems that imperatively generate maps from DNS query to IP address(es). Unfortunately, imperative assignments obfuscate nameserver behavior, especially when different objectives conflict.

In this paper we present Topaz, a new authoritative nameserver architecture for anycast CDNs which encodes DNS objectives as declarative, modular programs called policies. Nameservers execute policies directly in response to live queries. To understand or change DNS behavior, operators simply read or modify the list of policy programs. In addition, because policies are written in a formally-verified domain-specific language (topaz-lang), Topaz can detect policy conflicts before deployment. Topaz handles ~1M DNS queries per second at a global CDN, dynamically deciding addresses for millions of names on six continents. We evaluate Topaz and show that the latency overheads it introduces are acceptable.
papers.abstract_zh:
如今，当 CDN 名称服务器收到对客户域的 DNS 查询时，它会根据服务级别目标（例如管理负载或维护性能）以及内部需求（例如拆分测试）来决定返回哪个 CDN IP。其中许多决策都是由分配系统先验做出的，这些系统强制生成从 DNS 查询到 IP 地址的映射。不幸的是，命令式分配会混淆名称服务器的行为，尤其是当不同的目标发生冲突时。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Topaz，这是一种用于选播 CDN 的新权威名称服务器架构，它将 DNS 目标编码为称为策略的声明性模块化程序。名称服务器直接执行策略来响应实时查询。要了解或更改 DNS 行为，运营商只需读取或修改策略程序列表即可。此外，由于策略是用经过正式验证的特定于域的语言 (topaz-lang) 编写的，因此 Topaz 可以在部署之前检测到策略冲突。 Topaz 在全球 CDN 上每秒处理约 100 万个 DNS 查询，动态确定六大洲数百万个名称的地址。我们评估了 Topaz 并表明它引入的延迟开销是可以接受的。

papers.title: TopFull: An Adaptive Top-Down Overload Control for SLO-Oriented Microservices.
papers.abstract:
Microservice has become a de facto standard for building large-scale cloud applications.
