papers.title: LiveNet: a low-latency video transport network for large-scale live streaming.
papers.abstract: Low-latency live streaming has imposed stringent latency requirements on video transport networks. In this paper we report on the design and operation of the Alibaba low-latency video transport network, LiveNet. LiveNet builds on a flat CDN overlay with a centralized controller for global optimization. As part of this, we present our design of the global routing computation and path assignment, as well as our fast data transmission architecture with fine-grained control of video frames. The performance results obtained from three years of operation demonstrate the effectiveness of LiveNet in improving CDN performance and QoE metrics. Compared with our prior state-of-the-art hierarchical CDN deployment, LiveNet halves the CDN delay and ensures 98% of views do not experience stalls and that 95% can start playback within 1 second. We further report our experiences of running LiveNet over the last 3 years.
papers.abstract_zh: 低时延直播对视频传输网络提出了严格的时延要求。在本文中，我们报告了阿里巴巴低延迟视频传输网络 LiveNet 的设计和运营。 LiveNet 构建在平面 CDN 覆盖之上，并带有用于全局优化的集中控制器。作为其中的一部分，我们介绍了全局路由计算和路径分配的设计，以及具有视频帧细粒度控制的快速数据传输架构。三年运行获得的性能结果证明了LiveNet在提高CDN性能和QoE指标方面的有效性。与我们之前最先进的分层 CDN 部署相比，LiveNet 将 CDN 延迟减半，并确保 98% 的观看不会出现卡顿，并且 95% 的观看可以在 1 秒内开始播放。我们进一步报告过去 3 年运行 LiveNet 的经验。

papers.title: Meissa: scalable network testing for programmable data planes.
papers.abstract: Ensuring the correctness of programmable data planes is important. Testing offers comprehensive correctness checking, including detecting both code bugs and non-code bugs. However, scalability is a key challenge for testing production-scale data planes to achieve high coverage. This paper presents Meissa, a scalable network testing system for programmable data planes with full path coverage. The core of Meissa is a domain-specific code summary technique that simplifies the control flow graph of a data plane program for scalable testing without sacrificing coverage. Code summary decomposes a data plane program into individual pipelines, and summarizes each pipeline with a succinct representation. We formally prove that Meissa with code summary achieves 100% path coverage . We use both open-source and production-scale data plane programs to evaluate Meissa. The evaluation shows that ( i ) Meissa is able to test production-scale data plane programs that cannot be supported by state-of-the-art efforts, and (ii) besides P4 code bugs, Meissa is able to not only identify known non-code bugs, but also detect previously-unknown non-code bugs. We also share in this paper several real cases tested by Meissa in a production programmable data plane.
papers.abstract_zh: 确保可编程数据平面的正确性非常重要。测试提供全面的正确性检查，包括检测代码错误和非代码错误。然而，可扩展性是测试生产规模数据平面以实现高覆盖率的关键挑战。本文介绍了 Meissa，这是一种用于具有全路径覆盖的可编程数据平面的可扩展网络测试系统。 Meissa 的核心是一种特定于域的代码摘要技术，可简化数据平面程序的控制流图，以在不牺牲覆盖范围的情况下进行可扩展测试。代码摘要将数据平面程序分解为单独的管道，并用简洁的表示总结每个管道。我们正式证明带有代码摘要的 Meissa 实现了 100% 的路径覆盖率。我们使用开源和生产规模的数据平面程序来评估 Meissa。评估表明，(i)Meissa 能够测试最先进的技术无法支持的生产规模数据平面程序，(ii)除了 P4 代码错误之外，Meissa 不仅能够识别已知的非代码错误，还能够检测以前未知的非代码错误。我们还在本文中分享了 Meissa 在生产可编程数据平面中测试的几个真实案例。

papers.title: Mobile access bandwidth in practice: measurement, analysis, and implications.
papers.abstract: Recent advances in mobile technologies such as 5G and WiFi 6E do not seem to deliver the promised mobile access bandwidth. To effectively characterize mobile access bandwidth in the wild, we work with a major commercial mobile bandwidth testing app to analyze mobile access bandwidths of 3.54M end users in China, based on fine-grained measurement and diagnostic information. Our analysis presents a surprising and frustrating fact---in the past two years, the average WiFi bandwidth remains largely unchanged, while the average 4G/5G bandwidth decreases remarkably. Our analysis further reveals the root causes---the bottlenecks in the underlying infrastructure ( e.g ., devices and wired Internet access) and side effects of aggressively migrating radio resources from 4G to 5G---with implications on closing the technology gaps. Additionally, our analysis provides insights on building ultra-fast, ultra-light bandwidth testing services (BTSes) at scale. Our new design dramatically reduces the test time of the commercial BTS from 10 seconds to 1 second on average, with a 15× reduction on the backend cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 5G 和 WiFi 6E 等移动技术的最新进展似乎并未提供承诺的移动接入带宽。为了有效地表征真实的移动接入带宽，我们与一家主要的商业移动带宽测试应用程序合作，根据细粒度的测量和诊断信息来分析中国 354 万最终用户的移动接入带宽。我们的分析呈现了一个令人惊讶和沮丧的事实——在过去两年中，平均 WiFi 带宽基本保持不变，而平均 4G/5G 带宽则显着下降。我们的分析进一步揭示了根本原因——底层基础设施（例如设备和有线互联网接入）的瓶颈以及积极将无线电资源从 4G 迁移到 5G 的副作用——对缩小技术差距具有影响。此外，我们的分析还提供了有关大规模构建超快、超轻带宽测试服务 (BTS) 的见解。我们的新设计将商用 BTS 的测试时间从平均 10 秒大幅缩短至 1 秒，后端成本降低了 15 倍。

papers.title: Multi-resource interleaving for deep learning training.
papers.abstract:
Training Deep Learning (DL) model requires multiple resource types, including CPUs, GPUs, storage IO, and network IO. Advancements in DL have produced a wide spectrum of models that have diverse usage patterns on different resource types. Existing DL schedulers focus on only GPU allocation, while missing the opportunity of packing jobs along multiple resource types.

We present Muri, a multi-resource cluster scheduler for DL workloads. Muri exploits multi-resource interleaving of DL training jobs to achieve high resource utilization and reduce job completion time (JCT). DL jobs have a unique staged, iterative computation pattern. In contrast to multi-resource schedulers for big data workloads that pack jobs in the space dimension, Muri leverages this unique pattern to interleave jobs on the same set of resources in the time dimension. Muri adapts Blossom algorithm to find the perfect grouping plan for single-GPU jobs with two resource types, and generalizes the algorithm to handle multi-GPU jobs with more than two types. We build a prototype of Muri and integrate it with PyTorch. Experiments on a cluster with 64 GPUs demonstrate that Muri improves the average JCT by up to 3.6× and the makespan by up to 1.6× over existing DL schedulers.
papers.abstract_zh:
训练深度学习（DL）模型需要多种资源类型，包括CPU、GPU、存储IO和网络IO。深度学习的进步产生了各种各样的模型，这些模型对不同的资源类型具有不同的使用模式。现有的深度学习调度程序仅关注 GPU 分配，而错过了将作业打包到多种资源类型的机会。

我们推出了 Muri，一种用于深度学习工作负载的多资源集群调度程序。 Muri 利用 DL 训练作业的多资源交错来实现高资源利用率并减少作业完成时间 (JCT)。深度学习作业具有独特的分阶段迭代计算模式。与在空间维度打包作业的​​大数据工作负载的多资源调度程序相比，Muri 利用这种独特的模式在时间维度的同一组资源上交错作业。 Muri 采用 Blossom 算法为具有两种资源类型的单 GPU 作业找到完美的分组计划，并将该算法推广到处理具有两种以上类型的多 GPU 作业。我们构建了 Muri 的原型并将其与 PyTorch 集成。在具有 64 个 GPU 的集群上进行的实验表明，与现有的深度学习调度器相比，Muri 将平均 JCT 提高了 3.6 倍，将完工时间提高了 1.6 倍。

papers.title: Network entitlement: contract-based network sharing with agility and SLO guarantees.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Meta's Production Wide Area Network (WAN) Entitlement solution used by thousands of Meta's services to share the network safely and efficiently. We first introduce the Network Entitlement problem, i.e., how to share WAN bandwidth across services with flexibility and SLO guarantees. We present a new abstraction entitlement contract , which is stable, simple, and operationally friendly . The contract defines services' network quota and is set up between the network team and services teams to govern their obligations. Our framework includes two key parts: (1) an entitlement granting system that establishes an agile contract while achieving network efficiency and meeting long-term SLO guarantees, and (2) a large-scale distributed run-time enforcement system that enforces the contract on the production traffic. We demonstrate its effectiveness through extensive simulations and real-world end-to-end tests. The system has been deployed and operated for over two years in production. We hope that our years of experience provide a new angle to viewing WAN network sharing in production and will inspire follow-up research.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Meta 的生产广域网 (WAN) 授权解决方案，数千个 Meta 服务使用该解决方案来安全高效地共享网络。我们首先介绍网络授权问题，即如何灵活地在服务之间共享 WAN 带宽并保证 SLO。我们提出了一种新的抽象权利合约，它稳定、简单且操作友好。该合同定义了服务的网络配额，并在网络团队和服务团队之间建立，以管理他们的义务。我们的框架包括两个关键部分：（1）一个权利授予系统，用于建立敏捷合同，同时实现网络效率并满足长期 SLO 保证；（2）一个大规模分布式运行时执行系统，用于在生产流量上执行合同。我们通过广泛的模拟和现实世界的端到端测试来证明其有效性。该系统已在生产中部署和运行了两年多。我们希望我们多年的经验能够提供一个新的视角来看待生产中的广域网网络共享，并激发后续研究。

papers.title: NeuroScaler: neural video enhancement at scale.
papers.abstract: High-definition live streaming has experienced tremendous growth. However, the video quality of live video is often limited by the streamer's uplink bandwidth. Recently, neural-enhanced live streaming has shown great promise in enhancing the video quality by running neural super-resolution at the ingest server. Despite its benefit, it is too expensive to be deployed at scale. To overcome the limitation, we present NeuroScaler, a framework that delivers efficient and scalable neural enhancement for live streams. First, to accelerate end-to-end neural enhancement, we propose novel algorithms that significantly reduce the overhead of video super-resolution, encoding, and GPU context switching. Second, to maximize the overall quality gain, we devise a resource scheduler that considers the unique characteristics of the neural-enhancing workload. Our evaluation on a public cloud shows NeuroScaler reduces the overall cost by 22.3× and 3.0--11.1× compared to the latest per-frame and selective neural-enhancing systems, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 高清直播经历了巨大的增长。然而，直播视频的视频质量往往受到流媒体上行带宽的限制。最近，神经增强直播在通过在摄取服务器上运行神经超分辨率来提高视频质量方面显示出了巨大的前景。尽管有它的好处，但大规模部署成本太高。为了克服这一限制，我们推出了 NeuroScaler，这是一个为直播流提供高效且可扩展的神经增强的框架。首先，为了加速端到端神经增强，我们提出了新颖的算法，可以显着减少视频超分辨率、编码和 GPU 上下文切换的开销。其次，为了最大限度地提高整体质量，我们设计了一个资源调度程序，该调度程序考虑了神经增强工作负载的独特特征。我们对公共云的评估表明，与最新的每帧和选择性神经增强系统相比，NeuroScaler 的总体成本分别降低了 22.3 倍和 3.0--11.1 倍。

papers.title: PLB: congestion signals are simple and effective for network load balancing.
papers.abstract:
We present a new, host-based design for link load balancing and report the first experiences of link imbalance in datacenters. Our design, PLB (Protective Load Balancing), builds on transport protocols and ECMP/WCMP to reduce network hotspots. PLB randomly changes the paths of connections that experience congestion, preferring to repath after idle periods to minimize packet reordering. It repaths a connection by changing the IPv6 Flow Label on its packets, which switches include as part of ECMP/WCMP. Across hosts, this action drives down hotspots in the network, and lowers the latency of RPCs.

PLB is used fleetwide at Google for TCP and Pony Express traffic. We could deploy it when other designs were infeasible because PLB requires only small transport modifications and switch configuration changes, and is backwards-compatible. It has produced excellent gains: the median utilization imbalance of highly-loaded ToR uplinks in Google datacenters fell by 60%, packet drops correspondingly fell by 33%, and the tail latency (99p) of small RPCs fell by 20%. PLB is also a general solution that works for settings from datacenters to backbone networks, as well as different transports.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们提出了一种新的、基于主机的链路负载平衡设计，并报告了数据中心中链路不平衡的首次经验。我们的设计 PLB（保护性负载平衡）建立在传输协议和 ECMP/WCMP 的基础上，以减少网络热点。 PLB 会随机更改遇到拥塞的连接路径，更愿意在空闲期后重新选择路径，以最大程度地减少数据包重新排序。它通过更改其数据包上的 IPv6 流标签来重新指定连接路径，交换机将其作为 ECMP/WCMP 的一部分包含在内。在主机之间，此操作可以减少网络中的热点，并降低 RPC 的延迟。

PLB 在 Google 整个车队中用于 TCP 和 Pony Express 流量。当其他设计不可行时，我们可以部署它，因为 PLB 只需要小的传输修改和交换机配置更改，并且向后兼容。它产生了巨大的收益：Google 数据中心高负载 ToR 上行链路的中位利用率不平衡下降了 60%，丢包率相应下降了 33%，小型 RPC 的尾部延迟 (99p) 下降了 20%。 PLB 也是一种通用解决方案，适用于从数据中心到骨干网络以及不同传输的设置。

papers.title: Practical GAN-based synthetic IP header trace generation using NetShare.
papers.abstract: We explore the feasibility of using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to automatically learn generative models to generate synthetic packet- and flow header traces for networking tasks (e.g., telemetry, anomaly detection, provisioning). We identify key fidelity, scalability, and privacy challenges and tradeoffs in existing GAN-based approaches. By synthesizing domain-specific insights with recent advances in machine learning and privacy, we identify design choices to tackle these challenges. Building on these insights, we develop an end-to-end framework, NetShare. We evaluate NetShare on six diverse packet header traces and find that: (1) across all distributional metrics and traces, it achieves 46% more accuracy than baselines and (2) it meets users' requirements of downstream tasks in evaluating accuracy and rank ordering of candidate approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们探索使用生成对抗网络（GAN）自动学习生成模型来为网络任务（例如遥测、异常检测、配置）生成合成数据包和流标头跟踪的可行性。我们确定了现有基于 GAN 的方法中的关键保真度、可扩展性和隐私挑战以及权衡。通过将特定领域的见解与机器学习和隐私方面的最新进展相结合，我们确定了应对这些挑战的设计选择。基于这些见解，我们开发了一个端到端框架 NetShare。我们在六种不同的数据包标头跟踪上评估 NetShare，发现：(1) 在所有分布指标和跟踪中，它的准确度比基线高 46%；(2) 它满足下游任务在评估候选方法的准确度和排名顺序方面的用户要求。

papers.title: Predictable vFabric on informative data plane.
papers.abstract:
In multi-tenant data centers, each tenant desires reassuring predictability from the virtual network fabric - bandwidth guarantee , work conservation , and bounded tail latency . Achieving these goals simultaneously relies on rapid and precise traffic admission. However, the slow convergence (tens of milliseconds) of prior works can hardly satisfy the increasingly rigorous performance demand under dynamic traffic patterns. Further, state-of-the-art load balance schemes are all guarantee-agnostic and bring great risks on breaking bandwidth guarantee, which is overlooked in prior works.

In this paper, we propose μ Fab, a predictable virtual fabric solution which can (1) explicitly select proper paths for all flows and (2) converge to ideal bandwidth allocation at sub-millisecond timescales. The core idea of μ Fab is to leverage the programmable data plane to build a fusion of an active edge ( e.g ., NIC) and an informative core ( e.g ., switch), where the core sends link status and tenant information to the edge via telemetry to help the latter make a timely and accurate decision on path selection and traffic admission. We fully implement μ Fab with commodity SmartNICs and programmable switches. Evaluations show that μ Fab can keep minimum bandwidth guarantee with high bandwidth utilization and near-optimal transmission latency in various network situations with limited probing bandwidth overhead. Application-level experiments, e.g ., compute and storage scenarios, show that μ Fab can improve QPS by 2.5× and cut tail latency by more than 21× compared to the alternatives.
papers.abstract_zh:
在多租户数据中心中，每个租户都希望虚拟网络结构具有可靠的可预测性——带宽保证、工作保护和有限的尾部延迟。同时实现这些目标依赖于快速、精确的流量准入。然而，现有工作的收敛速度慢（数十毫秒）很难满足动态流量模式下日益严格的性能需求。此外，最先进的负载均衡方案都是与保证无关的，并且会带来破坏带宽保证的巨大风险，而这一点在先前的工作中被忽视了。

在本文中，我们提出了μFab，一种可预测的虚拟结构解决方案，它可以（1）为所有流明确选择正确的路径，（2）在亚毫秒时间尺度上收敛到理想的带宽分配。 μFab的核心思想是利用可编程数据平面构建主动边缘（例如NIC）和信息核心（例如交换机）的融合，其中核心通过遥测向边缘发送链路状态和租户信息，帮助后者及时准确地做出路径选择和流量准入决策。我们利用商用 SmartNIC 和可编程交换机全面实施 μ Fab。评估表明，μFab可以在各种网络情况下以有限的探测带宽开销保持最小带宽保证，具有高带宽利用率和接近最优的传输延迟。应用级实验（例如计算和存储场景）表明，与替代方案相比，μ Fab 可以将 QPS 提高 2.5 倍，并将尾部延迟缩短 21 倍以上。

papers.title: Predicting IPv4 services across all ports.
papers.abstract: Internet-wide scanning is commonly used to understand the topology and security of the Internet. However, IPv4 Internet scans have been limited to scanning only a subset of services---exhaustively scanning all IPv4 services is too costly and no existing bandwidth-saving frameworks are designed to scan IPv4 addresses across all ports. In this work we introduce GPS, a system that efficiently discovers Internet services across all ports. GPS runs a predictive framework that learns from extremely small sample sizes and is highly parallelizable, allowing it to quickly find patterns between services across all 65K ports and a myriad of features. GPS computes service predictions in 13 minutes (four orders of magnitude faster than prior work) and finds 92.5% of services across all ports with 131× less bandwidth, and 204× more precision, compared to exhaustive scanning. GPS is the first work to show that, given at least two responsive IP addresses on a port to train from, predicting the majority of services across all ports is possible and practical.
papers.abstract_zh: 互联网范围内的扫描通常用于了解互联网的拓扑和安全性。然而，IPv4 Internet 扫描仅限于扫描服务的子集——彻底扫描所有 IPv4 服务成本太高，并且现有的带宽节省框架没有设计用于扫描所有端口上的 IPv4 地址。在这项工作中，我们引入了 GPS，这是一个可以有效发现所有端口上的互联网服务的系统。 GPS 运行一个预测框架，该框架可以从极小的样本量中学习，并且具有高度并行性，使其能够快速找到所有 65K 端口和无数功能之间的服务模式。 GPS 可在 13 分钟内计算出服务预测（比之前的工作快四个数量级），并在所有端口上找到 92.5% 的服务，与详尽扫描相比，带宽减少了 131 倍，精度提高了 204 倍。 GPS 是第一个表明，给定端口上至少两个响应 IP 地址进行训练的情况，预测所有端口上的大多数服务是可能且实用的。

papers.title: PrintQueue: performance diagnosis via queue measurement in the data plane.
papers.abstract:
When diagnosing performance anomalies, it is often useful to reason about why a packet experienced the queuing that it did. To that end, we observe that queuing is both a result of historical effects and the current state of the network. Further, both factors involve short and long timescales by nature. Existing work fails to provide insight that satisfies all of these needs.

This paper presents PrintQueue, a practical data-plane monitoring system for tracking the provenance of packet-level delays at both small and large timescales. We propose a set of metrics for describing 'congestion regimes' and present a set of novel data-plane data structures that accurately track those metrics over arbitrary time spans. We implement PrintQueue on a Tofino switch and evaluate it with multiple network traces. Our evaluation shows that the accuracy of PrintQueue is up to 3× times higher while the overhead is 20× times smaller than existing work.
papers.abstract_zh:
在诊断性能异常时，推断数据包为何会经历排队通常很有用。为此，我们观察到排队既是历史影响也是网络当前状态的结果。此外，这两个因素本质上都涉及短期和长期的时间尺度。现有的工作无法提供满足所有这些需求的见解。

本文介绍了 PrintQueue，这是一种实用的数据平面监控系统，用于跟踪小时间尺度和大时间尺度的数据包级延迟的来源。我们提出了一组用于描述“拥塞状况”的指标，并提出了一组新颖的数据平面数据结构，可以在任意时间跨度内准确跟踪这些指标。我们在 Tofino 交换机上实现 PrintQueue，并使用多个网络跟踪对其进行评估。我们的评估表明，PrintQueue 的准确性比现有工作高出 3 倍，而开销却减少了 20 倍。

papers.title: Programmable multi-dimensional table filters for line rate network functions.
papers.abstract: The ability to filter entries in the data plane from a set or table of resources (e.g., network paths, servers, switch ports) based on multi-dimensional policies over stateful resource-specific metrics (e.g., filter paths with utilization < 0.6 and latency < 3us) is critical for several key network functions, such as performance-aware routing, resource-aware load balancing, network diagnosis, security and firewall. However, current generation of programmable switches do not support table-wide stateful filtering at line rate. We present Thanos , which augments the existing programmable switch pipeline with support for programmable multi-dimensional filtering over a set of resources. Thanos seamlessly integrates with multi-terabit programmable switch pipelines at nominal chip area overhead. Our evaluation, based on an FPGA prototype and a simulator, shows that policies expressed in Thanos can improve the performance of key network functions by up to 1.7× compared to state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于基于状态资源特定指标的多维策略（例如，过滤利用率< 0.6且延迟< 3us的路径）从一组或表的资源（例如网络路径、服务器、交换机端口）中过滤数据平面中的条目的能力对于多个关键网络功能（例如性能感知路由、资源感知负载平衡、网络诊断、安全和防火墙）至关重要。然而，当前一代的可编程交换机不支持线速的表范围状态过滤。我们推出了 Thanos，它通过支持对一组资源的可编程多维过滤来增强现有的可编程开关管道。 Thanos 以标称芯片面积开销与多太比特可编程交换机管道无缝集成。我们基于 FPGA 原型和模拟器的评估表明，与最先进的技术相比，Thanos 中表达的策略可以将关键网络功能的性能提高高达 1.7 倍。

papers.title: Retina: analyzing 100GbE traffic on commodity hardware.
papers.abstract: As network speeds have increased to over 100 Gbps, operators and researchers have lost the ability to easily ask complex questions of reassembled and parsed network traffic. In this paper, we introduce Retina, a software framework that lets users analyze over 100 Gbps of real-world traffic on a single server with no specialized hardware. Retina supports running arbitrary user-defined analysis functions on a wide variety of extensible data representations ranging from raw packets to parsed application-layer handshakes. We introduce a novel filtering mechanism and subscription interface to safely and efficiently process high-speed traffic. Under the hood, Retina implements an efficient data pipeline that strategically discards unneeded traffic and defers expensive processing operations to preserve computation for complex analyses. We present the framework architecture, evaluate its performance on production traffic, and explore several applications. Our experiments show that Retina is capable of running sophisticated analyses at over 100 Gbps on a single commodity server and can support 5--100× higher traffic rates than existing solutions, dramatically reducing the effort to complete investigations on real-world networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着网络速度增加到超过 100 Gbps，运营商和研究人员已经失去了轻松询问重新组装和解析网络流量的复杂问题的能力。在本文中，我们介绍了 Retina，这是一个软件框架，允许用户在单个服务器上分析超过 100 Gbps 的实际流量，而无需专门的硬件。 Retina 支持在各种可扩展数据表示上运行任意用户定义的分析函数，范围从原始数据包到解析的应用程序层握手。我们引入了一种新颖的过滤机制和订阅接口来安全有效地处理高速流量。在底层，Retina 实现了一个高效的数据管道，可以战略性地丢弃不需要的流量并推迟昂贵的处理操作，以保留复杂分析的计算。我们介绍了框架架构，评估了其在生产流量上的性能，并探索了几种应用程序。我们的实验表明，Retina 能够在单个商用服务器上以超过 100 Gbps 的速度运行复杂的分析，并且可以支持比现有解决方案高 5--100 倍的流量速率，从而大大减少了完成实际网络调查的工作量。

papers.title: RF-protect: privacy against device-free human tracking.
papers.abstract: The advent of radio sensing that works through walls & obstacles challenges the notion of indoor privacy. An eavesdropper can deploy such sensing to snoop on their neighbors and a smart sensor embedded with such sensing capabilities can perform large scale behavioral and health data mining. We present RF-Protect, a new framework that enables privacy by injecting fake humans in the sensed data. RF-Protect consists of a novel hardware reflector design that modifies radio waves to create reflections at arbitrary locations in the environment and a new generative mechanism to create realistic human trajectories. RF-Protect's design doesn't require any high bandwidth hardware or physical motion. We implement RF-Protect using commodity hardware and validate its ability to generate fake human trajectories.
papers.abstract_zh: 穿过墙壁和障碍物的无线电传感技术的出现对室内隐私的概念提出了挑战。窃听者可以部署此类传感来窥探邻居，而嵌入此类传感功能的智能传感器可以执行大规模行为和健康数据挖掘。我们提出了 RF-Protect，这是一种新框架，通过在感测数据中注入假人来实现隐私。 RF-Protect 包含一种新颖的硬件反射器设计，可修改无线电波以在环境中的任意位置产生反射，以及一种新的生成机制，可创建真实的人体轨迹。 RF-Protect 的设计不需要任何高带宽硬件或物理运动。我们使用商用硬件实施 RF-Protect，并验证其生成虚假人体轨迹的能力。

papers.title: SDN in the stratosphere: loon's aerospace mesh network.
papers.abstract:
The Loon project provided 4G LTE connectivity to under-served regions in emergency response and commercial mobile contexts using base stations carried by high-altitude balloons. To backhaul data, Loon orchestrated a moving mesh network of point-to-point radio links that interconnected balloons with each other and to ground infrastructure. This paper presents insights from 3 years of operational experience with Loon's mesh network above 3 continents.

The challenging environment, comparable to many emerging non-terrestrial networks (NTNs), highlighted the design continuum between predictive optimization and reactive recovery. By forecasting the physical environment as a part of network planning, our novel Temporospatial SDN (TS-SDN) successfully moved from reactive to predictive recovery in many cases. We present insights on the following NTN concerns: connecting meshes of moving nodes using long distance, directional point-to-point links; employing a hybrid network control plane to balance performance and reliability; and understanding the behavior of a complex system spanning physical and logical domains in an inaccessible environment. The paper validates TS-SDN as a compelling architecture for orchestrating networks of moving platforms and steerable beams, and provides insights for those building similar networks in the future.
papers.abstract_zh:
Loon 项目使用高空气球携带的基站，为紧急响应和商业移动环境中服务欠缺的地区提供 4G LTE 连接。为了回传数据，Loon 精心设计了一个由点对点无线电链路组成的移动网状网络，将气球彼此互连并与地面基础设施互连。本文介绍了 Loon 网状网络在三大洲 3 年运营经验的见解。

与许多新兴的非地面网络（NTN）相比，充满挑战的环境突出了预测优化和反应恢复之间的设计连续性。通过将预测物理环境作为网络规划的一部分，我们的新型时空 SDN (TS-SDN) 在许多情况下成功地从反应性恢复转变为预测性恢复。我们对以下 NTN 问题提出见解：使用长距离、定向点对点链路连接移动节点的网格；采用混合网络控制平面来平衡性能和可靠性；并了解在难以访问的环境中跨越物理和逻辑域的复杂系统的行为。该论文验证了 TS-SDN 作为编排移动平台和可操纵波束网络的引人注目的架构，并为未来构建类似网络的人员提供了见解。

papers.title: SEED: a SIM-based solution to 5G failures.
papers.abstract: Failures in 5G mobile networks are becoming the norm with the ongoing global rollout. If left unattended, they affect mobile user experiences and the proper functioning of applications. In this work, we describe SEED, which offers a novel SIM-based solution to 5G failure diagnosis and handling. SEED infers failure causes by exploiting current standardized 5G error codes and decision-tree/online learning algorithms. It further takes corresponding multi-tier reset/redo actions (reset protocol operations, refresh outdated configurations, reload profiles, etc.) once the failure cause is inferred. SEED takes the operator's perspective in its design for fast deployment. SEED design works within the 5G standard framework and does not require changes on the device firmware or infrastructure hardware. Our evaluation has confirmed the viability of SEED.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 5G 移动网络的不断推出，故障正在成为常态。如果无人看管，它们会影响移动用户体验和应用程序的正常运行。在这项工作中，我们描述了 SEED，它为 5G 故障诊断和处理提供了一种基于 SIM 的新颖解决方案。 SEED 通过利用当前标准化 5G 错误代码和决策树/在线学习算法来推断故障原因。一旦推断出故障原因，它就会进一步采取相应的多层重置/重做操作（重置协议操作、刷新过时的配置、重新加载配置文件等）。 SEED 在设计中从运营商的角度出发，以实现快速部署。 SEED 设计在 5G 标准框架内工作，不需要更改设备固件或基础设施硬件。我们的评估证实了 SEED 的可行性。

papers.title: SimBricks: end-to-end network system evaluation with modular simulation.
papers.abstract:
Full system "end-to-end" measurements in physical testbeds are the gold standard for network systems evaluation but are often not feasible. When physical testbeds are not available we frequently turn to simulation for evaluation. Unfortunately, existing simulators are insufficient for end-to-end evaluation, as they either cannot simulate all components, or simulate them with inadequate detail.

We address this through modular simulation, flexibly combining and connecting multiple existing simulators for different components, including processor and memory, devices, and network, into virtual end-to-end testbeds tuned for each use-case. Our architecture, SimBricks, combines well-defined component interfaces for extensibility and modularity, efficient communication channels for local and distributed simulation, and a co-designed efficient synchronization mechanism for accurate timing across simulators. We demonstrate SimBricks scales to 1000 simulated hosts, each running a full software stack including Linux, and that it can simulate testbeds with existing NIC and switch RTL implementations. We also reproduce key findings from prior work in congestion control, NIC architecture, and in-network computing in SimBricks.
papers.abstract_zh:
物理测试台中的完整系统“端到端”测量是网络系统评估的黄金标准，但通常不可行。当物理测试台不可用时，我们经常求助于模拟进行评估。不幸的是，现有的模拟器不足以进行端到端评估，因为它们要么无法模拟所有组件，要么模拟细节不足。

我们通过模块化仿真来解决这个问题，灵活地将不同组件（包括处理器和内存、设备和网络）的多个现有模拟器组合和连接到针对每个用例进行调整的虚拟端到端测试台中。我们的架构 SimBricks 结合了用于可扩展性和模块化的明确定义的组件接口、用于本地和分布式仿真的高效通信通道，以及用于跨模拟器准确计时的共同设计的高效同步机制。我们演示了 SimBricks 可扩展到 1000 个模拟主机，每个主机都运行包括 Linux 在内的完整软件堆栈，并且它可以使用现有 NIC 和交换机 RTL 实现来模拟测试台。我们还重现了 SimBricks 中拥塞控制、NIC 架构和网络内计算方面先前工作的重要发现。

papers.title: Software-defined network assimilation: bridging the last mile towards centralized network configuration management with NAssim.
papers.abstract: On-boarding new devices into an existing SDN network is a pain for network operations (NetOps) teams, because much expert effort is required to bridge the gap between the configuration models of the new devices and the unified data model in the SDN controller. In this work, we present an assistant framework NAssim, to help NetOps accelerate the process of assimilating a new device into a SDN network. Our solution features a unified parser framework to parse diverse device user manuals into preliminary configuration models, a rigorous validator that confirm the correctness of the models via formal syntax analysis, model hierarchy validation and empirical data validation, and a deep-learning-based mapping algorithm that uses state-of-the-art neural language processing techniques to produce human-comprehensible recommended mapping between the validated configuration model and the one in the SDN controller. In all, NAssim liberates the NetOps from most tedious tasks by learning directly from devices' manuals to produce data models which are comprehensible by both the SDN controller and human experts. Our evaluation shows, NAssim can accelerate the assimilation process by 9.1x. In this process, we also identify and correct 243 errors in four mainstream vendors' device manuals, and release a validated and expert-curated dataset of parsed manual corpus for future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 将新设备加入现有 SDN 网络对于网络运营 (NetOps) 团队来说是一件痛苦的事情，因为需要大量专家的努力来弥合新设备的配置模型与 SDN 控制器中的统一数据模型之间的差距。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个辅助框架 NAssim，以帮助 NetOps 加速将新设备融入 SDN 网络的过程。我们的解决方案具有统一的解析器框架，可将不同的设备用户手册解析为初步配置模型；严格的验证器，通过形式语法分析、模型层次验证和经验数据验证来确认模型的正确性；以及基于深度学习的映射算法，该算法使用最先进的神经语言处理技术，在经过验证的配置模型与 SDN 控制器中的配置模型之间生成人类可理解的推荐映射。总之，NAssim 通过直接从设备手册中学习来生成 SDN 控制器和人类专家都可以理解的数据模型，从而将 NetOps 从最繁琐的任务中解放出来。我们的评估表明，NAssim 可以将同化过程加速 9.1 倍。在此过程中，我们还识别并纠正了四家主流供应商的设备手册中的 243 个错误，并发布了经过验证和专家策划的解析手册语料库数据集，以供未来研究。

papers.title: SPRIGHT: extracting the server from serverless computing! high-performance eBPF-based event-driven, shared-memory processing.
papers.abstract:
Serverless computing promises an efficient, low-cost compute capability in cloud environments. However, existing solutions, epitomized by open-source platforms such as Knative, include heavyweight components that undermine this goal of serverless computing. Additionally, such serverless platforms lack dataplane optimizations to achieve efficient, high-performance function chains that facilitate the popular microservices development paradigm. Their use of unnecessarily complex and duplicate capabilities for building function chains severely degrades performance. 'Cold-start' latency is another deterrent.

We describe SPRIGHT, a lightweight, high-performance, responsive serverless framework. SPRIGHT exploits shared memory processing and dramatically improves the scalability of the dataplane by avoiding unnecessary protocol processing and serialization-deserialization overheads. SPRIGHT extensively leverages event-driven processing with the extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF). We creatively use eBPF's socket message mechanism to support shared memory processing, with overheads being strictly load-proportional. Compared to constantly-running, polling-based DPDK, SPRIGHT achieves the same dataplane performance with 10× less CPU usage under realistic workloads. Additionally, eBPF benefits SPRIGHT, by replacing heavyweight serverless components, allowing us to keep functions 'warm' with negligible penalty.

Our preliminary experimental results show that SPRIGHT achieves an order of magnitude improvement in throughput and latency compared to Knative, while substantially reducing CPU usage, and obviates the need for 'cold-start'.
papers.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算有望在云环境中提供高效、低成本的计算能力。然而，以 Knative 等开源平台为代表的现有解决方案包含重量级组件，破坏了无服务器计算的这一目标。此外，此类无服务器平台缺乏数据平面优化来实现高效、高性能的功能链，从而促进流行的微服务开发范例。他们使用不必要的复杂和重复的功能来构建功能链，这严重降低了性能。 “冷启动”延迟是另一个阻碍因素。

我们描述了 SPRIGHT，一个轻量级、高性能、响应式的无服务器框架。 SPRIGHT 利用共享内存处理，通过避免不必要的协议处理和序列化-反序列化开销，显着提高数据平面的可扩展性。 SPRIGHT 广泛利用事件驱动处理和扩展伯克利数据包过滤器 (eBPF)。我们创造性地使用eBPF的套接字消息机制来支持共享内存处理，其开销严格与负载成比例。与持续运行、基于轮询的 DPDK 相比，SPRIGHT 在实际工作负载下实现了相同的数据平面性能，但 CPU 使用率降低了 10 倍。此外，eBPF 通过替换重量级无服务器组件而使 SPRIGHT 受益，使我们能够以可忽略不计的代价保持功能“温暖”。

我们的初步实验结果表明，与 Knative 相比，SPRIGHT 在吞吐量和延迟方面实现了一个数量级的改进，同时大幅降低了 CPU 使用率，并且消除了“冷启动”的需要。

papers.title: Starvation in end-to-end congestion control.
papers.abstract: To overcome weaknesses in traditional loss-based congestion control algorithms (CCAs), researchers have developed and deployed several delay-bounding CCAs that achieve high utilization without bloating delays (e.g., Vegas, FAST, BBR, PCC, Copa, etc.). When run on a path with a fixed bottleneck rate, these CCAs converge to a small delay range in equilibrium. This paper proves a surprising result: although designed to achieve reasonable inter-flow fairness, current methods to develop delay-bounding CCAs cannot always avoid starvation, an extreme form of unfairness. Starvation may occur when such a CCA runs on paths where non-congestive network delay variations due to real-world factors such as ACK aggregation and end-host scheduling exceed double the delay range that the CCA converges to in equilibrium. We provide experimental evidence for this result for BBR, PCC Vivace, and Copa with a link emulator. We discuss the implications of this result and posit that to guarantee no starvation an efficient delay-bounding CCA should design for a certain amount of non-congestive jitter and ensure that its equilibrium delay oscillations are at least one-half of this jitter.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了克服传统基于丢失的拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 的弱点，研究人员开发并部署了几种延迟边界 CCA，这些算法可实现高利用率且不会导致延迟膨胀（例如 Vegas、FAST、BBR、PCC、Copa 等）。当在具有固定瓶颈速率的路径上运行时，这些 CCA 会收敛到一个较小的均衡延迟范围。本文证明了一个令人惊讶的结果：尽管旨在实现合理的流间公平性，但当前开发延迟限制 CCA 的方法始终无法避免饥饿（一种极端形式的不公平）。当这样的 CCA 在由于 ACK 聚合和终端主机调度等实际因素导致的非拥塞网络延迟变化超过 CCA 均衡收敛的延迟范围的两倍的路径上运行时，可能会发生饥饿。我们通过链接模拟器为 BBR、PCC Vivace 和 Copa 提供了这一结果的实验​​证据。我们讨论了这一结果的含义，并假设为了保证不出现饥饿，有效的延迟限制 CCA 应该针对一定量的非拥塞抖动进行设计，并确保其平衡延迟振荡至少是该抖动的一半。

papers.title: Stateful multi-pipelined programmable switches.
papers.abstract: Given the clock rate of a single packet processing pipeline has saturated due to slowdown in transistor scaling, today's programmable switches employ multiple parallel pipelines to meet high packet processing rates. However, parallel processing poses a challenge for stateful packet processing, where it becomes hard to guarantee functional correctness while maintaining line rate processing. This paper presents the design and implementation of MP5 , which is a new switch architecture, compiler, and runtime for multi-pipelined programmable switches that is functionally equivalent to a logical single pipelined switch while also processing packets close to the ideal processing rate, for all packet processing programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于晶体管缩放速度减慢，单个数据包处理管道的时钟速率已经饱和，当今的可编程交换机采用多个并行管道来满足高数据包处理速率。然而，并行处理对有状态数据包处理提出了挑战，在保持线速处理的同时很难保证功能正确性。本文介绍了 MP5 的设计和实现，MP5 是一种新的多流水线可编程交换机的交换机架构、编译器和运行时，其功能相当于逻辑单流水线交换机，同时还能为所有数据包处理程序处理接近理想处理速率的数据包。

papers.title: SurgeProtector: mitigating temporal algorithmic complexity attacks using adversarial scheduling.
papers.abstract:
Denial-of-Service (DoS) attacks are the bane of public-facing network deployments. Algorithmic complexity attacks (ACAs) are a class of DoS attacks where an attacker uses a small amount of adversarial traffic to induce a large amount of work in the target system, pushing the system into overload and causing it to drop packets from innocent users. ACAs are particularly dangerous because, unlike volumetric DoS attacks, ACAs don't require a significant network bandwidth investment from the attacker Today, network functions (NFs) on the Internet must be designed and engineered on a case-by-case basis to mitigate the debilitating impact of ACAs. Further, the resulting designs tend to be overly conservative in their attack mitigation strategy, limiting the innocent traffic that the NF can serve under common-case operation.

In this work, we propose a more general framework to make NFs resilient to ACAs. Our framework, SurgeProtector, uses the NF's scheduler to mitigate the impact of ACAs using a very traditional scheduling algorithm: Weighted Shortest Job First (WSJF). To evaluate SurgeProtector, we propose a new metric of vulnerability called the Displacement Factor (DF), which quantifies the 'harm per unit effort' that an adversary can inflict on the system. We provide novel, adversarial analysis of WSJF and show that any system using this policy has a worst-case DF of only a small constant, where traditional schedulers place no upper bound on the DF. Illustrating that SurgeProtector is not only theoretically, but practically robust, we integrate SurgeProtector into an open source intrusion detection system (IDS). Under simulated attack, the SurgeProtector-augmented IDS suffers 90--99% lower innocent traffic loss than the original system.
papers.abstract_zh:
拒绝服务 (DoS) 攻击是面向公众的网络部署的祸根。 Algorithmic complexity attacks (ACAs) are a class of DoS attacks where an attacker uses a small amount of adversarial traffic to induce a large amount of work in the target system, pushing the system into overload and causing it to drop packets from innocent users. ACAs are particularly dangerous because, unlike volumetric DoS attacks, ACAs don't require a significant network bandwidth investment from the attacker Today, network functions (NFs) on the Internet must be designed and engineered on a case-by-case basis to mitigate the debilitating impact of ACAs. Further, the resulting designs tend to be overly conservative in their attack mitigation strategy, limiting the innocent traffic that the NF can serve under common-case operation.

在这项工作中，我们提出了一个更通用的框架，使 NF 对 ACA 具有弹性。我们的框架 SurgeProtector 使用 NF 的调度程序来减轻 ACA 的影响，该算法使用非常传统的调度算法：加权最短作业优先 (WSJF)。为了评估 SurgeProtector，我们提出了一种新的漏洞指标，称为位移因子 (DF)，它量化了对手可能对系统造成的“每单位努力造成的伤害”。我们提供了 WSJF 的新颖的对抗性分析，并表明任何使用此策略的系统的最坏情况 DF 都只有一个小常数，而传统调度程序没有对 DF 设定上限。我们将 SurgeProtector 集成到开源入侵检测系统 (IDS) 中，这表明 SurgeProtector 不仅在理论上而且在实践中也很强大。在模拟攻击下，SurgeProtector 增强型 IDS 的无辜流量损失比原始系统低 90--99%。

papers.title: SwitchV: automated SDN switch validation with P4 models.
papers.abstract:
Increasing demand on computer networks continuously pushes manufacturers to incorporate novel features and capabilities into their switches at an ever-accelerating pace. However, the traditional approach to switch development relies on informal specifications and handcrafted tests to ensure reliability, which are tedious and slow to maintain and update, effectively putting feature velocity at odds with reliability.

This work describes our experiences following a new approach during the development of switch software stacks that extend fixed-function ASICs with SDN capabilities. Specifically, we focus on SwitchV, our system for automated end-to-end switch validation using fuzzing and symbolic analysis, that evolves effortlessly with the switch specification. Our approach is centered around using the P4 language to model the data plane behavior of the switch as well as its control plane API. Such P4 models are then used as a formal specification by SwitchV, as well as a switch-agnostic contract by SDN controllers, and a living documentation by engineers.

SwitchV found a total of 154 bugs spanning all switch layers. The majority of bugs were highly relevant and fixed within 14 days.
papers.abstract_zh:
对计算机网络日益增长的需求不断推动制造商以不断加快的速度将新颖的特性和功能融入其交换机中。然而，传统的交换机开发方法依赖于非正式的规范和手工测试来确保可靠性，这些方法繁琐且维护和更新缓慢，实际上使功能速度与可靠性相矛盾。

这项工作描述了我们在开发交换机软件堆栈过程中采用新方法的经验，该软件堆栈通过 SDN 功能扩展固定功能 ASIC。具体来说，我们专注于 SwitchV，这是我们使用模糊测试和符号分析进行自动化端到端交换机验证的系统，该系统可以轻松地随着交换机规范的发展而发展。我们的方法主要是使用 P4 语言对交换机的数据平面行为及其控制平面 API 进行建模。然后，SwitchV 将此类 P4 模型用作正式规范，SDN 控制器将其用作与交换机无关的合同，工程师将其用作实时文档。

SwitchV 总共发现了 154 个跨越所有交换机层的错误。大多数错误都高度相关并在 14 天内修复。

papers.title: Symbolic router execution.
papers.abstract: Network verification often requires analyzing properties across different spaces (header space, failure space, or their product) under different failure models (deterministic and/or probabilistic). Existing verifiers efficiently cover the header or failure space, but not both, and efficiently reason about deterministic or probabilistic failures, but not both. Consequently, no single verifier can support all analyses that require different space coverage and failure models. This paper introduces Symbolic Router Execution (SRE), a general and scalable verification engine that supports various analyses. SRE symbolically executes the network model to discover what we call packet failure equivalence classes (PFECs), each of which characterises a unique forwarding behavior across the product space of headers and failures. SRE enables various optimizations during the symbolic execution, while remaining agnostic of the failure model, so it scales to the product space in a general way. By using BDDs to encode symbolic headers and failures, various analyses reduce to graph algorithms (e.g., shortest-path) on the BDDs. Our evaluation using real and synthetic topologies show SRE achieves better or comparable performance when checking reachability, mining specifications, etc. compared to state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络验证通常需要分析不同故障模型（确定性和/或概率性）下不同空间（标头空间、故障空间或其乘积）的属性。现有的验证器可以有效地覆盖标头或故障空间，但不能同时覆盖两者，并且可以有效地推理确定性或概率性故障，但不能同时推理两者。因此，没有一个验证器可以支持需要不同空间覆盖和故障模型的所有分析。本文介绍了符号路由器执行（SRE），这是一种支持各种分析的通用且可扩展的验证引擎。 SRE 象征性地执行网络模型来发现我们所说的数据包故障等价类 (PFEC)，每个类都描述了跨标头和故障的产品空间的独特转发行为。 SRE 在符号执行期间启用各种优化，同时保持与故障模型无关，因此它以通用方式扩展到产品空间。通过使用 BDD 对符号标头和故障进行编码，各种分析可简化为 BDD 上的图算法（例如，最短路径）。我们使用真实和合成拓扑进行的评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，SRE 在检查可达性、挖掘规范等时取得了更好或相当的性能。

papers.title: Time-division TCP for reconfigurable data center networks.
papers.abstract:
Recent proposals for reconfigurable data center networks have shown that providing multiple time-varying paths can improve network capacity and lower physical latency. However, existing TCP variants are ill-suited to utilize available capacity because their congestion control cannot react quickly enough to drastic variations in bandwidth and latency.

We present Time-division TCP (TDTCP), a new TCP variant designed for reconfigurable data center networks. TDTCP recognizes that communication in these fabrics happens over a set of paths, each having its own physical characteristics and cross traffic. TDTCP multiplexes each connection across multiple independent congestion states---one for each distinct path---while managing connection-wide tasks in a shared fashion. It leverages network support to receive timely notification of path changes and promptly matches its local view to the current path. We implement TDTCP in the Linux kernel. Results on an emulated network show that TDTCP improves throughput over both traditional TCP variants, such as DCTCP and CUBIC, and multipath TCP by 24--41% without requiring significant in-network buffering to hide path variations.
papers.abstract_zh:
最近关于可重构数据中心网络的提议表明，提供多个时变路径可以提高网络容量并降低物理延迟。然而，现有的 TCP 变体不适合利用可用容量，因为它们的拥塞控制无法对带宽和延迟的剧烈变化做出足够快的反应。

我们推出时分 TCP (TDTCP)，这是一种专为可重新配置的数据中心网络而设计的新 TCP 变体。 TDTCP 认识到这些结构中的通信发生在一组路径上，每个路径都有自己的物理特性和交叉流量。 TDTCP 跨多个独立的拥塞状态复用每个连接（每个不同的路径对应一个拥塞状态），同时以共享方式管理连接范围的任务。它利用网络支持来及时接收路径变化的通知，并及时将其本地视图与当前路径进行匹配。我们在 Linux 内核中实现了 TDTCP。仿真网络的结果表明，TDTCP 相对于传统 TCP 变体（例如 DCTCP 和 CUBIC）以及多路径 TCP，吞吐量提高了 24--41%，且不需要大量的网络内缓冲来隐藏路径变化。

papers.title: TIPSY: predicting where traffic will ingress a WAN.
papers.abstract:
In addition to consumer workloads, public cloud providers host enterprise workloads such as video conferencing and AI+ML pipelines. Enterprise workloads can, at times, overwhelm the available ingress capacity on individual peering links. Traditional techniques to address this problem in the consumer setting do not always apply here, such as use of CDN caches in eyeball networks.

Ingress congestion events necessitate shifting traffic to other peering links at short timescales. While content providers use such techniques in the egress direction, ingress is inherently a different and more challenging problem. Once a packet leaves an enterprise network, it is subject to opaque routing policies that influence the path to the cloud provider.

We present TIPSY, a statistical-classification-based system for predicting the peering link through which a flow will enter a WAN. TIPSY's predictions are used to safely operate a congestion mitigation system that injects BGP withdrawal messages to redirect traffic away from congested peering links. We train TIPSY on traffic data from the Azure WAN, and we demonstrate 76% accuracy in predicting through which 3 peering links (out of thousands) a flow will enter the network after BGP withdrawals.
papers.abstract_zh:
除了消费者工作负载之外，公共云提供商还托管视频会议和 AI+ML 管道等企业工作负载。有时，企业工作负载可能会超出各个对等互连链路上的可用入口容量。在消费者环境中解决此问题的传统技术并不总是适用于此，例如在眼球网络中使用 CDN 缓存。

入口拥塞事件需要在短时间内将流量转移到其他对等链路。虽然内容提供商在出口方向使用此类技术，但入口本质上是一个不同且更具挑战性的问题。一旦数据包离开企业网络，它就会受到不透明的路由策略的影响，从而影响到云提供商的路径。

我们提出了 TIPSY，这是一种基于统计分类的系统，用于预测流进入 WAN 所通过的对等链路。 TIPSY 的预测用于安全地操作拥塞缓解系统，该系统注入 BGP 撤回消息以将流量重定向，使其远离拥塞的对等链路。我们使用来自 Azure WAN 的流量数据训练 TIPSY，并且我们在预测 BGP 撤回后流量将通过哪 3 个对等链路（数千个）进入网络方面表现出 76% 的准确度。

papers.title: Towards μs tail latency and terabit ethernet: disaggregating the host network stack.
papers.abstract:
Dedicated, tightly integrated, and static packet processing pipelines in today's most widely deployed network stacks preclude them from fully exploiting capabilities of modern hardware.

We present NetChannel, a disaggregated network stack architecture for μ s-scale applications running atop Terabit Ethernet. NetChannel's disaggregated architecture enables independent scaling and scheduling of resources allocated to each layer in the packet processing pipeline. Using an end-to-end NetChannel realization within the Linux network stack, we demonstrate that NetChannel enables new operating points---(1) enabling a single application thread to saturate multi-hundred gigabit access link bandwidth; (2) enabling near-linear scalability for small message processing with number of cores, independent of number of application threads; and, (3) enabling isolation of latency-sensitive applications, allowing them to maintain μ s-scale tail latency even when competing with throughput-bound applications operating at near-line rate.
papers.abstract_zh:
当今部署最广泛的网络堆栈中的专用、紧密集成和静态数据包处理管道使它们无法充分利用现代硬件的功能。

我们推出了 NetChannel，这是一种分解的网络堆栈架构，适用于在太比特以太网上运行的 μs 级应用程序。 NetChannel 的分解架构可以独立扩展和调度分配给数据包处理管道中每一层的资源。使用 Linux 网络堆栈中的端到端 NetChannel 实现，我们证明了 NetChannel 支持新的操作点——(1) 使单个应用程序线程能够饱和数百千兆位访问链路带宽； (2) 为具有多个核心的小消息处理提供近线性可扩展性，与应用程序线程的数量无关； (3) 实现对延迟敏感的应用程序的隔离，使它们即使在与以近线速率运行的吞吐量受限的应用程序竞争时也能保持μs级的尾部延迟。

papers.title: Understanding 5G performance for real-world services: a content provider's perspective.
papers.abstract: 5G has seen rapid growth recently, attracting several measurement studies on its coverage, connectivity and quality of service. However, there is still a lack of understanding of 5G's capabilities and potential impacts from a content provider (CP)'s perspective. This paper fills in this gap by studying 5G networks used by over 23 million users in one year in Kuaishou, a popular crowdsourced live streaming platform. Our measurements provide the following discoveries. i) Standalone (SA) 5G generally provides end-to-end performance improvement as compared with 4G or non-SA (NSA) 5G, but its advantage depends on both the number of cellular users and CP-level configurations. ii) In the radio access network, SA 5G is more sensitive to access density but has better handover tolerance. iii) Controlled experiments with 29 mobile device models on energy consumption refute some "conventional wisdom," including that 5G always consumes more power. iv) Traceroute-based active experiments in over 300 cities show that although users are "closer" to the internet in SA 5G, their end-to-end latency may not benefit from that. Furthermore, we show new design space for 5G participants and provide a 5G-aware rebuffer strategy tested by 9 million viewers in Kuaishou, with a 7% reduction in rebuffer proportion.
papers.abstract_zh: 5G 最近发展迅速，吸引了多项关于其覆盖范围、连接性和服务质量的测量研究。然而，从内容提供商 (CP) 的角度来看，人们仍然缺乏对 5G 功能和潜在影响的了解。本文通过研究流行的众包直播平台快手一年内超过 2300 万用户使用的 5G 网络来填补这一空白。我们的测量提供了以下发现。 i) 与 4G 或非 SA (NSA) 5G 相比，独立 (SA) 5G 通常可提供端到端性能提升，但其优势取决于蜂窝用户数量和 CP 级别配置。 ii) 在无线接入网络中，SA 5G对接入密度更敏感，但具有更好的切换容忍度。 iii) 对 29 种移动设备型号进行的能耗对照实验驳斥了一些“传统观点”，包括 5G 总是消耗更多电量。 iv) 在 300 多个城市进行的基于 Traceroute 的主动实验表明，尽管 SA 5G 中用户距离互联网“更近”，但他们的端到端延迟可能无法从中受益。此外，我们为5G参与者展示了新的设计空间，并提供了经过快手900万观众测试的5G感知rebuffer策略，rebuffer比例降低了7%。

papers.title: Underwater messaging using mobile devices.
papers.abstract:
Since its inception, underwater digital acoustic communication has required custom hardware that neither has the economies of scale nor is pervasive. We present the first acoustic system that brings underwater messaging capabilities to existing mobile devices like smartphones and smart watches. Our software-only solution leverages audio sensors, i.e., microphones and speakers, ubiquitous in today's devices to enable acoustic underwater communication between mobile devices. To achieve this, we design a communication system that in real-time adapts to differences in frequency responses across mobile devices, changes in multipath and noise levels at different locations and dynamic channel changes due to mobility. We evaluate our system in six different real-world underwater environments with depths of 2--15 m in the presence of boats, ships and people fishing and kayaking. Our results show that our system can in real-time adapt its frequency band and achieve bit rates of 100 bps to 1.8 kbps and a range of 30 m. By using a lower bit rate of 10--20 bps, we can further increase the range to 100 m. As smartphones and watches are increasingly being used in underwater scenarios, our software-based approach has the potential to make underwater messaging capabilities widely available to anyone with a mobile device.

Project page with open-source code and data can be found here: https://underwatermessaging.cs.washington.edu/
papers.abstract_zh:
自诞生以来，水下数字声学通信就需要定制硬件，而这些硬件既不具有规模经济性，也不普及。我们推出了第一个声学系统，可为智能手机和智能手表等现有移动设备带来水下消息传递功能。我们的纯软件解决方案利用当今设备中普遍存在的音频传感器（即麦克风和扬声器）来实现移动设备之间的水下声学通信。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一种通信系统，该系统能够实时适应移动设备之间的频率响应差异、不同位置的多路径和噪声水平的变化以及由于移动性而导致的动态信道变化。我们在六种不同的真实水下环境中评估我们的系统，深度为 2--15 m，并且有船只、船只以及钓鱼和皮划艇的人。我们的结果表明，我们的系统可以实时调整其频段并实现 100 bps 至 1.8 kbps 的比特率和 30 m 的范围。通过使用 10--20 bps 的较低比特率，我们可以进一步将范围增加到 100 m。随着智能手机和手表越来越多地在水下场景中使用，我们基于软件的方法有可能使任何拥有移动设备的人都能广泛使用水下消息传递功能。

包含开源代码和数据的项目页面可以在这里找到：https://underwatermessaging.cs.washington.edu/

papers.title: Using trio: juniper networks' programmable chipset - for emerging in-network applications.
papers.abstract: This paper describes Trio, a programmable chipset used in Juniper Networks' MX-series routers and switches. Trio's architecture is based on a multi-threaded programmable packet processing engine and a hierarchy of high-capacity memory systems, making it fundamentally different from pipeline-based architectures. Trio gracefully handles non-homogeneous packet processing rates for a wide range of networking use cases and protocols, making it an ideal platform for emerging in-network applications. We begin by describing the Trio chipset's fundamental building blocks, including its multi-threaded Packet Forwarding and Packet Processing Engines. We then discuss Trio's programming language, called Microcode. To showcase Trio's flexible Microcode-based programming environment, we describe two use cases. First, we demonstrate Trio's ability to perform in-network aggregation for distributed machine learning. Second, we propose and design an in-network straggler mitigation technique using Trio's timer threads. We prototype both use cases on a testbed using three real DNN models (ResNet50, DenseNet161, and VGG11) to demonstrate Trio's ability to mitigate stragglers while performing in-network aggregation. Our evaluations show that when stragglers occur in the cluster, Trio outperforms today's pipeline-based solutions by up to 1.8x.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Trio，一种用于 Juniper Networks MX 系列路由器和交换机的可编程芯片组。 Trio的架构基于多线程可编程数据包处理引擎和大容量存储器系统的层次结构，这使得它与基于管道的架构有根本的不同。 Trio 可以优雅地处理各种网络用例和协议的非同质数据包处理速率，使其成为新兴网络内应用程序的理想平台。我们首先描述 Trio 芯片组的基本构建块，包括其多线程数据包转发和数据包处理引擎。然后我们讨论 Trio 的编程语言，称为微码。为了展示 Trio 灵活的基于微码的编程环境，我们描述了两个用例。首先，我们展示了 Trio 为分布式机器学习执行网络内聚合的能力。其次，我们使用 Trio 的计时器线程提出并设计了一种网络内掉队缓解技术。我们使用三个真实的 DNN 模型（ResNet50、DenseNet161 和 VGG11）在测试台上对这两个用例进行原型设计，以展示 Trio 在执行网络内聚合时减轻落后者的能力。我们的评估表明，当集群中出现落后者时，Trio 的性能比当今基于管道的解决方案高出 1.8 倍。

papers.title: Vivisecting mobility management in 5G cellular networks.
papers.abstract: With 5G's support for diverse radio bands and different deployment modes, e.g ., standalone (SA) vs . non-standalone (NSA), mobility management - especially the handover process - becomes far more complex. Measurement studies have shown that frequent handovers cause wild fluctuations in 5G throughput, and worst, service outages. Through a cross-country (6,200 km+) driving trip, we conduct in-depth measurements to study the current 5G mobility management practices adopted by three major U.S. carriers. Using this rich dataset, we carry out a systematic analysis to uncover the handover mechanisms employed by 5G carriers, and compare them along several dimensions such as (4G vs . 5G) radio technologies, radio (low-, mid- & high-)bands, and deployment (SA vs . NSA) modes. We further quantify the impact of mobility on application performance, power consumption, and signaling overheads. We identify key challenges facing today's NSA 5G deployments which result in unnecessary handovers and reduced coverage. Finally, we design a holistic handover prediction system Prognos and demonstrate its ability to improve QoE for two 5G applications 16K panoramic VoD and realtime volumetric video streaming . We have released the artifacts of our study at https://github.com/SIGCOMM22-5GMobility/artifact.
papers.abstract_zh: 5G 支持不同的无线电频段和不同的部署模式，例如独立 (SA) 与 .由于非独立（NSA），移动管理——尤其是切换过程——变得更加复杂。测量研究表明，频繁切换会导致 5G 吞吐量大幅波动，最严重的情况是服务中断。通过一次越野（6,200公里以上）的驾车旅行，我们进行了深入的测量，研究了美国三大运营商当前采用的5G移动管理实践。利用这个丰富的数据集，我们进行系统分析，揭示 5G 运营商采用的切换机制，并从（4G 与 5G）无线电技术、无线电（低、中、高）频段以及部署（SA 与 NSA）模式等多个维度进行比较。我们进一步量化了移动性对应用性能、功耗和信令开销的影响。我们确定了当今 NSA 5G 部署面临的主要挑战，这些挑战导致不必要的切换和覆盖范围缩小。最后，我们设计了一个整体切换预测系统 Prognos，并展示了其提高 16K 全景 VoD 和实时体积视频流这两个 5G 应用的 QoE 的能力。我们已经在 https://github.com/SIGCOMM22-5GMobility/artifact 上发布了我们的研究成果。
